name: Patty Murray
subject: My op-ed in The Seattle Times
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

A Seattle Times columnist, Danny Westneat, recently wrote a piece about me, implying that it's futile to call out the corrupt power grab that’s happening in D.C.

**I really appreciate the good reporting that Mr. Westneat does, but I disagree. I believe that's exactly what Trump wants: to create a sense of apathy that silences critics.**

I got my start in politics speaking up to save my kids' preschool program. If I hadn’t spoken up all those years ago, my kids' preschool program would have been defunded. If we don’t all speak up against Trump today, we might not have a democracy in the future.

I had the opportunity to respond on the Seattle Times' opinion page myself.

I hope you'll read my piece at the link below.
| | [READ THE OP-ED >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994262/549673168/-730323383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjliODQwNS1hMjQxLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMy2HtL0FedC56fA70Fv8pA-W-47L8DP5roHWOk0dMs=&emci=5c471b55-8041-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=829b8405-a241-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13116610)
---
Thank you,

Patty

clean_body: | | | Peter, A Seattle Times columnist, Danny Westneat, recently wrote a piece about me, implying that it's futile to call out the corrupt power grab that’s happening in D.C. I really appreciate the good reporting that Mr. Westneat does, but I disagree. I believe that's exactly what Trump wants: to create a sense of apathy that silences critics. I got my start in politics speaking up to save my kids' preschool program. If I hadn’t spoken up all those years ago, my kids' preschool program would have been defunded. If we don’t all speak up against Trump today, we might not have a democracy in the future. I had the opportunity to respond on the Seattle Times' opinion page myself. I hope you'll read my piece at the link below. | | Thank you, Patty | | 👋WAIT! Before you click away ... Patty Murray is FED UP with the Trump administration ransacking the government and playing games with people's lives. And on her watch, they will not get away with it. ## A Violent Assault in Boulder Highlights Policy Failures
|
---

On June 1, a tragic incident unfolded in Boulder, Colorado. Mohamed Sabry Soliman, an Egyptian national who overstayed his tourist visa, launched a firebomb attack, injuring 12 individuals. Soliman had been residing in the U.S. **illegally** since February 2023 and had reportedly been planning this attack for over a year. Why is Colorado intent on allowing illegal aliens to run our state? **We can't continue to ignore our state's failure to put its citizens first**. Colorado's sanctuary laws restrict local law enforcement from cooperating with federal immigration authorities, even in cases involving individuals who have violated immigration laws. **These policies prevented authorities from taking action against Soliman before he could carry out his plans. **
SAFE Colorado is fighting to end sanctuary laws and give law enforcement the tools they need to protect our communities. **But we can’t do it without your support.**

### **Will you chip in today to help us keep Colorado safe?******

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Remembering Congressman Connolly
body:
| | |
---
**Boysko Bulletin: Remembering Congressman Connolly**
---
Dear Peter, In a time of the year when we celebrate graduations, springtime, and return to lovely outdoor weather many of us have been saddened by events these past weeks. As you are most likely aware, Congressman Connolly passed away on Wednesday, May 21st. He was a force in Congress who will be deeply missed. On a more personal note, Congressman Connolly was a mentor to me and many, many other elected officials. I first got to know Gerry more than 20 years ago, long before I ever considered running for office. He showed up in my community to help support efforts when there was controversy, he showed up for the parades and the fun stuff too. And he took me in hand when I decided to run for office. Over the years he was a source of support and thoughtful mentoring, always asking the difficult questions and insisting that I did my homework on policy issues we addressed. He served in that role for many grassroots activists, aspiring candidates, elected officials, and of course all of his constituents. His death leaves a void that will not be easily filled. Congressman Connolly’s funeral was a true celebration of his life. Senator Tim Kaine gave beautiful remarks, referring to their shared history as people of faith, as missionaries, and as being charged to advocate for those who often get let out of the political calculation. There was standing room only at his funeral at Heritage Fellowship Church in Reston. The afternoon before at the visitation his wife Smitty and daughter Caitlin, along with all of his Congressional staff welcomed over 1,500 friends and constituents paying their respect. Gerry would have been thrilled to see the huge and loving turnout. (I think more people attended than his largest St. Patty’s Day party and that’s a big crowd!) It was a fitting tribute and celebration of life for a man who impacted us all. If you have not seen the service here is a [link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994467/549683639/445263490?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). It’s quite moving. The Washington, DC, office and the district office of former Representative Connolly will continue to serve the people of the Eleventh Congressional District of Virginia under the supervision of the Clerk of the House of Representatives. See [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994468/549683640/-1153973386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556) for more information. Another source of pain and grief on May 22nd was the deadly shooting outside the Capital Jewish Museum. Two young Israeli embassy employees were killed. The event where the shooting took place was a meeting of Jewish community members seeking ways to provide humanitarian aid to Palestinians and finding ways for Palestinians and Israelis to work together and support each other in peace. It was shocking and devastating. Violence is never an acceptable answer. I’ve been in contact with leaders in Jewish community here in Fairfax County. The JCRC will be offering anti-bias training and encourage continuing dialog. I look forward to participating in the town halls to work for peace and common ground, and I encourage you to participate. Former Hunter Mill Supervisor Cathy Hudgins passed away just days ago. Her work on affordable housing, thoughtful transportation solutions, and efforts to ensure adequate human services resources will remain her legacy. I was fortunate to work with her on initiatives pertaining to transportation planning and also aging in place when I was a staffer for the Dranesville Supervisor’s office. Her funeral service will be on June 6, at St. Thomas A Becket located at 1421 Wiehle Ave., Reston Visitation - 10:00 AM - 11:00 AMFuneral Service - 11:00 AM - 12:20 PMReception - 12:30 PM - 1:45 PM I am aware that many people in our communities are grieving their own losses in addition. It’s a difficult time in our nation and our world. I send peace and comfort. We are also blessed with resilience, fortitude, kindness, and the ability to be there to support one another. I’ll include highlights of the good that happens every day in our community below and we are fortunate to have such a compassionate, strong, and active citizenry here in the 38th District. I’m grateful to represent you! Kindest regards,
---
---
Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS For those with students graduating- Congratulations! My new daughter-in-law graduated from medical school recently and we are so proud of her and all of the other students who have completed their degrees. We are happy for all of our students who have worked hard to achieve their goals. PSS If you would like to support my work, please visit [my fundraising page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994469/549683641/1617457950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=). **Photo Gallery**

**Proof of Citizenship Now Required to Board Domestic Flights and Enter Federal Facilities** The federal government now requires that you present a REAL ID-compliant form of identification to board a domestic flight or to enter a secure federal facility or military base. A REAL ID is an optional, upgraded version of your driver’s license or ID card with a star in the right corner. Since REAL ID is optional in Virginia, you may not need one if you already have another federally accepted form of ID, like a valid U.S. passport or military ID, or don’t travel by plane. However, if you do want one, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Constituents have reached out concerned about the time it takes for DMV to verify citizenship. If you need assistance, please reach out by email at SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov. DMV’s website has clear [instructions for REAL ID applicants](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994471/549683643/106817674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). Find a location [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994472/549683644/-153163152?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). **Election Updates** **June 17 Primary to Select Candidates for the November 4th Election** The next election date is June 17th for the Primary Election to select each party’s candidate for this year’s November 4th election. Virginians will elect a new Governor, a new Lieutenant Governor, an Attorney General, and the entire House of Delegates. Not all candidates have a primary opponent. You can check your registration status and register to vote in the [Citizen Portal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994473/549683645/852988634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). We have same day registration in Virginia. You can vote in person on June 17th. Or you can apply for a mail in ballot through June 6th again through the [Citizen Portal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994474/549683646/1526721175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). The site includes suggestions for federal workers seeking to rewrite their resumes for the private sector, plus region-by-region links to major employers’ corporate career pages and links to region-specific job searches on Indeed and LinkedIn. **Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment:**
* [**NOVA Economic Development Alliance The Pivot**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994486/549683658/-1132520029?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556) is an 8 week webinar series practical guidance, entrepreneurial insight, career exploration, and access to local resources. The program empowers participants to redefine their professional paths and pursue meaningful opportunities in the next chapter of their careers.
* **NOVA New Employment, Exploration and Transition (NOVAnext)** , is a new program to help recently unemployed federal workers and federal contractors transition to their next careers. The first in the region to provide new, dedicated training funds for unemployed federal workers and federal contractors, NOVA is committing up to $1 million in scholarship aid to allow approved participants to enroll in one of 14 courses at no charge and access NOVA-sponsored online workshops on resume-writing and job search techniques. For additional information, please call the Substance Use Disorder Prevention program case manager at 703-866-2121. **Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants** I will continue to work to ensure that our communities are welcoming, diverse and provide opportunities for all people to live with dignity and safety. Working together, we can build good lives for our families and our communities. The news of deportations is distressing and we can prepare. **If you or a loved one encounter immigration enforcement officials, it is essential that you know your rights and have prepared your household for all possible outcomes** : **Ask for a warrant** : The Fourth Amendment of the Constitution protects you from unreasonable search and seizure. You do not have to open your door until you see a valid warrant to enter your home or search your belongings. **You have the right to remain silent** : The Fifth Amendment protects your right to remain silent and not incriminate yourself. You are not required to share any personal information such as your place of birth, immigration status or criminal history. Respectfully say, “I am exercising my right to remain silent.” **Always consult an attorney** : You have a right to speak with an attorney. You do not have to sign anything or hand officials any documents without speaking to an attorney. Try to identify and consult one in advance. Please share this information from the ACLU, available in multiple languages: [“Know Your Rights.”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994510/549683682/-939671523?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556) We are also working with the Legal Aid Justice Center which has asked that we share their [Rapid Response Toolkit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994511/549683683/1464008473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). **Opportunities** **Fairfax County Affordable Housing Waitlist Opens** The Project Based Voucher (PBV) waitlist is **open through June 8** , for family housing at six privately owned properties and multiple County-owned properties through the Rental Assistance Demonstration (RAD) program. The Project Based Voucher (PBV) program provides rental assistance to eligible households to live in specific rental units. Through a contract with the owner of the unit, the Fairfax County Redevelopment and Housing Authority (FCRHA) pays a portion of the monthly rent, while the household pays their portion of the monthly rent based upon 32% to 35% of adjusted gross income. An eligible household includes an applicant who is 18 years or older and may be single, elderly, a family, a person with a disability, or a person who has been displaced. [Apply here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994516/549683688/-1844211616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556). For assistance, call (703) 246-5100 or visit the Department of Housing and Community Development office (3700 Pender Drive, Fairfax) between 8:00 a.m. - 4:30 p.m., Monday-Friday. Visit FCRHA's website for more information. **Vaccine and Microchip Clinics** As part of Fairfax County Animal Shelter's Pet Resource Center, Fairfax County residents have the opportunity to have their pet vaccinated and microchipped without the cost of a veterinary exam. All clinics are first-come, first-served and are cash only. Clinics are held at either Fairfax Center Fire Station 40 or Fairfax County Animal Shelter - Lorton Campus. There is a clinic on Monday, June 9, from 9 to 11 am. Rabies Vaccination $20 DHPPi (dogs only) $20 FVRCP (cats only) $20 Microchip $20 Dog License $10 [Learn more](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994517/549683689/-1451943776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556) about the vaccinations offered, vaccine age recommendations and our microchipping services. **Solarize NoVA Thru July 15** Since 2014 the campaign has resulted in more than 9 MW of new solar in region; $28+ Million in private sector investment. Since its inception in 2014, Solarize has been committed to supporting homeowners by offering free solar satellite assessments and education on the benefits of solar energy. The program has been widely successful, helping Northern Virginians save money and reduce their reliance on traditional energy sources. With the 2023 passing of the Inflation Reduction Act, the federal solar tax credit has increased from 26% to 30%, offering even more financial incentive for homeowners to make the switch to solar. As the nation navigates uncertainty, this may not always be the case. Homeowners and businesses interested in joining Solarize can sign up for a free solar satellite assessment and access discounted rates until July 15th. LEAP offers ongoing support throughout the process to ensure a seamless experience, from the initial consultation to installation. For more information on how to sign up for Solarize or to attend one of the free, informative webinars, please visit [https://www.solarizenova.org/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994518/549683690/-1476207771?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556) **Free tickets to NextStop Theatre’s production of Footloose for Furloughed Federal Workers** NextStop Theatre is offering up to 2 free tickets to select performances of Footloose (runs through June 8) for recently furloughed or laid-off federal employees (subject to availability). I recently had the opportunity to attend a Shelter House program and learn more about the critical services they offer in our community. Shelter House provides prevention services to families at risk of homelessness in half the service regions in Fairfax County. The crisis intervention and supportive services provided help families that meet the eligibility criteria to stabilize in housing and avoid homelessness altogether. Shelter House also operates five shelters in our community, including a domestic violence shelter in Herndon. Domestic Violence Prevention Services are designed to help victims of domestic violence who wish to flee but are not able to enter emergency shelter by providing flexible financial assistance and mobile advocacy services to help them obtain safe, affordable housing without ever becoming homeless. Shelter House’s Domestic Violence Rapid Rehousing Program serves victims of domestic violence exiting emergency shelter by providing housing location support, financial assistance, and case management services geared towards safety and housing stability. **To support Shelter House’s work, donate**[**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/108994520/549683773/-1842827668?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDI2MjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJkYzM0MzAtYTU0MS1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V1amr4cvEuP-ileQG8zTp2zAAJpHsWaBGi0Gg27H6Z0=&emci=27f8b07d-8f1c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6bdc3430-a541-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=22486556#!/donation/checkout)**.**

clean_body: | | | Boysko Bulletin: Remembering Congressman Connolly Dear Peter, In a time of the year when we celebrate graduations, springtime, and return to lovely outdoor weather many of us have been saddened by events these past weeks. As you are most likely aware, Congressman Connolly passed away on Wednesday, May 21st. He was a force in Congress who will be deeply missed. On a more personal note, Congressman Connolly was a mentor to me and many, many other elected officials. I first got to know Gerry more than 20 years ago, long before I ever considered running for office. He showed up in my community to help support efforts when there was controversy, he showed up for the parades and the fun stuff too. And he took me in hand when I decided to run for office. Over the years he was a source of support and thoughtful mentoring, always asking the difficult questions and insisting that I did my homework on policy issues we addressed. He served in that role for many grassroots activists, aspiring candidates, elected officials, and of course all of his constituents. His death leaves a void that will not be easily filled. Congressman Connolly’s funeral was a true celebration of his life. Senator Tim Kaine gave beautiful remarks, referring to their shared history as people of faith, as missionaries, and as being charged to advocate for those who often get let out of the political calculation. There was standing room only at his funeral at Heritage Fellowship Church in Reston. The afternoon before at the visitation his wife Smitty and daughter Caitlin, along with all of his Congressional staff welcomed over 1,500 friends and constituents paying their respect. Gerry would have been thrilled to see the huge and loving turnout. (I think more people attended than his largest St. Patty’s Day party and that’s a big crowd!) It was a fitting tribute and celebration of life for a man who impacted us all. If you have not seen the service here is a . It’s quite moving. The Washington, DC, office and the district office of former Representative Connolly will continue to serve the people of the Eleventh Congressional District of Virginia under the supervision of the Clerk of the House of Representatives. See for more information. Another source of pain and grief on May 22nd was the deadly shooting outside the Capital Jewish Museum. Two young Israeli embassy employees were killed. The event where the shooting took place was a meeting of Jewish community members seeking ways to provide humanitarian aid to Palestinians and finding ways for Palestinians and Israelis to work together and support each other in peace. It was shocking and devastating. Violence is never an acceptable answer. I’ve been in contact with leaders in Jewish community here in Fairfax County. The JCRC will be offering anti-bias training and encourage continuing dialog. I look forward to participating in the town halls to work for peace and common ground, and I encourage you to participate. Former Hunter Mill Supervisor Cathy Hudgins passed away just days ago. Her work on affordable housing, thoughtful transportation solutions, and efforts to ensure adequate human services resources will remain her legacy. I was fortunate to work with her on initiatives pertaining to transportation planning and also aging in place when I was a staffer for the Dranesville Supervisor’s office. Her funeral service will be on June 6, at St. Thomas A Becket located at 1421 Wiehle Ave., Reston Visitation - 10:00 AM - 11:00 AMFuneral Service - 11:00 AM - 12:20 PMReception - 12:30 PM - 1:45 PM I am aware that many people in our communities are grieving their own losses in addition. It’s a difficult time in our nation and our world. I send peace and comfort. We are also blessed with resilience, fortitude, kindness, and the ability to be there to support one another. I’ll include highlights of the good that happens every day in our community below and we are fortunate to have such a compassionate, strong, and active citizenry here in the 38th District. I’m grateful to represent you! Kindest regards, Jennifer B. BoyskoMember, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS For those with students graduating- Congratulations! My new daughter-in-law graduated from medical school recently and we are so proud of her and all of the other students who have completed their degrees. We are happy for all of our students who have worked hard to achieve their goals. PSS If you would like to support my work, please visit =. Photo Gallery 2025 Herndon High School Graduation 2025 Reston Pride at Lake Anne Enjoyed Next Stop's production of Footloose and the post show talk back discussion of the show's message regarding censorship and allowing all people to live authentically - a wonderful Pride Month message Town Hall with Delegate Sullivan at The Grange in Great Falls; with commendations for community leaders, state champion athletes and their coaches, musicians and film makers - we have a talented community, with dedicated volunteers. Working together we will thrive. Photography Credit to Artin Safaie. Honored to be named one of two Legislators of the Year for our work to bring paid family and medical leave legislation to Virginia. Photography credit to Juliet Morro. Presented a dozen commendations to community members at a Town Hall in the Herndon Community Center. Thanks to all who came out. It was a special night. Appreciate the Herndon Police Department for bringing a cake! The top photo is of South Lakes HS student Kian Tatsuo Linam, a student at South Lakes High School in Fairfax County, receiving Senator Boyko's commendation recognizing his success as a jazz pianist from the SLHS Principal. The middle photo is the presentation for Pradip Dhakal for service on the Herndon Town Council and the bottom photo is a commendation for Herndon Police Department Officer Murn. Photography credit to Artin Safaie. Ran into Ishaan, a former Senate Page and Team Boysko Intern, at McLean Day At the Herndon Senior Center for their 20th Anniversary Celebration It's always great to get outside on a beautiful day and speak with members of our community. We also took time to congratulate the Fox Mill Woods Swim and Tennis Club on 50 years of providing recreational amenities and opportunities for relaxation to families from Reston, Vienna, Oakton, and Herndon Thanks to Virginia Tech Research Center for hosting an informative session on Data Centers, focusing on efforts to reduce their energy and water use with efficiency improvements. DMV Updates | | Proof of Citizenship Now Required to Board Domestic Flights and Enter Federal Facilities The federal government now requires that you present a REAL ID-compliant form of identification to board a domestic flight or to enter a secure federal facility or military base. A REAL ID is an optional, upgraded version of your driver’s license or ID card with a star in the right corner. Since REAL ID is optional in Virginia, you may not need one if you already have another federally accepted form of ID, like a valid U.S. passport or military ID, or don’t travel by plane. However, if you do want one, we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. Constituents have reached out concerned about the time it takes for DMV to verify citizenship. If you need assistance, please reach out by email at SenatorBoysko@senate.virginia.gov. DMV’s website has clear . Find a location . You have the option to make an appointment or to wait for your turn - during open hours, each location’s wait time is provided. Election Updates June 17 Primary to Select Candidates for the November 4th Election The next election date is June 17th for the Primary Election to select each party’s candidate for this year’s November 4th election. Virginians will elect a new Governor, a new Lieutenant Governor, an Attorney General, and the entire House of Delegates. Not all candidates have a primary opponent. You can check your registration status and register to vote in the . We have same day registration in Virginia. You can vote in person on June 17th. Or you can apply for a mail in ballot through June 6th again through the . Or you can vote early in person through June 14th. Check locations and hours of early in person voting . Make sure to cast your ballot in a primary and make your voice heard! Learn who the candidates are for the primary you are voting for and exercise your right to vote in the primary on June 17th to support your candidate of choice for each position! Congressional District 11: September 9 Special Election Governor Youngkin has called a special election to fill the CD 11 seat for September 9. Democrats are expected to hold a firehouse primary to select a candidate. Constituent Services Resources for Those Impacted by DOGE Times are tough - there’s a lot going on. Federal workers laid off by the new federal administration are encouraged to reach out to their federal legislators - , and your . The is also gathering stories of people impacted by the DOGE cuts. Fairfax County’s website includes a with a variety of resources that can help former federal employees, contractors and anyone else affected by job loss. Financial help is available for many health and human service programs, taxes and pet-related expenses. For those eligible for unemployment benefits, the Virginia Employment Commission (VEC) requires that people receiving unemployment benefits show proof of job searches each week. I encourage you to seek support for finding a job from . They help identify training programs, job opportunities, and help with resumes, emails, and interviewing skills. My constituents report good results working with VCW. . is a initiative. The site includes suggestions for federal workers seeking to rewrite their resumes for the private sector, plus region-by-region links to major employers’ corporate career pages and links to region-specific job searches on Indeed and LinkedIn. Additional Resources for Federal Employees Facing Unemployment: is an 8 week webinar series practical guidance, entrepreneurial insight, career exploration, and access to local resources. The program empowers participants to redefine their professional paths and pursue meaningful opportunities in the next chapter of their careers. NOVA New Employment, Exploration and Transition (NOVAnext) , is a new program to help recently unemployed federal workers and federal contractors transition to their next careers. The first in the region to provide new, dedicated training funds for unemployed federal workers and federal contractors, NOVA is committing up to $1 million in scholarship aid to allow approved participants to enroll in one of 14 courses at no charge and access NOVA-sponsored online workshops on resume-writing and job search techniques. For more information, visit If you are a government employee with information related to the politicization of the federal workforce, the firing of civil servants, or waste, fraud, or abuse of taxpayer dollars, you may to the Democrats on the U.S. House Oversight Committee. The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission has resources regarding employment discrimination for federal employees that can be accessed . Employment rights under federal law (U.S. Office of Special Counsel) Whistleblower protections and accompanying resources, click To understand prohibited personnel practices including the right to appeal, visit The Library of Congress Beginner's Guide to Civil Service Employment Law can be found . Help Paying Bills If you are struggling to pay bills, please visit Virginia’s to figure out if you qualify for assistance. You can also reach out to your county - your local government will review your financial situation and connect you with resources. In Fairfax County, contact . are additional resources for food. If you have lost your health insurance, please visit to figure out if you are eligible for Medicaid or for help with Affordable Care Act insurance. If you cannot afford healthcare, visit . Transportation Discounts: 50% Off Metrorail and Metrobus for SNAP Recipients Please share this news - SNAP Recipients qualify for Metro Lift, a 50 percent discount for any travel on Metrorail and Metrobus. Customers in DC, Maryland and Virginia who qualify for the US Department of Agriculture's Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) are eligible to enroll. Easy sign up \- multiple languages Learn more about reduced fares for seniors 65 and over and those with disabilities . Reach Out for Mental Health Support The is available nationwide. You can also find support for yourself and family members by reaching out to or. Learn more about suicide prevention by reading this SAMHSA blog article, “.” The Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration National Helpline: 1-800-662-4357National Drug Helpline: 1-844-289-0879National Institute of Mental Health Information Resource Center: 1-866-615-6464Partnership for Drug-Free Kids: 1-855-378-4373 Addiction Recovery Addiction is a life threatening problem for too many Virginians. Please reach out if you need help for yourself or a loved one. As a member of the , we work together to ensure that people have the resources they need to identify and get help for addiction recovery. Early detection and treatment are key to recovery – support is a phone call away. For additional information, please call the Substance Use Disorder Prevention program case manager at 703-866-2121. Know Your Rights - Resources for Immigrants I will continue to work to ensure that our communities are welcoming, diverse and provide opportunities for all people to live with dignity and safety. Working together, we can build good lives for our families and our communities. The news of deportations is distressing and we can prepare. If you or a loved one encounter immigration enforcement officials, it is essential that you know your rights and have prepared your household for all possible outcomes : Ask for a warrant : The Fourth Amendment of the Constitution protects you from unreasonable search and seizure. You do not have to open your door until you see a valid warrant to enter your home or search your belongings. You have the right to remain silent : The Fifth Amendment protects your right to remain silent and not incriminate yourself. You are not required to share any personal information such as your place of birth, immigration status or criminal history. Respectfully say, “I am exercising my right to remain silent.” Always consult an attorney : You have a right to speak with an attorney. You do not have to sign anything or hand officials any documents without speaking to an attorney. Try to identify and consult one in advance. Please share this information from the ACLU, available in multiple languages: We are also working with the Legal Aid Justice Center which has asked that we share their . Additional Resources for immigrants: Fairfax County’s Fairfax County Public Schools: If you are an immigrant in need of legal services, please visit: Call Immigration Rapid Response Hotline, Virginia Network, 855-298-3271 in the event of an ICE raid or arrest For a list of resources provided by the Virginia Department of Social Services, please visit here: Opportunities Fairfax County Affordable Housing Waitlist Opens The Project Based Voucher (PBV) waitlist is open through June 8 , for family housing at six privately owned properties and multiple County-owned properties through the Rental Assistance Demonstration (RAD) program. The Project Based Voucher (PBV) program provides rental assistance to eligible households to live in specific rental units. Through a contract with the owner of the unit, the Fairfax County Redevelopment and Housing Authority (FCRHA) pays a portion of the monthly rent, while the household pays their portion of the monthly rent based upon 32% to 35% of adjusted gross income. An eligible household includes an applicant who is 18 years or older and may be single, elderly, a family, a person with a disability, or a person who has been displaced. . For assistance, call (703) 246-5100 or visit the Department of Housing and Community Development office (3700 Pender Drive, Fairfax) between 8:00 a.m. - 4:30 p.m., Monday-Friday. Visit FCRHA's website for more information. Vaccine and Microchip Clinics As part of Fairfax County Animal Shelter's Pet Resource Center, Fairfax County residents have the opportunity to have their pet vaccinated and microchipped without the cost of a veterinary exam. All clinics are first-come, first-served and are cash only. Clinics are held at either Fairfax Center Fire Station 40 or Fairfax County Animal Shelter - Lorton Campus. There is a clinic on Monday, June 9, from 9 to 11 am. Rabies Vaccination $20 DHPPi (dogs only) $20 FVRCP (cats only) $20 Microchip $20 Dog License $10 about the vaccinations offered, vaccine age recommendations and our microchipping services. Solarize NoVA Thru July 15 Since 2014 the campaign has resulted in more than 9 MW of new solar in region; $28+ Million in private sector investment. Since its inception in 2014, Solarize has been committed to supporting homeowners by offering free solar satellite assessments and education on the benefits of solar energy. The program has been widely successful, helping Northern Virginians save money and reduce their reliance on traditional energy sources. With the 2023 passing of the Inflation Reduction Act, the federal solar tax credit has increased from 26% to 30%, offering even more financial incentive for homeowners to make the switch to solar. As the nation navigates uncertainty, this may not always be the case. Homeowners and businesses interested in joining Solarize can sign up for a free solar satellite assessment and access discounted rates until July 15th. LEAP offers ongoing support throughout the process to ensure a seamless experience, from the initial consultation to installation. For more information on how to sign up for Solarize or to attend one of the free, informative webinars, please visit Free tickets to NextStop Theatre’s production of Footloose for Furloughed Federal Workers NextStop Theatre is offering up to 2 free tickets to select performances of Footloose (runs through June 8) for recently furloughed or laid-off federal employees (subject to availability). To claim tickets, patrons will be asked to share the name of their former department and the date of their furlough or separation (for internal tracking purposes only). Fill out form to claim your tickets! Give Back I recently had the opportunity to attend a Shelter House program and learn more about the critical services they offer in our community. Shelter House provides prevention services to families at risk of homelessness in half the service regions in Fairfax County. The crisis intervention and supportive services provided help families that meet the eligibility criteria to stabilize in housing and avoid homelessness altogether. Shelter House also operates five shelters in our community, including a domestic violence shelter in Herndon. Domestic Violence Prevention Services are designed to help victims of domestic violence who wish to flee but are not able to enter emergency shelter by providing flexible financial assistance and mobile advocacy services to help them obtain safe, affordable housing without ever becoming homeless. Shelter House’s Domestic Violence Rapid Rehousing Program serves victims of domestic violence exiting emergency shelter by providing housing location support, financial assistance, and case management services geared towards safety and housing stability. To support Shelter House’s work, donate. In the News Events Thursdays, May - October, 8 - noon/ at 765 Lynn St. in Herndon Fridays, May - October, 8 am - noon/ 1659 Chain Bridge Rd in McLean Saturdays, April 26 - November 22, 8 am - noon/ at 1609 Washington Plaza N in Reston Saturday, June 7 from 1 to 5 pm/ Saturday June 7, 11am - 3pm/ at Reston Town Center in Reston Saturday, June 21, 10am - 2pm/ at Frying Pan Farm Park in Herndon We welcome notices about events that are free or very low cost. Keep in Touch I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, Juliet Morro and Aditi Goel. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Peter, this is Don Jr. Thank you so much for supporting my father, **President Trump** throughout the years. From the phony impeachments, to the crooked indictments, to the assassination attempt, we are so lucky to have the support of **the most loyal base in American history. ** But today's not about me, and quite frankly, it’s not about my father. Today is about one of the strongest **MAGA** warriors who doesn’t always crack the headlines, but causes a **BIG STIR IN THE SWAMP.** His name is **Michael Cloud**. He is currently serving the people of Texas, but the fight he brings to Congress is for **ALL** Americans. Congressman Michael Cloud has been a **LOYAL ALLY** of President Trump and his administration from the very beginning. In fact, he showed up to Mar A Lago right after the unlawful **FBI RAID** to show his support for the President and his family. This is what my father, **PRESIDENT TRUMP** had to say about him: _"Congressman Michael Cloud is doing a phenomenal job serving the incredible people of Texas. _ _He fights hard to support our Farmers and Vets, secure our Border, defend our Second Amendment, and hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable._ _ Michael is a strong supporter of our America First agenda, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement!"_ **He has never let my father down. ** Michael Cloud is currently serving on the **DOGE** Committee, working tirelessly to hold the left accountable for the **world's largest money laundering scheme in history!** He always fights for America First: 👉Close the border 👉Defend the Second Amendment 👉END taxpayer-funded abortion We are so honored by the **ENORMOUS EFFORT** by the **MAGA** movement to elect not only President Trump, but also a majority in Congress. However, the fight isn’t over yet. My father **NEEDS** Michael Cloud to keep his seat in Congress after the midterm elections. The Democrat machine is willing to do **WHATEVER IT TAKES** to end the Trump Agenda. From **phony impeachments** to **assassination attempts** , they aren’t afraid to **GET THEIR HANDS DIRTY!** That’s why I am asking you to do something for me today. Congressman Cloud asked me to send this to you for him since he thought you’d read it coming from me. I’m asking Trump’s most loyal Patriots to **PLEASE** click this button to read his message to you.

Donald Trump Jr.

name: Team Bonta
subject: [Petition] Stop Trump’s budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
There is nothing “beautiful” about ripping health care and food assistance away from people who need it the most.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250604&t=1&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)
Donald Trump’s disastrous budget plan is a full-scale attack on working families in California and across the country, and it’s moving quickly through Congress.
**[We still have time to stop this bill, but only if we raise our voices together. Sign our petition demanding that the Senate reject this dangerous budget plan.](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-signup-budgetbill-20250604-1?source=em20250604-1816&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)**
Trump’s so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill” is an ugly attack on safety net programs, including more than **$700 billion from Medicare and Medicaid, kicking more than 10 million people off their health insurance nationwide, and more than $300 billion from SNAP.** Children will go hungry, and families won’t have access to life-saving medical care if this bill becomes law.
And that’s just the beginning. There would be huge cuts to investments in renewable energy, reforms that make college even more unaffordable for working families, and increased funding for Trump’s mass deportations – all to pay for tax cuts for his millionaire and billionaire buddies.
**Despite what they’re calling it, there is nothing “beautiful” about ripping health care and food assistance away from people who need it the most.** We can’t afford to have so much of our progress wiped out with one piece of legislation.
Rob is doing everything he can to protect California from Trump’s attacks, but now he needs your help. Join him in letting our senators know this bill would hurt so many in our communities.
**[Add your name to our petition urging the Senate to block Trump’s budget. If we’re going to protect our progress, we need to act right now.](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-signup-budgetbill-20250604-1?source=em20250604-1816&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)**
**[Add Your Name](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/em-signup-budgetbill-20250604-1?source=em20250604-1816&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)**
In solidarity,
Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250604&t=3&refcode2=1816_1088799_h9dL-v&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1816%2E1088799%2Eh9dL-v)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

body:
| | | Peter, I recently warned you about the far-Left Arlington County Board choosing to REFUSE to cooperate with ICE — _**even for violent criminals and terrorists.**_
**Now, their criminal-first, victim-last policy is already backfiring.**
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/aNxa9lm3QeyPax5LUbopKPwGj42Q7k3-phzGZwqou3Dv2Ez7GP_soZGbOcahFjLliGhEpbFu8Mg9cYKKFiXFAnNEdv5iy-cL6JcOMXUtTSjeVHybXySOefdzzPQRgPnIJBLqeSYT6ZvUvz9RrUoJCgiiTgFHKJvzG4-SPSlxzKvJ4mCD_m0FJSb16MI3kIdyHFgVs5NnoUOxQXIHXYSzh5ZlY3dk9fisYpdEF4BSOBUqozrlpoXKo_YzINVtTRQNR2SW00idtnhhGKPXepnxf_Yl2jchXIunbthlmUazQKi3yEIg0ry904pvztwamB7Fi40lbg-G4XCCRH_UtEhsHUwQqii6vmGSNGoufRhLhuAkZX9okFHYBVzFsMblOpI4awAd5CtGJxI_hHrNoP6sHi8dlfI94VUdNq2rw8YVl-HaYKycJCWDvGIlr1bxSjtXgwE_VMmqOE7sDTSRaO2H/l_joXEBsiBVV4B5_R_mIJPIVxEz8HLOH/9)

As a result of this reckless policy change, [_**Arlington County Police are being forced to DISBAND their Gang Unit.**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/-WHqr3qfcXeXT_UnhBnLGTGfzqbaUaFWtg0vTUxMC0XMg_tOuIRkvUunVP7Guc594fmagP60Is_aW8oaIQq7t68kUMwfDH9BgFSH0AkfE5FvZ6U6XogyfSMAIaOSb3WYhUSf8R6Xc217vgHaxGhoRMbaLTFVOO8eja-VYggjPKwfgJUMgPWA-ydGocgjmq-pykKUd6M_e-64hbajwq2NBD90GuP3Ydw_qy8YHraS3Nn2pMrhlalueSS9nOLWEJFmNjD8bTQqkTExFCDTAYXCzO8-HyAwg8xU6WPcEacvWMk94aN1OZOmeKGATao2wvGDN4m29IUlj5JlegYk3k4M-gIMOj2UBWqN1MtLZpJn3TfAZljiHGtXne2zulg5LGlaXDK0mPQHFMfmO1brnlV4SCKbv8HqYEbOEUvXaQ0E75HV7Rj52juBMLoYWav1LItfUmfC96RLmBBvHOG0z82F/VphHP4_i9WcOd2VESPFD3gNUfiUag-oP/9)
_Even worse,_ the brave men and women of the Arlington PD Gang Unit have been reassigned to focus on property crime — _not getting violent offenders off of our streets._
---
[ **STAND FOR A SAFE VIRGINIA** ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/ckCY9WEfMgo9E6IM53BSR-X4BnobMeLsZOg6UDA1JYxazeskto7k3UK4m5dRT7lZdIIoygOAcaqWAATRcTp9m5R3RXrOI7fQm9BPChfOKHK4U7I3FFV3El1ddBuEIAScSfH-GhqJ7kikFf2Pn7XWztJpQvCSDpJNoN4hpbTNeoVWFjA6IQEXC8OxPLJZS8g_xxgoCyrHWPRAcHBny_iGTwKPm6zlfyvllSKD25WD9L5-Uh696cw4s7L7GcoLD9CSZYWNbkCCW5D04uXUbZmejE7X5QGnrCcXoHoIngfCWZwcRTigQaBAYLnZp8EMkrqmehzS9dpNDd9nb73B-ZvhNMDkp_aUoqngqH9bVgTm6wmmQzLWxIBHuAh73sIheXSYhu4c51b3ykbb9eHVxK7Od0eeSxB5JgrLbYoTeMesWNdyG9Njzpov_PeEOhKXQYujzeFTKWDhgN0OvTawQ8im/0mE5yM87oStMTH_lW0zUnOxi2hpIEYV6/9)

Since most criminal activity referred to ICE involves gangs, Arlington is choosing to cut ties with immigration authorities, _effectively turning its back on fighting gang violence._
As Virginia’s top law enforcement officer, I won’t stand for this — **my office is working nonstop to keep Virginia safe, even if politicians refuse to do so.**

But I can’t do it alone, Peter. If you believe sanctuary cities have no place in Virginia, [_**stand with us to put an end to this nonsense.**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/9dWJfQDC_5ZPltgRlruxNdgFM0LkJmIosmues8Xi-haxaLm2YHU0A__ugWROZmCEkLaN6aepZFPgOTO1xdxxfjiwqx4lSGWHtppdBSQr3ZCIw5DSyPA1A5snHt6E7ZUK_c97s8gdVV3jZijOooXChShhoxOfG21y0MYA0expe74ii4yShj-EkVmG9airUi-DRrZIHVe315JgAXik_FXYx3wJZa1PvzuXGNAJyMI2qebvBct_ZYSak4DwC36BlrmWf6v8voEyCRwVrRtGSP1HKc8NQiQQnawiRL4FyuAR3psCXmPz7JKaX8dSrpbdG1C3y7ZprDDtrHsg-QJqWYFpFwxMlhQk2VsfsLnv0kY08QmO-Gtq3h5PdzWnPnIyXivzid7R1s7vIFKM8HjtlOhP1cznzpnit8KWOyTuxMRLJvzAj25oZ-DI1SpeVLsqwU2uJLwULI-EfMrUc1c-MDx1/8bFg1aAWX2XuGOk0GWHFGNd6Y-qrL8sD/9)

name: Katie Britt
subject: My message for Hillary Clinton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/oPeyVnc2LJx6JaPpYgTGOA~~/AAVLBhA~/3uUoVaESfixhFQjWmkIHLVlgWbrLBLEUo_Tvk6829surNDwE89ZPWLnNUuxq-QqE3wrB3T-y4esqWXrV-ZbHm7UZTP5rjX1lftd9ppRdvcMfklj93uS3M5kRvXDvBkx0U_rJpMKzWSaqXfufRxVc9gGs2jVwTHtb4_m9_5aT3AJ9sgljt-XxB1eBo2VAz_QGuxQC9Aui4-io2XreyUwUikOGxwKGk8s3c3O_ZwADB0WZCtdF-NHR7h80MfTt9wc2Gk3tVQfx3tPn47cf-hMv9fZgXff0NOPWFNzXRzTJTPSuJ2JXqg7f_xhjzbiAjBBFCFzR9qgtUb6BGxQI3CwMB6Zx-LJUQl_egDvVjG6OJOM9uUn2pfn2-_wdsdUuqe2k2dzLYHNSQ5vyRpCMBOn5MNFOc77KFx8pQyKE0L-k2x4~)
Friend, if there's one thing the Left fears, it's a conservative woman.

Hillary Clinton and other Democrats say they're pro-women... until they find out we have an "R" by our name.

Hillary and the rest of them can say whatever they want. I'm a conservative mama on a mission, I'm not backing down, and I know that millions of other women across the country feel the same way.

name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants PUNISHED for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf13t2s6j5sut01hdptsc20davms7k7kqg5ggpc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zomp4ul0kib21fcu07ribbshdih1d3qvslmah4n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9kr2f5uip9uu471mu5ff02cj6idtcp7mpvllkcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvedfgm60vmn55j45pe80pcsnepkoom2rv55r8c8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z178oi495bbo2t02f1s2ldmhj2gud5ovl4bes6o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl4p7fnkp8cmni3764canek3tvldoostlc95jcf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2ktsubacq771e7apll400m3tobfqh2161m2pf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdctloqf48i30stocq2t27794jl8c97fkj345mk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z48fbuuorerkahjf2mbu5gnj3spi2l6r1apd3a30_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs407gu1djbelg1jc0rdro3vcfs26tgjoide96m0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs9u0rs60vbn97tsckat4aj1dhiq4jp5c756h8sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9ajiaqbss3brt4hmff7lphqofm47metru65mle0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3s3ct1bqsm55lm1q147d73h45ch2pjbdt57tbio_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbkdci29np5vsbuk86ahujqt23v8h3v4vlums7ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhn2216j8bl32gnc0tfb1ae4nktjkghk6hr6u7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cph2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Was it worth it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The most important question of all.

Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgvik2d8itl03p5tgl21ak1647ebt3fn9r7krv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z011hrg9k4na41fhqpou293c1aq19ha9psgvhm58_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cdh2bs)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Friend. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $100,000 I need to cover the costs to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsa7ocd4ug92k5b9rbsmcsafkra5b80gr9pk1qpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi6eor1cdh2bs)

__
---

clean_body: The most important question of all. Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet! | Friend, Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it. Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth? These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are still attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the TRUTH remains... ...Being an enemy of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT! So yes, Friend. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it. When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS. My resolve NEVER wavered, and that’s all thanks to you! Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like YOU. But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts. And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own. Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along... This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry. That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man. I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in your hands. name: John Rich
subject: J6 defendants PUNISHED for being veterans
body:
I recently came across a striking statistic... 72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0nkvobm3cvg3km0nlhcofomkh5eg3c22ahofrto_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjnaeglo6o84nft6pioolci9o5h2i064g81fub08_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc4pvng46sv9t7551i14j8n2snoqu0grq5vo1i5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

Friend,

I recently came across a striking statistic.

**72% of J6 defendants were military veterans or first responders.**

And while courts often consider prior service as a factor for lighter sentences, the prosecutors and judges in these cases used their veteran or first responder status to argue for _**harsher penalties**_.

_Is this how our criminal justice system thanks them for their service?_

I’ve always honored those who serve. We are living the American dream _because_ of them. The way these patriots were treated is a grave injustice.

And while President Trump has pardoned almost all of the J6 defendants, they still haven’t received justice.

The lives and reputations of these patriots remain shattered from the lost years to the consistent government and mainstream media smear campaign they endured.

That’s why I’m proud to support Stand in the Gap.

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

[If you believe in liberty, in due process, and in standing up for our fellow Americans, I hope you’ll make a donation to Stand in the Gap today. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z631ajecr5t34ievk75entkf84njop08k5djji10_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zherjji4ol2ai36ejtc2djla75c0knbb0l1cuej0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.
Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties finding a job
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for J6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to individuals transitioning back into society after incarceration, and working towards a more forward-thinking and restorative prison system that sends non-violent offenders into the world better off than they were when they went in.

Through their programs, partnerships, and advocacy efforts, they are making a lasting impact on the lives of those in need.

**There are nearly 1,600 Americans who are looking for a second chance.**

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9rang6oskpfrmamev0d8hmh1mq4v0v6t7t0buu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmdpka8k6ecr9apgmkc04mpu24l26b7o8s7lbhfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9bkakkidkjonf66bso7r83g3tsqs64hprd58fj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2t72bpd8nuhmctt5d9jlbparhbmks29c1eggcg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs3ueqnvam0o4jptpoap1o8dn5h21ckbge18rmu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3a3808svn3265ei5fsc2s5hm9vrmm2gp7vft080_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7iuvdh451un45ds1jdknfqsgmgiesvlnc40d3t8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6474rmnk3ium6e036p2jf59lnanf0csvrsj9tso_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvin24jnrpuiel9l8fgjik06vhrie8u5ggkt2ma8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
This isn’t about politics. It’s about justice.

These are real Americans — veterans, first responders, fathers, mothers, hard-working citizens — who exercised their First Amendment rights and were persecuted for their political beliefs.

_**If we don’t fight for our fellow patriots now, who will?**_

When you donate to Stand in the Gap, you’re not just defending individuals. _You are defending the soul of our country_.

**As long as there’s breath in my lungs and truth in my heart, I’ll be singing to honor veterans and first responders. I hope you’ll join me by taking action right now.**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr9ki6cmg39upj8fcge2kn0vhd51lt6nsuhe26d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shi61pb6cth2bs)
For faith, freedom, and country,

John Rich

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Today at 3:00 PM ET: Join Our America First Policy Webinar
body:
Join our webinar with Wade Miller, Executive Director of Citizens for Renewing America.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** Join us TODAY, June 5th at 3:00 PM ET, for [a critically important webinar](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794ab9ea2a0/1edb9794ab9e02b0 "a critically important webinar") with Wade Miller, Executive Director of Citizens for Renewing America and Senior Advisor for Center for Renewing America. We'll dive into complex and confusing topics like rescission, pocket rescission, impoundment, and more--terms essential to making America great again. **For example, if you want DOGE spending cuts to become a reality, we need to use these tools to make them happen.** Don't miss this chance to gain clarity on the legislation shaping our nation's future and to find out how you can pressure Congress to get it done. # [Tell the Senate to vote NO on Trump’s “big beautiful bill”](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a7a9e41-5072-44ce-a8a6-9be16f79e86f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48d914b7-49c3-4001-a692-a9d5d5ff7df1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | House Republicans narrowly passed Trump's disastrous spending bill, which he's calling his "big, beautiful bill," by just one vote. This bill would add $2.3 trillion to the federal deficit over 10 years and revoke Medicaid benefits for 8.6 million people. Now this awful bill heads to the Senate, and we need them to vote NO. Some Republican senators have voiced opposition to certain parts of the bill, but we need the Senate to fully REJECT this bill that would be a disaster for our economy and for millions of Americans that rely on important programs that this bill cuts or restricts. [**Tell Republicans to show some backbone, and join with Democrats to vote NO on Trump's "big, beautiful bill."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95fca068-aab0-4b65-8fa2-717e5aa9fdc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot, **BREAKING: Supreme Court candidate Chris Taylor openly admitted to learning how to influence judicial decisions for legislative purposes under the mentorship of Federal Judge Lynn Adelman, who is currently overseeing the controversial Hannah Dugan case. This alarming revelation exposes a dangerous trend of judicial activism that threatens the integrity of Wisconsin's judicial system and the values we hold dear.** We cannot stand idly by while activist judges like Adelman and Dugan and candidates like Taylor work to undermine the rule of law. Judicial activism in Wisconsin is eroding the principles of fairness, impartiality, and constitutional integrity that our courts are meant to uphold. If left unchecked, these actions could have far-reaching consequences, jeopardizing President Trump's bold agenda to protect our freedoms and preserve the traditional values that make Wisconsin great.This is a critical moment for our state, and we need YOUR help to fight back. [By donating $25, $50, $100, or more today](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-y/), you can join us in calling out Adelman, Taylor, and other judicial activists across Wisconsin who are using the courts to push their own agendas instead of upholding justice. Your contribution will fuel our efforts to raise awareness, mobilize grassroots support, and ensure that our judiciary remains a bastion of impartiality, not a tool for political maneuvering. [END JUDICIAL ACTIVISM](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-j/) Why does this matter? The courts are meant to interpret the law, not rewrite it to suit personal or political ideologies. When judges like Adelman mentor candidates like Taylor to legislate from the bench, they jeopardize the separation of powers and the democratic process. This isn't just about one case or one candidate--_it 's about safeguarding the future of Wisconsin's judiciary and protecting the values that define our communities._**Your support is vital to our mission. With your donation, we can:**
* Launch a statewide campaign to expose and oppose judicial activism.
* Educate voters about the dangers of candidates who prioritize ideology over impartiality.
* Advocate for judges, like Justice Rebecca Bradley, who will uphold the Constitution and President Trump's agenda to put America First.
* Mobilize grassroots efforts to hold activist judges accountable and ensure Wisconsin's courts serve the people, not special interests.

**Every dollar you give brings us closer to stopping this dangerous trend and preserving the Wisconsin values we cherish.** Whether it's $25 to help spread the word, $50 to support our outreach efforts, $100 to amplify our message, or a more generous gift to lead the charge, [your ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-d/)[contribution ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-h/)will make a real difference.We must act now to protect our courts, our values, and our future. Join us today in this critical fight to stop judicial activism in Wisconsin. [Donate $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford, and together, we will send a clear message: Wisconsin's judiciary is not for sale, and our values will not be compromised.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qluhruk-didthutlhu-k/)-WISGOP | **PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. www.WisGOP.org Republican Party of Wisconsin **|** 148 E. Johnson Street**|** Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-qluhruk-931243C5-didthutlhu-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-qluhruk-didthutlhu-o/)

name: Stefany Shaheen
subject: My daughter’s story — and why I stepped up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2cf6e439-ec5c-4d1c-bed5-1745917c9e8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95436d2f-eb8a-41bf-a222-a9cc5cbda91f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, I’m Stefany Shaheen, and I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in New Hampshire’s 1st District. This district is my home. It’s where I grew up, raised my family, and built my business. It’s where I learned what it means to care, serve, and fight for what matters. My daughter, Elle, was just eight years old when she was diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. Her life has revolved around needles and blood sugar checks, 24-7 — with too many sleepless nights and constant worry that the wrong amount of insulin could kill her. That experience changed me — and for more than 15 years, I’ve fought for medical research and innovation in health care to help people like my daughter and millions more who are battling chronic, life-threatening diseases. Now, Trump and MAGA Republicans are crushing medical research while Republicans in Congress slash Medicaid, and health care for kids, seniors, and veterans — all to give big tax breaks to billionaires and corporations. It’s time to turn outrage into action. I’ve got to fight. I’m running for Congress to fight for New Hampshire families and the values that make us strong. There’s no one who fights harder than a mom for her kids, and that’s how I’ll fight for your family, too. In New Hampshire, we stand up for each other. [This campaign is about people, not politics. Will you help us start this campaign off strong by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8031e2eb-aca6-43c2-8d60-880728d4cd4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1be18e22-f8c9-4b02-9936-4ac5e6bdfa15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
