| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...
**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21557/6374453/40a38d98369322c73748df22ec8181a369e5aceb/bb250ffa4cb3961934594758e618b9bfbcac647f)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... [We’re only giving away 500 Dash Eagles for 80% OFF...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21557/6374453/40a38d98369322c73748df22ec8181a369e5aceb/bb250ffa4cb3961934594758e618b9bfbcac647f) And it’s first come, first served... Oh yeah, did I mention that I’m giving you free shipping? I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out...

## DOJ Sues Over Tuition for Illegal Immigrants
The U.S. Department of Justice has [filed a lawsuit against Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuWsyAQx59GOzyAF7Cg-Bq7fO2WnhGGZPagZGWMydvvSV5h-__193WZL0CJtut_WNHxM-Z5w7MkZMZ9Dvm7HFgYn1CW5SfCSukV8QizlroXchCynwNQes1dHdwiw6hqdMp0o9JKm7a-OWNN68EPiwc7wtJGZdEaiGPwGmMra3LvMDnIXimplGys9RbjMkKPvtUQq05iIM57wzf8bInplR-4Nz6vdXI35nup2n-Vnio9nefZxPw0cBSm7S2p9PT-VOnpYxa0icLAKPggpryJsCOsAjzXuwv3k1KiMpiqk9cVKH1a-G9sHk7_BgAA__-a6nuF) over a state law that grants in-state tuition to illegal immigrants attending public universities, claiming it violates federal law and recent executive orders that prohibit taxpayer dollars from being used to benefit those illegally in the country. In 2001, Texas became the [first state to offer in-state tuition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2upCAQRp8Gd3SAVrAXLHoxzurOdpYGodC64adHsG3ffqKvcHeVVHJyzvf3a_wyGDDNf0wEXT8-jwn2EqBWWEeXv8sGpcLHlGn6503EcHjY3CiY6CiTlHWjMxiOsW2cnph78AY0V-2DCy7UvVm06IUCsNwr1XrJHLdedvYBtldKgJQN6hPGJOs4Z5yzW9_bHvz0MB3YuzCetAwc1rze6gKXiw9HfsN6szk2QS-1vgq5P4kYiBj2fb_Fks4fEQMkuhUihjOKiOG6Xf6mZxa9WPQk0VcOaA864xvTTLfkst0ipAqOYow4rybVQjHRUk0FWjesmBMRg1np88l_y6X91azavXYMAYtUpGVzNBgux_qzZd9a_A8AAP__9-qQdA) to illegal immigrants, requiring them to have lived in the state for three years before high school graduation and to sign an affidavit pledging to seek legal status. Efforts to repeal [the law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhSAcxZ8GNwwgIA4MTRq327WjAfmjNCi3gtfr2zf6Cp1Pzu98fD-GhwkxrNOXWUCXt0_DCkeOUApsg0s_eYdc4G2ytb_eLCGeHnY3MMIEJhITMTgT4jnwymlLXEcr0LTlHWWUtU01a9d6b8EL7hUXwjSttMoYJdVoJeeWVkFfMCKJoJRQSmqlRgXedkbA2DDjESfgQklbXWa4u_h4phds9ZiWKuq5lGdGzQdiPWL9cRz1aeaULhWx_pqDWO_BZZx3wDcAX3Yc0zph2nFBlFRtPZcloqaf9nFM-1pgQ80nrTbtnkeIMWTZIk6mxYR4B5f_3fXS7C8AAP__oF9_tQ) have failed in the past, despite criticism from high-profile officeholders like Gov. Greg Abbott and Attorney General Ken Paxton. State Sen. Mayes Middleton (R-Galveston), who is running to succeed Paxton and authored a bill to repeal the statute during the just-concluded legislative session, [welcomed the lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMV2i8RgDLlzchi633dIa8DjxyoQsnnzw9qvkFbY9xU9H_69TOFEu-Xr-Twt7eaU1XPlZC4vwFuL6Xe9chV9Up-kn0ZLLnvgeAwLaA3QHsCFSLntom-gniE437HXfOo0ae9NcvIuY2LqBgYk00mAoTpb0lCDZbrZN9m8MOrBag9ZwHIZ54DQ5sjwbpKRa4Jhl3Y5y4c-XVPb1wdtxXpem-IvIrSrzT-GocHy9V4XjQjvXsOQYC8t6VThWIblXhaN2Bkxvddtb15rOIHbN5uPtmUvJtetVC-eFcvn48rcqD4-_AQAA__8p5nWW).
## Abbott Signs Key Bills
Gov. Greg Abbott held bill-signing events this week for several initiatives he advocated for during this legislative session. On Monday, Abbott signed House Bill 150, which establishes the [Texas Cyber Command](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOnTAQRb_GdPNkDwZDQZGGbtOmRGN7zHNi8Ab7LcvfR49fSDfSXB3do_vrY_mgmOK-_qSNp_od8rLzWRLXysfi8-_y4lL5m4q1fwNtMV2BX35BiR3IHmS3eIrpWnTjJyv9qBqelNGjQoWmbZ6TdFqhQUut1oMcHetuHI2Ro5TWBN81cXrDZC87paRS8jEMbuBgR-rYtUhBaMk-1nw86pPvLiFd-YuPh8tbk6ZnrZ9FtD8EzgLn8zwff3gv3fsrcKajRpdY4PwWEzin7CgJnG-SwHl9o_Z8wHrwCmRtrhUK7UB7zXvMcAfBXZYPcHnbaPfwqoUgkIsp1gsKu9dxHxS4XmBjSlDiurMXOKNpoSVs2971IHvlQNtRASnnwPRBm06h14Nvjsl_njGlWHojtFw3iul2rP-3zNeE_wIAAP__ZW2jPQ) at the University of Texas at San Antonio. The task force, expected to be operational in 2027, received $135 million in funding and is projected to employ 120 full-time workers. On Tuesday, Abbott visited Houston to [sign a package of bills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAURp9GOx24CkJBsY1dtt2SucIlsoMxARKTt99JXmH78_3M-TnZE8YUL-dv3MjUZ9jthY6SqFbK1u-_5U6l0hPLstwCbjG9At29BQaiY7JjwnqM6WXH1puFec1bMnwaNQcO09CuRoDGwEel0LNRiUCCcJIBBKDkE0AbzbuMSSY4Z5yzXimnKCwaBbkBMDQjIx_rnvu60udLSK_9Qbl3-9Yms9Z6Lc3w1cDcwHwcx5tzdKmUy-2Omd5cA_Mn2sCMuUaXyLrgvBDoO-H80I1a606hmzq5cIECXAjS9WvdUpuNvx4xpVjk1IzsvGFMn_H6P2UPA38BAAD__9MQgB8) that restrict the use of cashless personal bonds, allow prosecutors to appeal bond decisions, and prohibit local governments from funding charitable bail organizations. He praised a constitutional amendment to deny bail for certain violent offenses. Yesterday, Abbott visited Salado Middle School to sign House Bill 2, which provides $8.5 billion in additional funding for public schools, about half of which is earmarked for [teacher pay raises](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULvSnCAUfhrscADFS0GRxm7TpnS4HPRkjrIRXHffPuO-wl9-M9_9z2N-WCTcl992A1PeMc07XJmgFDjmkP7mE3KBt83O_Yt2Q_pEOMOshNJcdFzoOVikz9xWwTgRRlmBkX07SiVV31Sria2NjZfBh87HqLXTUsZhbHzTAzihKzS3meiEllJIKeph8ANEN1oNvlE2slZAwJKOuqzw7RLpk15w1D5tFZm1lGdmzS-mJqam67rqmN69PXPB_aYwNd2bmJq-Yv48HaHn2a8pEY_nHnBfuEMinnHZb2CdS6VUhwnPC4kwdz1rxbJZpG9o-dlVL6P-BwAA__80eoFj).
## Trump Burger Goes Viral
A Texas burger chain celebrating President Donald Trump is the subject of [recent profile pieces](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb8GM6agQR0Dgk3M3qYbWiiN9haCCzjz3K_fcn5hk-7g3jp16v76mr4sBYrrT7ujqd8-TRHfJWCtmCeXfpcTS8VvW-b5j7c7hcvj6SYQ0HLRcdFOzlK4Jt04Mws3yAaN7PUgQUKvms0MWoFfFq0deKXQqUUJrbWXMIhO921D5oaJTrRSCinF4_lcnujnwba4KLCeaYGOasqPuuHHxYcrvTA_lrQ3wWy1HoWpHwxGBmO8jlTqHTEYbzKDUXT3AQbjfBaKWAqDkWIhh7zmcz_4fOYVM68b8ojv--_o-LJZitzhK1V0vCZ-ZEuF4vopHhn_MhibbNzxphCodD3TYt0thY9a_b9BXwb-BQAA___ZAort) by several prominent publications, including _Newsweek_ , _The Independent_ , _The Economic Times_ , and the _New York Post_. The wave of publicity for Trump Burger—which has locations in Bellville, Flatonia, Kemah, and now Houston—appears to have been sparked by negative reviews. [One writer](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtyhDAMQE9jOjO2-Bcu0tBt2pSMwGJxYjCxxX5un2GTG6SQKs17b_RxGS7ovNuu77iS4cccho3uyRMzxcGGz3RQYnpgGsfvGVfnnzMddgAFlVS1VNVg0fnnUGbWjMp2OiOjm7LToKEpssUgVqgLrKu2mako21oVqGGykyLoOtVkzpwwVatKa6W1ytt2amkeO6xoKgBnUSqyjkPMeaFXy-yf4UYxn8KaebMw70kUbwJ6Af0SjsRhywn590JAfwoE9Ofoc0FZFqqrQEDP8Vh3OR7xSlHukZKztLEcyfub857kH09-0YqLfOllmmgjGWkPkbNo7H533rtUN6JU1xWdf5Xx__55M_ATAAD__1BPiok) proclaims she "tried it so you don’t have to," lambasting the quality of the food and the store's pro-Trump vibe. [Lebanese immigrant Roland Beainy](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAUhJ8Gd2cFZ_23BcVKkYtIN0WalBaYw5oEgwN4ufv2kVd5g1uORvr0zfz6mD-U8y48fqiNZPm0cQ5Us6dSKM0m_s4H5UKfKmv916rN-Zelw8zIsQPeA-9mo5x_zW1jpObmJhqSYmhvAgUO12aVCnm_9IZjiyP2w6DbTusRLXbc4HDtGydPGO95JwQXgl_GcRnJ6pvqaLmisqzlZFyJ6VJWertY_4pPSpclbo2Xayl7Ztc7w4nhVGu9bDmcHcOJAhyZ4WRjNCoYk1z48z-eOxlOiZ6OKqzxyCUGyBCoQknHtoM-0oMSZEpPynDssHsK5QXRwh69K27JsMYKGcpKcDIZTirB_S6m7_rbzyZJs1fnvcv9wFr-2JTzb-nytaufEv8FAAD___7FlgM) opened the first Trump Burger in Bellville in 2020. Each restaurant features American flags, images of the president, quotes from him, and the chain’s staple item—a burger with the name “Trump” emblazoned on the bun. Some of the menu items take [jabs at Trump’s political opponents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2SrCAUBOCn0QwLUBQDgpuYzU03tPg56NkCmQUcZ95-a-YVNu_qr6u_butNY8Bj-68jqPr0aT3gKgFqhby69F1OKBWeuhjz43XE8PJwupVTLggdCRWr0xhe69A6ZaibWQuKTcPMOONT3-5qZBOzfnBSCCm0lRr4NI4zmEHO3PZ9i-pdRkcqGKOM0U5KK8GbWQuwPde-GSg4rCl3dYfPFh9e6QG5sym2Qe213kvT_2v40vDluq7Op6c5Cx5QyjvT8CWCQ93wxWasaAvxZwRS8xnvxJx5g0zsrvEgW04XHhv5MG1W7n5hCFjGqRnoFjWGD1r_dtVD8d8AAAD__z5igJc). The Biden Burger, for example, sells for $50.99 and includes a 1-ounce beef patty topped with “old tomato” and “the oldest buns available due to cheating and inflation.”

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: New York is now in play for Republicans
body:
We can flip the Empire State RED in 2026

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
This is a huge development in my home state.****
**[A new poll was recently released showing that a Republican - me - would be just ONE POINT behind Democrat Gov. Kathy Hochul in a hypothetical matchup for Governor of New York!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
With 15% of voters still undecided, this race is wide open. Let me be blunt, we are closer now to a Republican winning a statewide election in New York than we have been for over 20 years.
We can put a Republican governor in Albany but we need to lay the groundwork right now.
[FLIP NY RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, if we can flip the Empire State next year and transform New York into a swing state it would _**completely change our electoral map**_ and _**strengthen our ability to deliver an America First agenda**_ for all Americans.
The transformation of states like Florida and Ohio into MAGA strongholds paved the way for our victory last year. New York is primed to become our nation’s next battleground and winning statewide elections here would solidify our ability to Make America Great Again at the state and federal level for years to come.
[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Decades of Democrat party control have led to the absolute degradation of New York.
New York is the hub of the world economy. It’s where Wall St meets Main St. For centuries it has been where families from across the nation and across the world have come to build the American dream for themselves and future generations.
Yet under the failed leadership of Eliot Spitzer, Andrew Cuomo, and now Kathy Hochul New York has become a cautionary tale.
Their economic policies have _**crushed entrepreneurship and small businesses**_ , their soft-on-crime policies and a refusal to take action on the illegal immigrant crisis have seen** __**_**a rise of violent crime on our streets**_ , and their _**horrific handling of COVID**_ led to thousands of deaths that were covered up by the Cuomo-Hochul administration.
The results are devastating. _**Businesses are shuttering** , **families are fleeing**_ to safer states, _**young people are leaving en masse**_ due to lack of opportunities as well as the rising cost of living, and there has been _**no accountability**_ for the Nursing Home Scandal.********
**[The situation is dire and Kathy Hochul, currently the worst governor in America, has no plan to repair the damage her party has done.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**It has gotten so BAD for the current regime that her own Lieutenant Governor, that she hand picked herself, is now primarying her:**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It is evident that Hochul has lost support not just from Republicans and Independents, but now Democrats as well.
But changing one Democrat for another with the same failed policies would be like putting a new paint job on a broken down car, it would not solve any of the problems.
**It doesn’t have to be this way and New Yorkers know it. It’s time for a real change.**
[FIRE HOCHUL IN 2026](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, New York deserves better leadership and the United States deserves to have one of its largest states be governed with competence that will help usher in the next age of American greatness rather than undermine it.
I am committed to continue fighting tirelessly to ensure that we elect leadership that champions freedom, security, and prosperity for every American family, especially my fellow New Yorkers who have been long neglected by the Democrat Party.
From the North Country to the Big Apple we are going to fight for every vote, we just need the resources to keep up the momentum.
**[That’s why I launched the Flip NY Red Fund to FIRE Kathy Hochul and NY Democrats in 2026.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB42/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****_[Please fill out this brief survey today and make a contribution to my efforts to fight for and deliver Republican leadership to New York](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB42/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**If we can save the Empire State, we can save America. I appreciate the support of every patriot who stands with me now in the fight for New York and our nation.
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aB40/?__vbtrk=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk0Nzg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

|

---

---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Dear Friends,
We'd be honored if you could join my friend, fellow veteran, US Marine, and our next Virginia Governor Winsome Earle-Sears for her Danville Summer Kickoff.
I worked closely with Winsome in the Virginia State Senate. I can tell you firsthand she knows the issues and she takes governing seriously. Just like me, Winsome wants all Virginians to live, work, and raise their family in peace.

This will be a great opportunity for you to connect, hear from an inspiring leader, and get to know our next Governor.

For details, please email: michael@winsomeforgovernor.com
[Please](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001djBupaPLoMlIt55NRLxbDlKU1fRwfqtXc_Fbmv0qlEI5NXwC14WUCu44UR4bEcKvXjCFr4ABt5UYNBdholi5NiWm4Q_fDucHzUQHQRQXnncJKYvhqD-6nqe3cd39oRU3Qq9OYwuava0FmPIctfS6hMnww7Lt-ShWVpVKloHrObc9ow_pTcAoSyiHPrpuutZ6DfaPWYo4Nr8=&c=0bMDUPNFe_4Uknm-vjfQRPrjh9DoSfMehOKoZqUVhCaOWviQOvGLuA==&ch=zbcOQjatSULKZszXOZT7a_me3cNnhMmziIqACe6_sZqtuueCjTg8tA==)[ Contribute Here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001djBupaPLoMlIt55NRLxbDlKU1fRwfqtXc_Fbmv0qlEI5NXwC14WUCuMuXq6Idw_eMYaQWKZPKU9YFjQ329ErClJTmFa-Cg0H5z5To65YpO0iPWydEttn9WlmkjozIU9mUNIWk0R2OZrZ1O38XnkxJkdpQN5Ufg9JkG8MNFO0n9qN-4sxvWOKQkusue9Ktsf_SOrUOfgZbRg=&c=0bMDUPNFe_4Uknm-vjfQRPrjh9DoSfMehOKoZqUVhCaOWviQOvGLuA==&ch=zbcOQjatSULKZszXOZT7a_me3cNnhMmziIqACe6_sZqtuueCjTg8tA==)[ ](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001djBupaPLoMlIt55NRLxbDlKU1fRwfqtXc_Fbmv0qlEI5NXwC14WUCu44UR4bEcKvXjCFr4ABt5UYNBdholi5NiWm4Q_fDucHzUQHQRQXnncJKYvhqD-6nqe3cd39oRU3Qq9OYwuava0FmPIctfS6hMnww7Lt-ShWVpVKloHrObc9ow_pTcAoS2klzVlFEf_sq7l2_sqhujE=&c=0bMDUPNFe_4Uknm-vjfQRPrjh9DoSfMehOKoZqUVhCaOWviQOvGLuA==&ch=zbcOQjatSULKZszXOZT7a_me3cNnhMmziIqACe6_sZqtuueCjTg8tA==)

clean_body: Just like me, Winsome wants all Virginians to live, work, and raise their family in peace. | | | | == | == | Summer Kickoff: Please Join Winsome for Governor and Me Saturday June 7 | | == | Dear Friends, We'd be honored if you could join my friend, fellow veteran, US Marine, and our next Virginia Governor Winsome Earle-Sears for her Danville Summer Kickoff. I worked closely with Winsome in the Virginia State Senate. I can tell you firsthand she knows the issues and she takes governing seriously. Just like me, Winsome wants all Virginians to live, work, and raise their family in peace. This will be a great opportunity for you to connect, hear from an inspiring leader, and get to know our next Governor. For details, please email: michael@winsomeforgovernor.com == | Thank you for your support! Please bring a friend. We would love to see you there! | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. The Trump administration is moving to [revoke $4 billion in federal funds for California’s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO5CAQxvHT4AzLPPwKCDZx1ptuaJWhsGtFQwtwW337kSeZA0z8l0r1-_491gdQoLj_hSea6tMa8SoBa8W8ZqBQczq3gBQtBPIpR4JzW2Une94NvOtXBxQ-q26c8YgSVYNGjHoWUk2Dag6DoMdtgr5X3o3aCjvPYnLDLCxYr8apIXNf64auF0JrKVpARGV7IbBXfnQb0x06qim3_xPFeqAPn_TG3Nr0bII5an0Vpv4wuTC5XNfV2q3cirszuRSIPkO0VGxicrkLk8sPhx-0H7y8EB2_xdyjwwyB-zM6iju3Z2VyabJxr4tCoDKMTHf7Eyh8v1B_tdvbyK8AAAD__4HEhF0) long-delayed high-speed rail, citing cost overruns and delays uncovered in a 315-page federal review.

# Thursday, June 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1956, Elvis Presley made his second appearance on T _he Milton Berle Show_ , performing _Hound Dog_ with tremendous energy. His provocative hip-swinging moves during the performance sparked controversy and ignited a debate about the impact of rock 'n' roll on American society. [See the performance here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0E1u6yAQAODT4F2s4cfmsWDxpMqrptss0TgM8UTERBgnTU9ftVfoBb7FdzqGI3Lm9fKBN_ItlbDSc8vUGtVQkXOrZZ8z8XrGzKnUlXGfgwI1HGA8wBAicn4F00WfiBTpjry0xkml_426W7x2g4QIUhuXXIxxNAjOgkNLmsYEHfsfDUYYpDRGyR6JSJ8HKWnQycZZGKDIrdT-WnhtC6X8Kg-q_bncuuyX1u6b0P-FmoSaXmVvez-TUBOfrnZ-_zzC10XoKRG2vZLQb9uClWJXfbw_OWfeRisMXG7I-Zdsf3p4ePUdAAD__zUNcXI). Speaking of music that sticks, have you ever wondered why certain songs get lodged in your brain for days? Turns out, your [brain might actually be syncing up](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO6yAUAL8Gd0RwAD8Kitu4y223tDAcx2fFI8I4kf9-lf2FrUeakebrvtwdRcqP_y6hbVtZMr6PiK1hXaqj2Go514iUvYu0lZrJnesCAgwXPRdmCY7itegu2A0RUHVo5aAnCWrsVbfbVchp8kEBoJN-GMOoIah1FAb8aLzoyH5sohdGSq1B3hwiKm-kRKO2IaxMCwzUSr19F8ptxy1e5YX15kvqot1bex5M_WMwM5jTlUrAmhO2D2cwZzyri7ziUbLLHnnbsdSLp_Mgz9fqKHNqfmcwd9WG55tipKMfmBaP5Cj-Ztqf3rws_AQAAP__SZ96KA) with the music, as we report in _Science_. Do you have a favorite song that never gets old? Just hit reply and tell us your all-time favorite track--we'd love to hear it. 🎧 **New today:** We're debuting **Podcast Extra** , a new section featuring stories you'll only hear on _The Flyover Podcast_. These are important headlines we're covering exclusively in today's episode--don't miss them. Join _The Flyover_ as we donate to help feed hungry children this summer with our sponsor, [Christian Appalachian Project](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DturDAUgOHVQAfyE4bCxZWuppu0KZGxj-FEfqCDGTS7jybKDlL_0lf8n4_5YTFiXj9sAlNDmTNcR4RagWayGCuVc4mA2dmIoVBGey6zYEJ3bOiYnr3F-JpV600AECBbMHxUExfyNsh2M5oN3PpxGt3i1Rjg5vxtWtgwKe3UpEKL5q2xgWnOlRK8twAgneYctAyjXxrFwGMt1H8VzHWDEF_lCdS7ktpotlr3o5H_GnFvxP26rt5thEdFm-2-94XWd5H3UCg18v9xpgTUbWdegbpfqiXj9wtjxGMYG8XWZDH--PVPU55GfAcAAP__Di53qQ).

## Feds Threaten to Pull $4B from California Rail
The Trump administration is moving to [revoke $4 billion in federal funds for California's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO5CAQxvHT4AzLPPwKCDZx1ptuaJWhsGtFQwtwW337kSeZA0z8l0r1-_491gdQoLj_hSea6tMa8SoBa8W8ZqBQczq3gBQtBPIpR4JzW2Une94NvOtXBxQ-q26c8YgSVYNGjHoWUk2Dag6DoMdtgr5X3o3aCjvPYnLDLCxYr8apIXNf64auF0JrKVpARGV7IbBXfnQb0x06qim3_xPFeqAPn_TG3Nr0bII5an0Vpv4wuTC5XNfV2q3cirszuRSIPkO0VGxicrkLk8sPhx-0H7y8EB2_xdyjwwyB-zM6iju3Z2VyabJxr4tCoDKMTHf7Eyh8v1B_tdvbyK8AAAD__4HEhF0) long-delayed high-speed rail, citing cost overruns and delays uncovered in a 315-page federal review. Originally pitched as an 800-mile line from San Francisco to Los Angeles, the project has shrunk to a 119-mile stretch in the Central Valley--already $35 billion over budget with billions more needed. Transportation Secretary Sean [Duffy called it a "boondoggle"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdF75lw2Fi42uSHXTpEiJDB7DRMZGtsHat4-4TR4g3UgjfTrn_P6cPi0GjOtPu4OpPk0RWglQK-QpWww1p3MOgHGxAX3KEe05T4IJTVlPmZ6cxfCeVOeMBxAgOzD8qQYu5LdedpuRPWfiCZYzLRavuVO91YsHB17NwzB0aO411jPNuVKCPywAyEVzDlr6p5uJYuCwpvz4kzDWDXx4pwvyY0l7F8xW61GIfBExEjG21h57ifePiBEiPQsR4y1FxPh1u9P7N93TBYXWRB34Mzr6T49uuG60HACO3gWo9RUynQOWChnjSm_4bAPNcCE0Ikab6evFf_T6oxE5pgUdkR_f76rQyi_IR5eNOxqGgKV_EsXW3WL44q__Ff0y4m8AAAD__7VTmOo) and gave the state 37 days to prove it's still viable. California leaders pushed back, saying the review misrepresents progress and ignores state funding commitments.
## Social Security Sending $14.8B in Back Pay
The Social Security Administration has [processed benefit increases for 91%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1qwzAURp_G3mT0ZzseNKQF0wxpCgl0NLJ0Fd8iS0FSYvL2JX2Frh8fh8P5Pk5HjR7D9VOvoIqLU4AteygF0pQ0-pLiffaAwWiPLqaA-j5PnPKW0I7QdrIa_XOStVUOgIOoQbFeDoyLXSfqRYl5N8yUQSetA9062hkOvTCSDQ5mNtSoXjTa0ZYxKTlrNAAI0zIGrXC9nStJwWKJqfmJGMoCzj_jA1Jj4lp7tZRyy5XYV3ys-LhtW-N8TGi1069HxceP04VcTl-Hd3JZgJyjQe3JGcw9YXmSUWMKkDPZm0IOwSTQGTJ5gwAOSyYuJnJE7zGG3BhGhdg1S1nrpOxte-256ytJr6tG_6dU_tXxofhvAAAA__9BvojQ) of nearly 3 million Americans impacted by the Social Security Fairness Act, distributing $14.8 billion in retroactive payments just five months after the law was signed in January 2025. The changes primarily [benefit teachers, police officers, and other public workers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbvO20oQg59G6sZYrS62CxWnUfefNqUwWlHW5N-LsDuy4bcPnHRp0xEsSPDjj6_5i8VLfPzPAaNuaY54FQ9V5DmzeM3pXDwkOvaypRyFz2W2xvZkBjL9vLL499zV67gBFm2Nsbl298a2t6Gt99H0w9DdrktrcOtvpr3f0Fts7dUOxi7rUMv4STOD6Zum62xzYQCt65sGfbtd16XqDFbRlC8_k0Tdsfl3eiJfXAq1H3fVo1Ttf5WdKjvBpZiCOJWAcpG4Cv-RLoXKTp91lZ0kKnJklRTZV3Y6P2ZJTthTgTuz6Js2lhxRCrFTWhCxiZJEl8EFhTLY7XRv6MjJoRSs9NpZ6TgXL44QDp_eQKEIrKSJvmN6ES_pVNIdkmmXx45Mf_ce_A6IWojjSv4MB5UzUIbmxE7lCXI73HchifRBV9mJs4rzKHt6VXZqbDPYdrD24kKp87geL_FeynCtOvMILP43Ov2nv5-j_RUAAP__0aXG0w) with pensions from jobs that didn’t pay into Social Security. The law repeals two long-criticized provisions—the Government Pension Offset and the Windfall Elimination Provision—that had slashed benefits for many. Monthly payments are rising by an average of $700 for affected spouses and over $1,100 for surviving spouses.
## Germany Defuses WWII Bombs in Mass Evacuation
Cologne, Germany, carried out its [largest evacuation since World War II](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ8Gd1j82dgFxTaWtsg2W0xpYbg4d4QhAhwrbz9KXmHqo3N0vu_rtt4sRkz7P3uAaSGvCa4aoTUoa7EYW8nnFgGTsxFDLgntua2CiYGykbJh9Rbja1WdNwFAgOzAcK1mLuQ0yu5ufOBz8Dww5bweJgZMOOkUeK_1rO3YoXmvsZENnCsleG8BQLqBcxhk0H4jioHHlkv_nTG1O4T4yk8ovctHF829tUcl8g8RCxGL3dyboN_zOyZi-ZsalGQb5mQjEcuFBf63XF5ELC7HvCegtdnSKt1w36E2Ck_rzk-D8lkN1EM4K9DrQqRbPrZKuRBKT3KSXTH-cWGMWEdNFNsPi_FzrP3K5tOInwAAAP__9reLMg) on Wednesday, clearing over 20,000 residents to safely defuse three massive U.S. bombs uncovered during roadwork. The 0.6-mile evacuation zone covered homes, 58 hotels, nine schools, a hospital, and key transit routes, with Rhine River shipping also halted. [Watch a video report here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L0O2yAUxfGnwRsWX8bxwNDFW7p2tLC5JLe6hghwaN6-Sl-h85GOfvr_um93j4Tp8dOf4FrMW4JeCVqDshWP1Eq-dgJMhyeMuST0174poSYuLBfTFjzSZzNDcBFAgR7AydksUumb1cPTgTa7MXbxi4xCzYvykzXaTNEGPdubHNB934QVk5TGKDl6ANDHJCVMOs5hZ0ZAwJbL-Dtjak-I9MlvKOORz4Hcs7VXZfoHUytTa-99DP07MbVCYmo9MuVHAn4l-POiHCDwngsF3n3hiHzP5155vY4Dao0X0YcHiFeFwNT6xgCZz1_3TcihuPDqSITVzsyIx-mR_jHaf7V7O_U3AAD___AOg7M). Bomb squads [defused the devices in just over an hour](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ_G7oj4t1NQ3CZdbruldYCDc1YYIkxi5e1X3lfYcvRJo5nv677cgTKV9T9s6HqqS8Fjz9g7tqUB5d7qy2ekEiBTqq0QvPwiuTSMW8bNEoHyZ9FjdAlRohrRiUlfhVSzVePDcYxJaRFjimj07LWdpFdghbd8DjKM5M42brkRQmspLoCIKhgh0Kg0RT9ojpF6bZfvSqU_MOVPfWO7hLqN2T16f-6D-jfI2yBv8DwPnOgMrVPIOMjbim2D8mGh5roWZMeJNmS-bn5n-Ibwgk61sOMgYiEa64UEzWE28mqj8ZMPajIzN3ZCPzYXnwflTLudBs3XDSj_zul_cvh28icAAP__8auGWA), though the operation was briefly delayed by a resident who refused to leave. Authorities warned holdouts of fines and forced removal, while weddings, commuters, and cultural events were all disrupted.

clean_body: The Trump administration is moving to long-delayed high-speed rail, citing cost overruns and delays uncovered in a 315-page federal review. | | | | | | Thursday, June 5, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1956, Elvis Presley made his second appearance on T he Milton Berle Show , performing Hound Dog with tremendous energy. His provocative hip-swinging moves during the performance sparked controversy and ignited a debate about the impact of rock 'n' roll on American society. . Speaking of music that sticks, have you ever wondered why certain songs get lodged in your brain for days? Turns out, your with the music, as we report in Science. Do you have a favorite song that never gets old? Just hit reply and tell us your all-time favorite track--we'd love to hear it. 🎧 New today: We're debuting Podcast Extra , a new section featuring stories you'll only hear on The Flyover Podcast. These are important headlines we're covering exclusively in today's episode--don't miss them. Join The Flyover as we donate to help feed hungry children this summer with our sponsor, . | Feds Threaten to Pull $4B from California Rail The Trump administration is moving to long-delayed high-speed rail, citing cost overruns and delays uncovered in a 315-page federal review. Originally pitched as an 800-mile line from San Francisco to Los Angeles, the project has shrunk to a 119-mile stretch in the Central Valley--already $35 billion over budget with billions more needed. Transportation Secretary Sean and gave the state 37 days to prove it's still viable. California leaders pushed back, saying the review misrepresents progress and ignores state funding commitments. Social Security Sending $14.8B in Back Pay The Social Security Administration has of nearly 3 million Americans impacted by the Social Security Fairness Act, distributing $14.8 billion in retroactive payments just five months after the law was signed in January 2025. The changes primarily with pensions from jobs that didn’t pay into Social Security. The law repeals two long-criticized provisions—the Government Pension Offset and the Windfall Elimination Provision—that had slashed benefits for many. Monthly payments are rising by an average of $700 for affected spouses and over $1,100 for surviving spouses. Germany Defuses WWII Bombs in Mass Evacuation Cologne, Germany, carried out its on Wednesday, clearing over 20,000 residents to safely defuse three massive U.S. bombs uncovered during roadwork. The 0.6-mile evacuation zone covered homes, 58 hotels, nine schools, a hospital, and key transit routes, with Rhine River shipping also halted. . Bomb squads , though the operation was briefly delayed by a resident who refused to leave. Authorities warned holdouts of fines and forced removal, while weddings, commuters, and cultural events were all disrupted. () ➤ A federal judge halted the deportation of Colorado terror suspect Mohamed Soliman’s family, ordering they remain in the U.S. unless a higher court overturns the ruling. () ➤ The Trump administration paused a tariff hike on U.K. steel and aluminum but warned the 50% rate, up from 25%, will take effect if the May U.S.-U.K. trade deal isn’t implemented by July 9. () ➤ Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei slammed U.S. nuclear demands Wednesday, calling them "rude" and warning Washington “cannot do a damn thing” to stop Tehran’s enrichment program. () ➤ Former White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre announced Wednesday she’s no longer a Democrat and will release a memoir this fall detailing a “broken” Biden administration. () ➤ President Trump has called on Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell to cut interest rates after a weak May jobs report showed the slowest private payroll growth in over two years. () | Throwback Thursday is brought to you by: ➤Between 1976 and 2003, roughly 2.5 million passengers flew aboard Concorde, enjoying meals as legendary as its Mach 2 speed—think caviar, vintage Champagne, and fine dining at 60,000 feet. () ➤ A bride surprised guests by transforming her mother-in-law’s 1992 floral wedding gown into a mini dress for her welcome party, keeping the original neckline and embroidery for a nostalgic touch. () ➤ A photo roundup revisits 1963, a pivotal year in American history, through 30 striking images that capture the everyday charm, shifting style, and historic moments that defined the era. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ There is an urgent new warning about vitamin C. Millions of Americans currently use these popular vitamin C products to stay healthy, so we must get the word out quickly. | ➤National Donut Day rolls in this Friday, with chains like Dunkin’ and Krispy Kreme marking the occasion with free donut giveaways. () ➤ A burst of mud and hot water erupted from the Black Diamond Pool in Yellowstone National Park, captured by a new webcam installed at the site. () ➤ Hazel, a shorthair tabby from the Longmont Humane Society, has been elected pet mayor of Louisville, Colorado, beating out nine other animal candidates. () ➤ A rare 9-foot-long oarfish, often called a "doomsday fish," washed up on Ocean Beach in Tasmania this week—an event steeped in superstition due to past sightings ahead of natural disasters like Japan’s 2011 tsunami. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤ Rediscover how walking should feel with These ultra-comfortable, barefoot-style shoes promote better posture, natural movement, and all-day comfort. Lightweight, flexible, and stylish—perfect for everyday wear. Experience the freedom your feet deserve. | When do you respond to text messages? 1. 2. 3. 4. Yesterday's Results: Hearing a dog could cost $60K made me feel... 1. ❤️ Worth it: 36% 2. 🤷 Don't care: 29% 3. 😱 That’s a luxury SUV: 20% 4. 😬 I need a hamster: 6% 5. 😎 Cheaper than a kid: 9% | | Daily Quote | " Our country deserves high-speed rail that makes us proud, not boondoggle trains to nowhere." -- , on California's high-speed rail project following a critical federal report | Today's Trivia Which U.S. location is the most filmed location in the world? | (Step One) The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: FBI Finally Reopens Biden Cover-Up Cases
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
For years, we watched in frustration as serious crimes were swept under the rug by the Biden administration.

| | |
---
|
---
For years, we watched in frustration as serious crimes were swept under the rug by the Biden administration. Cocaine found steps away from the Situation Room in the White House. A pipe bomb planted outside the DNC. The unprecedented leak of a Supreme Court draft decision — all of these shocking incidents were met with bureaucratic shrugs and convenient "investigations" that led nowhere.
_**But that ends now.**_
The new FBI leadership under Director Cash Patel and Deputy Director Dan Bongino has announced they are reopening investigations into all three cases — finally bringing real accountability to crimes that the previous administration refused to properly investigate.
**The Cover-Up is Over**
For the first time in nearly 250 years of our nation's history, a Supreme Court draft opinion was leaked — an act that damaged the very foundation of our judicial system. A terrorist planted a pipe bomb that could have killed multiple people, yet we've had four years with no answers. And cocaine was discovered in one of the most secure buildings in America, with the investigation quietly closed without consequences.
These weren't just crimes — they were attacks on our institutions, our security, and our rule of law.
The Biden DOJ treated little old ladies waving flags on January 6th like terrorists while ignoring the actual terrorist who planted explosives. They weaponized federal law enforcement against conservatives while protecting their political allies from accountability.
_**That double standard ends now.**_
**We Need Constitutional Conservatives in the Fight**
The senators leading this charge for accountability didn't happen by accident. Conservative champions who have spent years demanding answers, fighting the Deep State, and defending our Constitution are finally seeing results.
**[But this is just the beginning.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8vac69fh5g243uu524nd771dmjivgkj39mjqf98_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shj69oj1cph2bs)**
The same corrupt bureaucrats who covered up these crimes are still embedded throughout the federal government. The same partisan prosecutors who went after President Trump while protecting Hunter Biden are looking for their next opportunity to strike.
We need principled conservatives in the Senate who will:

▶︎ Continue demanding transparency and accountability ▶︎ Expose Deep State corruption wherever it hides

▶︎ Defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic ▶︎ Fight the weaponization of federal agencies
▶︎ Ensure equal justice under law for ALL Americans

**Your Support Makes the Difference**
The establishment wants us to forget. The media wants us to move on. The Deep State wants us to stay quiet.
**We won't.**
**[Every contribution — whether $25, $50, $100, or more — directly supports the conservative senators who are fighting to:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfr1etklva96bgqmvjsnfeb4te0p11vi3m0m55f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shj69oj1cph2bs)**
▶︎ Expose corruption in federal agencies

▶︎ Demand accountability from unelected bureaucrats

▶︎ Defend constitutional principles against partisan attacks

▶︎ Protect the rule of law for future generations

▶︎ Save America's future from radical leftist destruction **The Time is NOW**
We finally have a Justice Department willing to investigate real crimes instead of manufacturing them against conservatives. **But this window won't last forever, and the forces of corruption are already mobilizing to fight back.**
---
[**DONATE $25 NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8abi6lqifkjhu8vjvb76ko6hmk1fga8qr534c88_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shj69oj1cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50 NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj9ndqcpe9r1g93pg1c5sgv7v7mi09l06a4ejneo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shj69oj1cph2bs)
---
[**DONATE $100 NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za23uk606i7fl6ht4j7h5cvgoptdqg91c8dicijg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shj69oj1cph2bs)
---
The Biden era of selective justice and partisan cover-ups is over, but the fight to restore equal justice under law is just beginning.
With your support, we can ensure that constitutional conservatives have the resources they need to continue this critical work — not just for the next two years, but for the next generation.
America's future depends on it.
---

---

Consider the facts. ## Trump Drops a New Travel Ban on 12 Countries, and the Democrat Meltdown Has Already Begun – RedState
President Donald Trump announced a new travel ban on Wednesday, barring entry from 12 different countries and limiting entry from seven others. The move came just days after an Islamic terrorist seeking to "free Palestine" set several elderly Jewish women on fire in Colorado with Molotov cocktails. Mohamad Soliman had overstayed a tourist visa [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2APayl29Drz8M_2654sN4HwqigCgs92cyUKdJIC-TCL_DmUimYT5iW6W4VrWaJqIxf4angaLFi3IPXmwraMKenrxIQdYALqZTTr7QcxXi3sRCD_7MP3IRMwxJjsuc3zq4FWqhxNuZAjwkF_pbM_R7CB3o_mFbPUgZzP5UzSxiA_lerJADevRN5wCkhJ-tcjDJti45huVWqtzV-14OlZJSJftGi9TrWiT9-356O1FW5bPB-rNbGOFM_P7t1PktgK8OWeR7eSo9DiszUJBgaBlAgp64278_g48u8G94H_62rFzdAm6jFSHthR7hXQIpDExFy4IaPXV-V6YJ8gx3rw2E5YpZkZZOww26WNfNxeSCp9ZWCJi6E-9C_qoK4qgoOlSa48v6YLyK1uOxw/6s_ElD5qBCcP7pntj9Q9qMxFUhLYD5be/9)

The House is looking into the Biden cognitive decline scandal and has called for multiple Biden aides, in addition to Joe Biden's physician, to come in for transcribed testimony. On Wednesday, Comer also said that he will be issuing a subpoena for Dr. Kevin O'Connor. Hopefully, they can get [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/DsiUewByQC9EF78Mx-roUBdtYcYXg-lKdbODrIhrTYngNxmxUvGzRkcDUGvZjA_4beSTPXFQ_l1fVZdzpDXYLF-mIlP6YBEMPdjqqo5bLRSLlat6L1ulst9G1onvsYyKWL2uE4OQsa0WRYJ9O1Xf5iNTxZ4JilO9sxHrxK8CWe25QYP9FeeQCoKaHVSO8RZVvkVaPMFyxQ-g3sbae4V9cBCipEvBBQzzGBzmYWYx-Kjff97VvvFIKGws8vOqPZZIngjXflc-kE7O06f8Qv6HICTrsJ2-tUaJuAhi8KKk8StB_VwjyyD2xtrIVgNU0Sj4i8HSkiIzVXOFNsZCnCPy12-L_mJYjW0iQMOj-FfWtgkpl-W0PoQDRzZg4YOLe1C7VLn9yfX3xix3Ak8bQfIZaX8/e0KBXH-twF0T4roxoAUDltyNhuwfZbZr/9)

## Has the American Empire Fallen?
President Donald Trump returned to Washington in January with a mandate from the American people to end mass migration. That same month, however, the foreign-born population living within America’s borders hit a record high, in an echo of the Roman Empire. Is it too late to save America from mass migration? name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: Where is your early voting location?
body:
Peter, I’m not going to take much of your time today because I don’t want you sitting here reading emails. I want you out VOTING! Early voting is open today until 8 PM.
| | [ ]()
---
Peter, I’m not going to take much of your time today because I don’t want you sitting here reading emails. I want you out VOTING! Early voting is open today until 8 PM. You can go any day from now through this Sunday. Locations are open from 10AM-8PM (til 6 PM on Sunday). **< < Find the early voting locations in YOUR county [here](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/1dc24f46e20a8363c50348b42c22e8bf/eJyNkMGKAjEMht8l59FidVedm4jIMK4HWc9SnKDVmpY2DjvKvPvGXfGk4C0kX77w5wqMZIiLCnL44YvWfcgg4tYGi8RTT2y2f1P9Mej1exk4S8d59OcA-fXp8gO4tYd6PMqAm4CCfK8m07JYzjeLYlkKGUyUG295PvVQPzyzr0mxgLZ9KcaT5Vkt7gQ5xzPeElVWUvE6OuH3zCHlStGhu_O1SmwYFTqZW09J1Z6xgya6piOlpV037fnkRGxCQKruXymx-de3v9vsbAw=) >>**
---
[ **Show Me My Early Voting Locations** ](https://xtz223.keap-link017.com/v2/click/514fe12e67eae6005e73ba1d6459c5ce/eJyNkMGKAjEMht8l59FqZ1dhbiIiw6gHcc9LcYLWrWlp4-CszLsbd8WTgreQfPnCnwswkiEuayjgzL9a55BBxK0NFomnnths_6b682OYDzNwln7m0Z8CFJenyw_g1h7ng0EG3AYUZLOeTKtyNf9elKtKyGCi3HjLM9Jj_fDMlpNyAV33UoxHy7NG3AkKjie8JaqtpOKv6ITfM4dUKEWH_s43KrFhVOhkbj0l1XjGHpro2p6Ulnb9tOejE7EJAam-f6XC9l_fXQHNtWv8)
---
It’s up to us, friends. Forward this email to 5 friends, grab your phone, ID, and keys, and go kick out some lemons! Let’s go! 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸 For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---

Hello, and thank you for taking the time to read this email. This message is part of an ongoing conversation between us, and I want to take a moment to ensure you have full transparency about why you received this message, how your information is handled, and what to expect from future emails. Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsenseclub.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsenseclub.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.
---
[Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/27909642/956a6fe6f6cfbe32) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

* ❌ Lower confidence in America's financial system

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Local governments are saying NO to Trump’s extreme agenda!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPh_q8JzIZ7IUA0eeAuXNpp77Rpd1Hkmg57-oqj6ngjSVdyd5D5LSXMh3Ct1z7VCgUh6JJ5ZSd8pSnsQ_HWqzfQDcVCZQZIoNAs5xrUenqIFUkqkUUEFsZvPOg-hzca6ySXFvKJKNMc_wW_JuXAtKgrhjS3kbC8Iu_FthCxVeHtzj81gyP9ut6L0wcgTUddj9h2A7qIU1ZZx3bu06gq-7J0PmcZmdVq-W1mFhMB5l84tuwE1k8gt4HHS2Xu4bKsMZYVKZge8rKU_VrMwJnE-y5Is/4h3/DZOTf82YRty8VaYYyW3LSA/h0/h001._ezV5RKqOFwQcBdNSs7eNtCa34rLxNWkQApaPuFTjhY)
In the face of Trump's radical agenda, local governments across the nation are emerging as steadfast defenders of democracy and catalysts for change. Fifteen state attorneys general have formed a coalition to defend gender-affirming medical care for trans youth. Eleven have released a statement that they will not violate their state laws to help Trump carry out lawless mass deportations. Blue state governors are making plans to protect abortion with legislation that gives additional privacy protections to providers when prescribing medications used for abortions. **The Local Democracy Project is committed to harnessing this momentum and rebuilding our democracy from the ground up. We believe in the transformative power of local governance to enact meaningful change and empower citizens to shape their communities.**
[**Your donation can help us continue this vital work. By contributing to the Local Democracy Project, you're investing in a movement that values participatory democracy and fights for the rights of all citizens.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnN3OEGsTH4qpa5WG2Q5KUZqEBbgWGSSjpTSpKFLiQ4A9W-GBbbjeY4LJZX-rmUv3XHlNvTccz0VE3tMOlxbZDjuE5r2tyXqdsmoRO_-PvcNvL4tQi8zm7WDqf8LtG8ahXr1lK7vztG5X76nomfkSzgXvercIzRViXXPSbp25vX4GSQg3YSxFeiWcJ-QaYdNJEW3D7O8qb66TcVBa_RBNJwXD2i46nzxhcU7Gqpcfrs0UYUNbSJbnU48ht-QcpJNAbmFbcrdPKNsYJN1z5jM-Q3ku5RuLFZXT7YppJfU_QvFXwXQT1as9nvZGh-LsBrL6vME1-_Scx9zUeOaI9kB-9HXM/4h3/DZOTf82YRty8VaYYyW3LSA/h1/h001.NawyN2jm_Sq0HVpTssMugIYa7Kauj2dkeDSf1XZPjKE) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | In the face of Trump's radical agenda, local governments across the nation are emerging as steadfast defenders of democracy and catalysts for change. Fifteen state attorneys general have formed a coalition to defend gender-affirming medical care for trans youth. Eleven have released a statement that they will not violate their state laws to help Trump carry out lawless mass deportations. Blue state governors are making plans to protect abortion with legislation that gives additional privacy protections to providers when prescribing medications used for abortions. The Local Democracy Project is committed to harnessing this momentum and rebuilding our democracy from the ground up. We believe in the transformative power of local governance to enact meaningful change and empower citizens to shape their communities. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Communities are taking bold stands to uphold civil liberties, protect vulnerable populations, and champion progressive policies that reflect the true spirit of our nation. From sanctuary cities resisting harsh immigration enforcement to municipalities implementing inclusive policies for all residents, local governments are proving to be powerful bulwarks against harmful federal overreach. The fight against federal threats to our freedoms will happen locally.** Join us in this Let's work together to ensure that every community has the power to thrive. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. name: Kevin Ford Jr for State Senate
subject: It’s official!
body:
I’m proud to announce that I’ve officially filed to run for State Senate in Maryland’s 24th Legislative District. | | |
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fannouncement&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=UOtYRhsFlErhiK9APTYXALarnRI%3D)
---
_**Dear Neighbors,**_ After deep reflection with my family, advisement from my mentors, and feedback from community members, [I’m proud to announce that I’ve officially filed to run for State Senate in Maryland’s 24th Legislative District.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fannouncement&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=UOtYRhsFlErhiK9APTYXALarnRI%3D)This decision is rooted in vision — a vision for how we move forward together. I see a district where families don’t just survive, but thrive; where opportunity is within reach for residents in every municipality and beyond; and where our leaders are present, engaged, and focused on solutions that truly make a difference. I believe the future of our community depends on bold ideas, consistent effort, and a commitment to progress that brings everyone to the table.As a husband, father, small business owner, and someone who has spent his life right here in Prince George’s County, I’ve seen both the challenges we face and the resilience we carry. I’m stepping into this race to ensure that families in every zip code have access to healthy food options, quality education, economic opportunity, safe neighborhoods, and a government that doesn’t just make decisions _for_ them, but _with_ them.Now, I’m asking for your support as we build this people-powered movement together:
1. **Share and Follow** – Help us grow the movement by sharing the campaign with your network and following @kfordjr on all platforms. Word of mouth and social engagement are powerful tools.
👉 [kfordjr.com/links](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Flinks&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=TOM8QByxCBRk7HofXCkzfvBEQRw%3D)
2. **Donate** – No amount is too small to make an impact. Every dollar helps us connect with more voters and bring our message directly to the community.
👉 [kfordjr.com/donate](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fdonate&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=ned8lJyNP6D8erbpgPv2DBuFyXA%3D)
3. **Volunteer** – Whether you’ve got five hours a week or five minutes a day, we need your help to knock doors, make calls, and show up strong.
👉 [kfordjr.com/volunteer](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kfordjr.com%2Fvolunteer&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=9_Zr9Vi-QizXjKG9B-0eMZdDvCc%3D)
4. **Vote** – Together, we can make history — but it starts at the ballot box. Spread the word, make a plan to vote, and let’s get it done in the 2026 primary.
👉 [kfordjr.com/vote](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fvote&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=pfL7HhHugEBqJAD7MsGDooNGm_E%3D)

This campaign is about all of us — our stories, our struggles, and our shared belief in what’s possible when we come together with purpose and move forward with future generations in mind. I’m honored to be in this with you.Let’s move District 24, Prince George’s County and Maryland forward — together._**With gratitude,**_[**Kevin Ford Jr.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=68419c3717c4c76eb9446da3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fkfordjr.com%2Fmeetkford&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_6783f41a4c48d23be4f1c53e&l=en-US&s=0rI5Sr_p2U3pXHxh3IIWrXxEs9E%3D)**
**Democratic Candidate
Maryland State Senate – District 24

clean_body: I’m proud to announce that I’ve officially filed to run for State Senate in Maryland’s 24th Legislative District. | | | | | Dear Neighbors, After deep reflection with my family, advisement from my mentors, and feedback from community members, decision is rooted in vision — a vision for how we move forward together. I see a district where families don’t just survive, but thrive; where opportunity is within reach for residents in every municipality and beyond; and where our leaders are present, engaged, and focused on solutions that truly make a difference. I believe the future of our community depends on bold ideas, consistent effort, and a commitment to progress that brings everyone to the table.As a husband, father, small business owner, and someone who has spent his life right here in Prince George’s County, I’ve seen both the challenges we face and the resilience we carry. I’m stepping into this race to ensure that families in every zip code have access to healthy food options, quality education, economic opportunity, safe neighborhoods, and a government that doesn’t just make decisions for them, but with them.Now, I’m asking for your support as we build this people-powered movement together: 1. Share and Follow – Help us grow the movement by sharing the campaign with your network and following @kfordjr on all platforms. Word of mouth and social engagement are powerful tools. 👉 2. Donate – No amount is too small to make an impact. Every dollar helps us connect with more voters and bring our message directly to the community. 👉 3. Volunteer – Whether you’ve got five hours a week or five minutes a day, we need your help to knock doors, make calls, and show up strong. 👉 4. Vote – Together, we can make history — but it starts at the ballot box. Spread the word, make a plan to vote, and let’s get it done in the 2026 primary. 👉 This campaign is about all of us — our stories, our struggles, and our shared belief in what’s possible when we come together with purpose and move forward with future generations in mind. I’m honored to be in this with you.Let’s move District 24, Prince George’s County and Maryland forward — together.With gratitude, Democratic Candidate Maryland State Senate – District 24 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- By Authority: Friends of Kevin Ford, Jr., Anton Shoetan, Treasurer 7003 Glenn Dale Road #84, Glenn Dale, MD 20769, United States

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d9bf977-c975-426c-8dd3-711c62145cc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Oftentimes when conservatives talk about bias within the mainstream media, CNN or MSNBC are the first ones listed as examples of how horrible that bias can be. Every once in a while, however, a local station or media market gets national attention for putting the aforementioned two channels to shame.
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/933dceb5-0e62-48a6-be73-0fec285a8997?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It should not be a surprise the latest example comes from the Pacific Northwest, specifically Seattle. It starts with Christians gathering at a park on a Saturday as part of the MayDay USA tour, which advocates for traditional families consisting of one man and one woman, protecting the unborn, and preventing children from being groomed to become transgender.
One issue is the park they were permitted to gather at was Cal Anderson Park in Seattle's Capitol Hill neighborhood. For those who are not familiar with the city, you probably have heard of that location, but not by its official designation. You know it by its temporary names: CHAZ and CHOP. That's right, Christians gathered to declare their love for Jesus Christ in the former "autonomous" zone that was created by radical leftists during the "summer of love" in 2020. More than that, Capitol Hill is Seattle's LGBTQ+ neighborhood.
As you can imagine, the Antifa radicals and activists were not happy to see Christians exercising their First Amendment right to speech, religion, and assembly, **[so they attacked the gathering](https://substack.com/redirect/dfabf3b8-50e2-4acb-8ca3-1beaa220d536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Seattle police worked hard to prevent the mob from going after the peaceful gathering, arresting nearly 30 people.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2fbab0-9c59-4134-ab95-e166bb1d9d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Sharing Homes Made Investors Rich. Sharing Data Could Be Bigger](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2fbab0-9c59-4134-ab95-e166bb1d9d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2fbab0-9c59-4134-ab95-e166bb1d9d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Remember when people said "nobody will rent their homes to strangers"? Early Airbnb investors who ignored the skeptics saw $1k grow to $5M at the company's IPO.
Airbnb grew to $100 billion by unlocking value in homes, and now Mode Mobile is doing the same with an asset owned by 7 billion people - smartphones.
Instead of renting spare rooms, Mode users monetize their screen time:
* 45M+ users earning from everyday activities (games, music, charging)
* Helped users save and earn over $325M+

And with their Nasdaq ticker ($MODE) secured, you now have a limited time to invest at just $0.30/share
**[Here's how to invest and even earn up to 100% bonus shares.](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2fbab0-9c59-4134-ab95-e166bb1d9d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/3f2fbab0-9c59-4134-ab95-e166bb1d9d6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
The story is pretty straightforward, one religious group was attacked by the city's radical faction. But not according to Seattle's other radical faction: the local press.
**["23 arrests at heated 'Fascist Family Values' protest in Seattle"](https://substack.com/redirect/3affc0d3-cfb5-4fb3-bc37-eb3427036ae7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** was the Seattle Times original headline after the chaos, framing the Christian gathering by its deteractors. The quotes even make it sound like that was the official name of the event, when that was not clearly the case.
A KCPQ social media post about the event simply said, "In about five days, more than 30 people have been arrested at conservative Christian rallies in Seattle."
Again, the first impression people can walk away from can be heavily skewed thinking it was the Christians who were arrested for their inferred actions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/50ec3d26-5f7a-444d-bdbc-40560cdc20dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The local media coverage of the incident gave cover to city officials who have blamed, not the violent Antifa radicals, but the Christians for violence.
The "far-right rally was held here ... to provoke a reaction by promoting beliefs that are inherently opposed to our city's values, in the heart of Seattle's most prominent LGBTQ+ neighborhood," said Mayor Bruce Harrell.
A KOMO reporter **[interviewed a city council member](https://substack.com/redirect/0ecc8bcf-8738-40e1-b7bd-a6eca70a944b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and did not bring up how the violence was started from the far-left.
It is because of Harrell's initial response that another protest was held outside city hall by the Christians, demanding that he resign for wrongly blaming them for the weekend violence.
What makes the city officials' response all the more scandalous is how it appears the city directed MayDay USA to host their event at Cal Anderson Park instead of the park the group first requested.
Pastor Russell Johnson posted the emails from the official who named Cal Anderson park as an alternative because the first location would not be able to safely host the expected attendees.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/533f3768-1972-4766-b78e-f26e37047b8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is some hope for accountability as both the Department of Justice and the FBI, now under the Trump administration, is looking into whether the Seattle officials are discriminating against the Christian population.
As for Cal Anderson Park, the story is far from over. Evangelist Sean Feucht revealed he has **[a permit to host a worship service at the same park in late August](https://substack.com/redirect/a4cc6ffd-ca24-4f58-b181-4c975a41b582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. It remains to be seen if the permit will be revoked, but if it does get canceled, that could run afoul with the federal government's investigation.
All of that to say is Seattle is still firmly in the hands of far-left progressives who will do their part to paint conservatives and Christians in a bad light, from their street soldiers to their government offices.

For those who are not familiar with the city, you probably have heard of that location, but not by its official designation. You know it by its temporary names: CHAZ and CHOP. The quotes even make it sound like that was the official name of the event, when that was not clearly the case. A KCPQ social media post about the event simply said, "In about five days, more than 30 people have been arrested at conservative Christian rallies in Seattle." Again, the first impression people can walk away from can be heavily skewed thinking it was the Christians who were arrested for their inferred actions. | | ---|---|--- The local media coverage of the incident gave cover to city officials who have blamed, not the violent Antifa radicals, but the Christians for violence. The "far-right rally was held here ... to provoke a reaction by promoting beliefs that are inherently opposed to our city's values, in the heart of Seattle's most prominent LGBTQ+ neighborhood," said Mayor Bruce Harrell. A KOMO reporter and did not bring up how the violence was started from the far-left. | **Dear Friend,** Our government was founded by the people, for the people. That’s why I’m fighting to make it work for YOU through the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

The House is soon going to be voting on the critical DOGE cuts to streamline bureaucracy and advance President Trump’s America First agenda. But special interests are pushing back, and I need grassroots patriots like you to stand with me.

**Your donation of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today will help me:**
* Spread the DOGE mission to rally Americans for change.
* Push budget reconciliation packages to slash wasteful spending, like the one I supported earlier this year.
* Stand up to bureaucrats and demand fiscal responsibility NOW.

**This is a defining moment for Republicans** **to demonstrate that fiscal responsibility and limited government are not just talking points.** They are the foundation of our conservative movement. That means passing this package isn’t just good policy—it’s our moral obligation. Your support will help me deliver a government that serves the people, not the elites. Every dollar fuels our fight for efficiency and accountability.

**Can I count on you? **

Friend, I just wanted to make sure you saw my message from last week and share a quick update. **We missed our goal by just 32 Founding Donors, so we’re extending the deadline –**[will you please be one of the supporters to close this gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109021192/549760163/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk30-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjdjODkwYy0xNjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUXDR_KfrFnfauuTe2Vp6lEA2pQ-n9ZJgri4skxF99o=)
Workers need and deserve a government that's on their side – and with your grassroots support, Dignity of Work PAC can invest in candidates across the country who will put working people first. Together, we can create an economy where hard work is rewarded and everyone can succeed.

[**Chip in $5 – or whatever you can spare today – to join our movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109021193/549760164/-38565542?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk30-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjdjODkwYy0xNjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUXDR_KfrFnfauuTe2Vp6lEA2pQ-n9ZJgri4skxF99o=)

name: Mass Mobilization Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Urgent: ICE is throwing smoke grenades into our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1063&refcode=email-20250605_v&akid=8656%2E5885482%2EHCGjc- ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Smoke grenades thrown into crowds of peaceful protesters. Congressional
staffers handcuffed inside their offices. This isn’t a dystopian novel –
it’s happening now in Trump's America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25105?source=email-20250605&t=1113&akid=8656%2E5885482%2EHCGjc- ]Headline: ICE agents with assault rifles toss flash-bangs in trendy San
Diego neighborhood. Community fights back

But something else is happening too. Across the country, as ICE agents in
armoured vehicles carrying assault rifles are deployed into our
communities, mass protests are erupting. From San Diego to Minneapolis to
Boston, people are coming together to stand up to ICE and fight back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25105?source=email-20250605&t=1114&akid=8656%2E5885482%2EHCGjc- ]Headline: ICE raids on restaurants, farmworkers, students spark
community resistance across country

In return, they’re facing smoke grenades, intimidation, and arrests – a
blatant attempt to silence dissent and terrorize our communities. But we
are NOT going to let it work – which is why Our Revolution is rapidly
scaling up our mass mobilization effort, organizing citizen-led actions to
push back against Trump and defend our democracy.

resources – and that’s why we need your help right now. Can we count on
your contribution today to fuel our fight and stop Trump’s authoritarian
attacks on our democracy?

Let’s be clear: Trump is deploying ICE in ways we've never seen before –
targeting protesters, public servants, and entire communities. His intent
is obvious: crush dissent by any means necessary.

In Manhattan, ICE entered U.S. Rep. Jerry Nadler's office, putting one of
his aides in handcuffs in a frightening attack meant to intimidate public
servants and activists alike. The Mayor of Newark was arrested. A sitting
member of Congress charged after protesting outside an ICE facility.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25105?source=email-20250605&t=1112&akid=8656%2E5885482%2EHCGjc- ]Headline: Rep. Nadler demands congressional investigation after federal
agents handcuff staffer in office

It’s terrifying – but the reality is that mass mobilization and relentless
organizing are how we push back, resist authoritarian escalation, and
ultimately win.

That’s why Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is mobilizing side-by-side
with frontline activists to fight back. And our movement is growing.
Record-breaking numbers are expected to come together to counter Trump’s
authoritarian military parade on June 14, with over 1,475 events planned
around the country. Our Revolution is leading efforts to organize dozens
of them and we’re not slowing down.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1106&amount=22&refcode=email-20250605nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8656%2E5885482%2EHCGjc- ]Standing up to Trump’s attacks requires us to rapidly scale up our
organizing capacity to rise to this critical moment, but to do it we need
your grassroots support today. Can you rush a donation now to power Our
Revolution’s rapid-response mass mobilization efforts?

History will judge us by how we respond in times of crisis. Through
solidarity, grassroots organizing, and fearless action, we can defeat
Trump's dangerous attempts at authoritarianism. Let's rise and confront
this moment together.

When we organize, we win.

Peter,
You know things are bad when even Elon Musk is trying to distance himself from Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.
After years spent cozying up to Trump and leading the charge to eliminate vital government services, **Musk is now calling Trump’s budget bill a “disgusting abomination.”**
Welcome to the fight, I guess?
But let’s be clear: Trump’s agenda isn’t just disgusting—it’s dangerous. His bill would gut Medicaid, slash food assistance, and roll back funding for clean energy—all to pay for massive tax breaks for billionaires like Musk.
**We successfully drove Elon out of the Trump administration. Now it’s time to turn up the pressure on Trump and every Republican in Congress enabling this chaos. **
And if we think for one second that playing nice will stop a bully like Trump, we’re kidding ourselves. Trump is a clear and present threat to our democracy and the wellbeing of millions of Americans, so let’s get a little meaner and a lot more fierce.

name: AMAC Action
subject: President Trump only has 18 months.
body:
My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zer6i5s3c9qok6qbjlnmevg0ujtrqtb1dv46umqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I’m writing to you today because I need your help to secure our elections once and for all and keep America on the path to greatness.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zslv5j4m3cb5ukcsboonoavd5vrvausn9rvnekg8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)** My friend, President Trump only has 18 months left until the midterm elections. **That’s 18 months to push through as much of his America First agenda as he can while we have a majority in the House and Senate.** I don’t mean to be pessimistic about our chances in the midterms. I’m just being a realist.Historically, the party not in the White House wins control of the House of Representatives in the midterms. That means, in just 18 months we could be right back where we started if young radicals like Hakeem Jeffries and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez regain power and start blocking every one of our efforts. **[That’s why our election integrity efforts must be a priority right now._election integrity efforts_ must be a priority right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z388vtn628vop7u2iho3dtuskro07ckebko0e5g0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)**_If we can’t get the SAVE Act through the Senate...__ _ _If we can’t cement President Trump’s “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections” executive order through legislation...__ __If we can’t stop non-citizens from being counted towards the apportionment of congressional seats and electoral vote counts..._ ...the Left will be free to use every dirty trick in the book for the midterms in 2026, the presidential election in 2028... and beyond.[**AMAC Action, will never give up. But my friend, as a strong conservative senior, we NEED you right there beside us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhfag56uv4a8apmm6s3a7tnl74kbsehaskguak3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs) My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action****is****the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.** **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.****Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** **And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the****is****sues.** Friend, with the support of patriotic seniors like you, in just the past few months AMAC Action has been able to:
---
** Hold 100 meetings with Congress -- this year alone! And send 40 Letters of Support on a variety of issues that are important to you including opposing benefits for non-citizens. ** Support President Trump’s executive order “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” This order requires that all mail-in and absentee ballots be received by Election Day, directs the DOJ to enforce laws prohibiting noncitizen voting, and instructs federal agencies to maintain accurate voter rolls. ** Answer the call from Speaker Johnson to mobilize our supporters and get 7,000 messages sent to Congress to help get the SAVE Act passed in the House of Representatives. The SAVE Act ensures only American citizens vote in American elections.** Launch calls-to-action in individual states to stop illegal immigrants from voting. ** And unite thousands of Americans around our “BAN NONCITIZEN VOTING” petition drive that calls for an amendment to the United States Constitution that expressly forbids illegal aliens from voting and from being counted in the census that determines congressional seats and electoral votes.
---
All our work is made possible by brave AMAC Action patriots. But with the stakes higher than ever, we need every conservative freedom fighter standing with us.That means YOU, friend.**[That’s why I hope you’ll click this link to support AMAC Action during this critical time for your sacred vote.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztro760ca1o2ate12tjm2fjn0d8vbdlitlh8512o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)** We’ve got our work cut out for us as we fight to stop the 11.5 million illegals Joe Biden and Kamala Harris let into our country from:
---
* voting in our elections
* taking benefits reserved for you
* being counted the same as citizens when it comes to apportioning seats in the House of Representatives
* and being counted as citizens when it comes to giving states electoral votes.

---
Letting illegals change the balance of power in Congress and the electoral college means your vote may be fully **canceled out in all future elections**.The Left thinks they can pull a fast one on the American people.You, me and AMAC Action... we can’t let up for one minute. **[And that’s why I hope you’ll pledge your support for AMAC Action with your very best gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj5mbqk0hq5g65ijhd7oil1d4cng9numkvtjmn30_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)** AMAC Action is taking every step possible to secure our elections because no matter what issue you care about the most – inflation, crime, the 2nd Amendment, Social Security and Medicare solvency, even the right to life......if you and I don’t have a vote... none of it matters. **[That’s what makes your best gift to AMAC Action so important today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4haeboqg93ocp1224ktfmd4101lhn4th8lq0ka0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)** So whatever critical amount you decide to return to help us secure our elections and your vote, please respond as soon as possible. We have an ambitious battle plan for the rest of the year—but first I must know that we have the resources to make it happen.I look forward to your response.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqd9bb5odebk9bmqmnssag4hkhd4liv84hv27bcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
---
| | P.S. [**To secure our elections and your vote once and for all please click this link or the button below to make your critical gift today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6mtoosuh2a2qgmpvdqnu2ln1kp4qd80vq5tmvv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs) My friend, YOU are the difference between success and failure.
---
[ **SUPPORT AMAC ACTION** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcqavp7n5cmah5mr5ognbio7s1vhooqv4ietkp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrkkm8vcu5t3vacgrvf54geqed9pl4pn1mldgjc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqm1rr3ml5649q33h6dqb1qddgujbhm1fmlhsftg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcd57tkhrqntd3cicrh67053gd2hsm8s2uet4i7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
