name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrsf7387gpfh39egqn4mgvdigui4lm0l5rc1sifg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgbdk71ejke761m6vj4r7k3mts68it0ujvuc4a9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8jijbvjfm76987k73keusbd778eru23uv4n6hsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm1oj2c9h2bs)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23114%2E4449941%2EgGS7di) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23114%2E4449941%2EgGS7di) | | It is with a heavy heart that we email you today.

It has been 15 years since _Citizens United_ began its reign of terror on our democracy.

**[So, we’re RUSHING to raise $25,000 before 11:59 PM to see this Amendment through.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61861?t=3&akid=23114%2E4449941%2EgGS7di)**

| [2OO%-MATCH: RUSH $10 NOW TO END CITIZENS UNITED >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61861?t=4&akid=23114%2E4449941%2EgGS7di)
---
Friend, we’ve begged you to help us overturn _Citizens United_. We pleaded with you. And still...nothing.

In the past 36 hours, our donations for a campaign to pass Amy Klobuchar and Adam Schiff’s Constitutional Amendment to ban Dark Money have reached an abrupt halt.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Breaking News…We Are Going to the Supreme Court!
body:
This week the U.S. Supreme Court announced that it has agreed to hear Judicial Watch’s appeal of a Court of Appeals decision in our lawsuit challenging Illinois’ reckless law “extending” Election Day beyond the date established by federal law.

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This week the **U.S. Supreme Court** announced that it has agreed to hear Judicial Watch's appeal of a Court of Appeals decision in our lawsuit challenging **Illinois** ' reckless law "extending" Election Day beyond the date established by federal law.
**This is a very big deal** ...and it is a _tribute_ to you and your past support of Judicial Watch!
**[And at this critical moment, I ask you to help us today, as we prepare for the biggest court battle in our 31-year history!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Our lawsuit against **Illinois** (and our similar lawsuits against **California** and **Mississippi**) argues that the federal law setting an Election _Day_ is clear and that states cannot "extend" the time for accepting ballots.

And don't forget...these state laws not only violate federal law and the civil rights of voters...**they are open invitations for massive voter fraud**!

Now, our election legal team is preparing for arguments before the highest court in the land during its next term.

**[The stakes could not be higher...and we need you to help us make more history in our persistent battle to protect honest elections from attacks by the Left](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We scored a huge win in March, when the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear its previous ruling in which it _agreed with Judicial Watch that it_ _was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots received after Election Day_.

No one can predict what the Supreme Court will decide but I believe the ruling in our Mississippi lawsuit will carry a lot of weight with the Supreme Court, and also on the outcome of our ongoing lawsuit against California's "extending" Election Day law.

And a Judicial Watch victory at the Supreme Court will be a massive setback to the Left's constant efforts on so many fronts to corrupt and steal our elections!

Judicial Watch has done more to successfully defend traditional election safeguards than any group in America...and now we are facing our biggest and most important test ever.

Your support now will help us continue to be the nation’s leader in the fight for honest elections. I deeply hope [I can count on you to help us today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5), as we carry forward all our legal research, investigations and lawsuits to protect the rule of law.

I look forward to welcoming you as a supporter of Judicial Watch!
Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74443&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

| |

subject: Korean Breakthrough Reduced Wrinkles By 48%
body:
That’s right - by almost HALF!

| Hey Friend, A new breakthrough from Korea can reduce crow’s feet, sagging, and crepey skin by 48%. That’s right - by almost HALF! In a groundbreaking study using high-definition 3D skin scans... Women saw their wrinkles literally disappear before their eyes. No expensive creams or painful injections. The reason it works so well is because it activates the key cells in your skin that produce ALL your collagen, elastin and hyaluronic acid. It turns out, while creams can give short-term, surface level results... They never truly fix the root cause of wrinkles, sagging, or crepey skin. No wonder 8 out of 10 women say they are left wanting more from their creams. Ivy League dermatologist, Dr. Mara Weinstein explains how this new Korean breakthrough works: **[Try this Korean “younger skin” method at home in just 30 seconds](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zthpv50us1um3783vg81cjeubv7d5p4ghg6u932g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shgm9p32cph2bs)** If you want skin that looks 10 to 15 years younger, try this today. Tracey Colone from Rainbow City, Alabama said: “Wow, I cannot believe what a difference this has made in reducing the visibility of my wrinkles and firming up the skin on my neck, too... the woman at the grocery store told me I look amazing. That really made my day!”

subject: This is not an arbitrary goal
body:

name: Anika Page
subject: Let’s Raise a Generation That Loves America
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bundleoffer?e=5703353baa)

| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
We believe that the values that built America are worth passing down — and it starts at home. That’s why we created _What Makes America Special_ , a children’s book designed to help families instill a love for our country in the next generation. With every copy, you’ll also receive a patriotic bundle to bring these lessons to life:
* **A****FREE American flag**
* **A****PDF activity book****full of meaningful, fun learning**
* **A****bonus guide on the history and meaning of the American flag**

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9d9d16d244&e=5703353baa)
---
| These resources are a simple but powerful way to spark important conversations and plant seeds of gratitude and pride in young hearts.
---

| Together, we can raise children who know just how special America truly is.

Warmest wishes,

Anika Page

It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.______________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | |

clean_body: | | | ** Friend, everyone’s watching Virginia’s elections this November to see if Donald Trump and MAGA extremists are losing support. I’m Elizabeth Guzman - a mom, social worker, union leader, and proud Latina immigrant running to EXPAND a 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates in a red-to-blue district that Donald Trump lost. My MAGA Republican opponent stands with Trump and Musk as they sow chaos, undermine our rights, and attack working families. We can beat him. Online donors like you have pitched in over 3,000 times to launch our campaign strong. We’re knocking thousands of doors, and winning big endorsements from labor unions, grassroots groups and elected officials from Congress to school board. Virginia law requires us to publicly report everything we’ve raised through midnight tonight - the June 5 fundraising deadline - and we want to hit** 4,000 online donations. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. | | Team: **Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer.** **What happens?** Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. **T****hese purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status**. Multiple stories written by the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after _groups based outside of Georgia_ brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "_voter fraud hunters_ " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. [**Voter suppression is real, Team, both in Georgia and across the country. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Fox5 Atlanta: Georgia set to purge nearly half-million inactive voters this summer| | | | | | | Team: Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer. What happens? Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. These purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status. Multiple stories written by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after groups based outside of Georgia brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "voter fraud hunters " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Daniel Cameron
subject: How many more Americans must suffer?
body:
How many more Americans must be injured or killed by illegal aliens before we say enough is enough?

| | | | |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z616t5iklof4e0j40tsnj6vcupm6sk5a3gt31so8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim0o36clh2bs)
|
---
Friend, **_How many more Americans must be injured or killed by illegal aliens before we say enough is enough?_****_ _****_How long must we all live in fear of deranged extremists screaming “Free Palestine” before we acknowledge the war being waged on our Judeo-Christian values and our American way of life?_****_ _****_How many more innocent people must be gunned down before we address the foreign terror threat already in our homeland?_****_ _****_How many more “campus takeovers” must we witness before we talk about the rot in our universities that is fueling all of this?_** [_**I’ve got a few common-sense ideas that we SHOULD be talking more about that I’d like to share with you.
**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ka8obdjkjtq64ghkd9r1p0ss4tpj4obl9fb23o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim0o36clh2bs)

Most of the career politicians in Washington don’t have the guts to say this, but I will. Thanks for your time on this important issue. Sincerely,
Daniel Cameron

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: SURVEY: Which issues are most important to you right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Share your top priorities with me now that the Senate is back in session
| | |
---
Friend,
The Senate is back in session. That means Donald Trump and the GOP are back to pushing their disastrous Project 2025 agenda. Here’s what they’re working on right now:
1. **Cuts to**** __ Medicaid.** The GOP passed a budget bill in the House that includes around $700 BILLION in reduced Medicaid spending. Now, Senate Republicans are fighting for even deeper cuts.
2. **Cuts****to****food assistance.** Children around the world are dying after the Trump administration slashed USAID funding that included food aid. Now, Republicans are trying to cut $267 billion from the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program that feeds children in the United States.
3. **Tax breaks****for****billionaires.** Despite cutting programs for American families, Trump’s budget bill will dramatically increase our national deficit because it also includes _massive_ tax cuts for billionaires.
Right now, I need to know which issues are most important to you as I work to stop Trump and the GOP from taking even more from American families to give to the ultra-wealthy.

**That’s why I’m looking for 100 supporters from 37087 – like you – to respond to my new strategy survey before midnight.****[Will you please take just two minutes to complete my new priorities survey now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109029153/549777966/1048718797?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5539-su-nd&refcode=jtk5539-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjhhMWMyMy0xZjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ouGoM5e0v4efK0QjlXF5NmF9yXUJOezLDjFwTVL6R0Y=&emci=f23a2080-9940-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=328a1c23-1f42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=3800590)**

Jacky

Jacky Rosen:**

Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most.

Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP.

**[Will you chip in now to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109029156/549777991/616501713?refcode=footer&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5539-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjhhMWMyMy0xZjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ouGoM5e0v4efK0QjlXF5NmF9yXUJOezLDjFwTVL6R0Y=)** You can also **[text JACKY to 30508](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109029157/549777992/616501713?refcode=footer&code=jtk5539-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjhhMWMyMy0xZjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ouGoM5e0v4efK0QjlXF5NmF9yXUJOezLDjFwTVL6R0Y=)** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign.

Thank you,
Jacky _By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. name: Tom Barrett
subject: Time to Put An End to Sanctuary Cities
body:
East Lansing is defying the Trump Administration | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6841b4a2c08fee1423950330&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D68418136e43993569547d513%26ss_email_id%3D6841b4a2c08fee1423950330%26ss_campaign_name%3DTime%2Bto%2BPut%2BAn%2BEnd%2Bto%2BSanctuary%2BCities%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-06-05T15%253A16%253A37Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_68418136e43993569547d513&l=en-US&s=1H92DN8EILrexxJOQ7LoSqEJNJc%3D)
---
| **Time to Put An End to Sanctuary Cities**
---
When I decided to run for Congress in 2021, I promised to make border security a top priority.The flow of illegal immigrants into the country are **straining our social services**. The flow of illegal fentanyl into our communities is **killing our neighbors**. Terrorists slipping in undetected are **putting our nation at risk**. And the human trafficking of innocent women and children is an **unimaginable horror**.
---
[_ _**PROTECT THE BORDER** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6841b4a2c08fee1423950330&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fsanctuary-city&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_68418136e43993569547d513&l=en-US&s=LF3zXJzkwOcxO4ly_eoPDo9Kbu0%3D)
---
Since I took the Oath of Office 153 days ago, **the progress we’ve made with President Trump’s leadership is historic**. After watching Joe Biden allow 10 million people to enter our country illegally, we have:
* Reduced migrant border crossings nearly 100%
* Cut fentanyl traffic 54%
* Deported 135,000 illegals, including violent gang members from Tren de Aragua and MS-13

---
| | |
---|---|---
[_ _**KEEP UP THE FIGHT** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6841b4a2c08fee1423950330&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fsanctuary-city&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_68418136e43993569547d513&l=en-US&s=LF3zXJzkwOcxO4ly_eoPDo9Kbu0%3D)
---
In the heart of the 7th Congressional District, the City of **East Lansing** , listed by the Department of Homeland Security as **a sanctuary city** , are [**defying the Trump Administration**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6841b4a2c08fee1423950330&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.lansingstatejournal.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2F2025%2F05%2F30%2Feast-lansing-ann-arbor-sanctuary-cities-federal-list-immigration-enforcement%2F83942824007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_68418136e43993569547d513&l=en-US&s=ZtJzdxnXrNMW5R78jjfVTFZlTv4%3D)’s efforts to deport people who entered our country illegally. That includes violent criminals, drug traffickers, and people who are eroding the safety of our communities.
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6841b4a2c08fee1423950330&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.lansingstatejournal.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2F2025%2F05%2F30%2Feast-lansing-ann-arbor-sanctuary-cities-federal-list-immigration-enforcement%2F83942824007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_68418136e43993569547d513&l=en-US&s=ZtJzdxnXrNMW5R78jjfVTFZlTv4%3D)
---
That’s not what the American people voted for and it ignores that the very first act each of these people committed was **violating our immigration laws** to enter and work here illegally. Our citizens deserve a government that puts their interests over illegal immigrants. That’s what I’m committed to.

clean_body: East Lansing is defying the Trump Administration | | | | Time to Put An End to Sanctuary Cities When I decided to run for Congress in 2021, I promised to make border security a top priority.The flow of illegal immigrants into the country are straining our social services. The flow of illegal fentanyl into our communities is killing our neighbors. Terrorists slipping in undetected are putting our nation at risk. And the human trafficking of innocent women and children is an unimaginable horror. Since I took the Oath of Office 153 days ago, the progress we’ve made with President Trump’s leadership is historic. After watching Joe Biden allow 10 million people to enter our country illegally, we have: Reduced migrant border crossings nearly 100% Cut fentanyl traffic 54% Deported 135,000 illegals, including violent gang members from Tren de Aragua and MS-13 | | | ---|---|--- In the heart of the 7th Congressional District, the City of East Lansing , listed by the Department of Homeland Security as a sanctuary city , are ’s efforts to deport people who entered our country illegally. That includes violent criminals, drug traffickers, and people who are eroding the safety of our communities. | That’s not what the American people voted for and it ignores that the very first act each of these people committed was violating our immigration laws to enter and work here illegally. Our citizens deserve a government that puts their interests over illegal immigrants. That’s what I’m committed to. I voted to finish the Border Wall and am working to make sure every city, every county, and every resident complies with our immigration and border laws**. Ignoring these protections of our nation’s sovereignty is not an option. Tom Barrett | | | | | | | | | mailto:campaign@tombarrettforcongress.com | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- PO Box 15221, Lansing MI 48901, USA

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: How many more Americans must suffer?
body:
How many more Americans must be injured or killed by illegal aliens before we say enough is enough?

| | | | |
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdtike7pv6fvd7n65nukkvm2j3bpt3vnco36ebp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim0p76cph2bs)
|
---
Friend, **_How many more Americans must be injured or killed by illegal aliens before we say enough is enough?_****_ _****_How long must we all live in fear of deranged extremists screaming “Free Palestine” before we acknowledge the war being waged on our Judeo-Christian values and our American way of life?_****_ _****_How many more innocent people must be gunned down before we address the foreign terror threat already in our homeland?_****_ _****_How many more “campus takeovers” must we witness before we talk about the rot in our universities that is fueling all of this?_** [_**I’ve got a few common-sense ideas that we SHOULD be talking more about that I’d like to share with you.
**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbh0p4e9m0s9sdls4lg889c9mqkd8qv8fbiku5uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim0p76cph2bs)

[CLICK HERE TO READ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvhh3o1ej7ktke66mr2992vfshrruk0b6girs4k0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim0p76cph2bs)
Most of the career politicians in Washington don’t have the guts to say this, but I will. Thanks for your time on this important issue. Sincerely,
Daniel Cameron

|

subject: these tariffs will hurt PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Donald Trump’s tariffs _**will**_ hurt Pennsylvania families.

He says other countries will pay, but that’s not true. These tariffs are extra taxes on American businesses when they buy goods from other countries. And those businesses pass the cost to regular people like us.

**Pennsylvanians are already struggling with high prices, and now Trump is making it worse._And this time, he’s going after steel._**

We won’t stay quiet while Trump raises costs for hardworking people.

**[If you can, help us fight back. This November, Pennsylvania has big elections that can stop Trump in his tracks—or give him even more power. name: Richard Carlbom
subject: Pride is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party
body:
As we celebrate Pride Month, I want to take a moment to reflect—not only as chair of the Minnesota DFL, but as someone whose life and work have been deeply shaped by the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109029996/549780579/-1560330384?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk3Y2ZiOS0yMDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0YhtXYwNGH6cfukGDz8AT35jOrkErOoBgHuvs-yVew=)**
---
Peter, As we celebrate Pride Month, I want to take a moment to reflect—not only as chair of the Minnesota DFL, but as someone whose life and work have been deeply shaped by the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. I know firsthand how personal this is. My proudest moment didn’t happen on a campaign stage or even on Election Day. It was when I married my husband, Justin, in a church in St. Paul, surrounded by our family and friends. Two years earlier, in 2011, I was asked to lead Minnesotans United for All Families, the campaign to defeat a constitutional amendment that would have restricted the freedom to marry in our state. At the time, many thought it couldn’t be done. But Minnesotans proved otherwise. We built one of the largest grassroots movements in Minnesota history. We knocked on doors, had heartfelt conversations with neighbors, and formed a coalition that stretched across religious, racial, and geographic lines. And we won. Minnesota became the first state in the country to defeat such an amendment at the ballot box. Just six months later, we secured marriage equality through the legislature. But the fight isn’t over. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are once again threatening our fundamental freedoms. They’re working to roll back our rights and erase our stories. In fact, fewer Republicans support marriage equality today than in 2016. In the face of these challenges, we must recommit ourselves to building a state—and a country—where everyone can live freely and authentically, no matter who they are or who they love. The DFL coalition will always stand with our LGBTQ+ community—during Pride and every day after. [**If you believe everyone deserves to live with dignity and freedom, please consider making a contribution today. Your support will help us organize in every region of the state, defend hard-won rights, and elect leaders who will stand up for LGBTQ+ Minnesotans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109029997/549780580/2093165850?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk3Y2ZiOS0yMDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A0YhtXYwNGH6cfukGDz8AT35jOrkErOoBgHuvs-yVew=) Happy Pride! 🌈 Richard Carlbom
Chair
Minnesota DFL

clean_body: As we celebrate Pride Month, I want to take a moment to reflect—not only as chair of the Minnesota DFL, but as someone whose life and work have been deeply shaped by the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. | | | = Peter, As we celebrate Pride Month, I want to take a moment to reflect—not only as chair of the Minnesota DFL, but as someone whose life and work have been deeply shaped by the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. I know firsthand how personal this is. My proudest moment didn’t happen on a campaign stage or even on Election Day. It was when I married my husband, Justin, in a church in St. Paul, surrounded by our family and friends. Two years earlier, in 2011, I was asked to lead Minnesotans United for All Families, the campaign to defeat a constitutional amendment that would have restricted the freedom to marry in our state. At the time, many thought it couldn’t be done. But Minnesotans proved otherwise. We built one of the largest grassroots movements in Minnesota history. We knocked on doors, had heartfelt conversations with neighbors, and formed a coalition that stretched across religious, racial, and geographic lines. And we won. Minnesota became the first state in the country to defeat such an amendment at the ballot box. Just six months later, we secured marriage equality through the legislature. But the fight isn’t over. Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are once again threatening our fundamental freedoms. They’re working to roll back our rights and erase our stories. In fact, fewer Republicans support marriage equality today than in 2016. In the face of these challenges, we must recommit ourselves to building a state—and a country—where everyone can live freely and authentically, no matter who they are or who they love. The DFL coalition will always stand with our LGBTQ+ community—during Pride and every day after. = Happy Pride! 🌈 Richard Carlbom Chair Minnesota DFL | = * = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. Join the DFL Victory Club today to help us build the infrastructure we need to defend our values from Donald Trump's extreme agenda. = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Paid for by Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party Minnesota Democratic–Farmer–Labor Party 255 Plato Blvd St. Paul, MN 55107 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

his power in the midterms and beyond

That’s right: Donald Trump has already raised at least $600 million ahead
of next year’s midterm elections — 17 months away — and he’s planning to
invest a significant amount of it into his efforts to hold Republicans’
Senate and House majorities.

While we’re not going to ask you to pitch in $600 million (or anything
close to that!) today, we are counting on folks like you to [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=q22025_abs_em.AkhZ-L&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250605_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8652%2E5257348%2E58b3Z0 ]pitch in $5
today to fuel Adam’s fight to flip the Senate blue.

As Vice-Chair of the DSCC (the Senate Democrats’ campaign arm), Adam is
working every day to secure a Democratic majority during the 2026 midterm
elections. And every $5 donation we receive puts us one step closer to
electing more Democratic Senators who will stand up to Trump’s lawlessness
and deliver for working families.

And fuel Adam’s work to help California Democratic House Members and
Democratic challengers alike — because California will be the biggest
battleground in the fight to take back the House.

We get it,
Derek: $5 doesn’t seem like
much — especially compared to the hundreds of millions being spent by Elon
Musk and Donald Trump.

helps Adam support our Democratic candidates across the country, reach
voters with our message, and fight back against the millions of dollars
Trump is spending to try to buy our elections. So

today?

name: Andy Kim
subject: Cutting SNAP by $300 billion is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
SNAP is a lifeline for those who need it.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109030755/549782294/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTVlZTVlYy0yMTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lPWaeswnn2L8H4zY3QxILtNko9MS6seevxpwO-FQF0=&emci=fc84e620-5441-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d15ee5ec-2142-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Trump's budget bill that passed the House would slash SNAP funding by $300 billion over the next decade.** This bill would shift nearly $200 million in costs to New Jersey, and impose harsher eligibility requirements that would strip access from seniors, children, and working families who rely on these benefits to put food on the table. It's incomprehensible. **SNAP is a lifeline for those who need it.** Nearly 800,000 New Jerseyans rely on this program. Almost half are children, and 1 in 5 are over the age of 60. These are our neighbors, our grandparents, our students. Gutting this program will only deepen hunger and hardship in our communities. I've seen what food insecurity does to a community, and what SNAP does to prevent it. That's why I'm working to stop these cuts and working to strengthen, not weaken, this critical program. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk are wrong; SNAP is not a waste. It's an investment in the health of our state that I will continue fighting for.** More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: SNAP is a lifeline for those who need it. | | | | Trump's budget bill that passed the House would slash SNAP funding by $300 billion over the next decade. This bill would shift nearly $200 million in costs to New Jersey, and impose harsher eligibility requirements that would strip access from seniors, children, and working families who rely on these benefits to put food on the table. It's incomprehensible. SNAP is a lifeline for those who need it. Nearly 800,000 New Jerseyans rely on this program. Almost half are children, and 1 in 5 are over the age of 60. These are our neighbors, our grandparents, our students. Gutting this program will only deepen hunger and hardship in our communities. I've seen what food insecurity does to a community, and what SNAP does to prevent it. That's why I'm working to stop these cuts and working to strengthen, not weaken, this critical program. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are wrong; SNAP is not a waste. It's an investment in the health of our state that I will continue fighting for. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . # [Don't let Trump bankrupt America by Drowning us in debt](https://default.salsalabs.org/T669b9916-91bd-4007-ab8b-3542db4c3e63/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8662c124-b369-4ea4-b543-f5da9edd5952/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [**Donald Trump added more to the national debt in his first term than any other president in American history.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91ee19af-7d94-4b25-bc03-09bf81045ae5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And now he is hell-bent on beating his own record, with his "Big beautiful bill" that gives massive tax cuts to the wealthy, and adds trillions to the national debt. Trump already bankrupted six companies, and he's apparently looking for the US to be "lucky number 7." It's hard to stress how stupid this is. America's debt rating has already been downgraded, meaning we will need to spend more to borrow the money to close the gap. And economic growth is slowing dramatically under Trump, which will reduce revenue coming in. And a massive tax cut for billionaires who don't need it will be the push that sends us over the edge. [**Don't let Trump drown us in debt. Add your name, and demand that Trump's debt bomb be rejected.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72afcd3e-1065-4460-b6d3-8d34dadc0be7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Fellow activist,

As the federal government continues to push for the Trump regime’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which would strip critical resources away from hardworking Americans in order to give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy (while ballooning our national debt by trillions of dollars in the process), we are sounding the alarm.

In Pennsylvania, our own budget process is well underway – with a deadline of June 30. That means our state’s funding priorities are going to be set well before Trump’s bill gets signed into law. Our state budget is a moral document – where legislators have a unique opportunity to pass legislation to counteract the “Big Beautiful Bill” and instead raise our minimum wage, fairly fund K-12 and higher education, legalize adult-use marijuana, and defend abortion access. But in order for that to happen, our state legislators must prioritize the needs of the people of Pennsylvania.

[**Will you help us engage our centered communities on the ground in understanding the role our state legislators play in advancing budget priorities that will move PA forward, not back, by rushing $25 or more in support of our civic education programs today?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR9vDmFdSfdCHSvx7Qho5PqARsPEHujbp39pyG93m1n-2Bh5Etjj3MHF4x-2Bd5KPNDR-2F0iew-2BRrF37sSjzC-2BvmhNbrw-3Dz-NG_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYG08Pj3ecuxnGPUyXT-2BrY4HhCET5Vax7Wn6LOHQ71dW0wQ3vUmYX7fio-2F1DoXcc7rG0bR8zlzOdR0QA8HTGIcrk4umwzw4QHT6Ufi4bCzJdB337URs61-2FyEL1PfTKCmEWTKwlX7jFOIR8hx3M7mMcY3V-2BUkbWfxa0Bc0TajpJJWgAHUbRWSSX1Dlbglf3SbTm)
**According to _The Morning Call_ , Trump’s federal budget bill would:**

❌ Take away health care from 13 million people nationwide and **588,000 in Pennsylvania.**

❌ Take away food assistance for three million nationwide and **at least 120,000 in Pennsylvania** , and it would **cost the state of Pennsylvania over a billion dollars per year** to maintain food assistance.

❌ Increase the deficit by over $2 trillion and would tilt our tax system even more heavily in favor of the **wealthiest Americans. **

As Governor Shapiro stated in the _Pennsylvania Capital-Star_ , “Any lawmaker in D.C. who thinks the commonwealth can backfill this massive hole they’ve created is wrong – and these cuts will have real life consequences for Pennsylvanians. As this heads to the Senate for a vote, I hope common sense and a concern for the people of Pennsylvania will prevail.”

**[We need to ensure that voters in Pennsylvania understand what’s at stake and are prepared to hold legislators accountable who are not representing their needs and instead, prioritizing billionaires over our communities. Help fund our civic education programs so we can advocate for policies that work for everyone, not just a select few, by rushing $25 or more today →](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR9vDmFdSfdCHSvx7Qho5PqARsPEHujbp39pyG93m1n-2BhXhGwkXNQNOmu725Pg4H4ug6KmF4nr-2BsqheW7p-2Bux-2FpM-3DP1WI_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYG08Pj3ecuxnGPUyXT-2BrY4HhCET5Vax7Wn6LOHQ71dW1N9LJoSa9Hn6KzWY-2FOrrgVfLcwMoQmpRtw7SvZDsNQvv9ZcHnCKtSo0HwWymingIwZQYwi7gVWT0pwlYxzLjtawBRP5dngzSFg0O9rM0Q6mv6d-2BYl8TmriIBZEw6r-2FeBj0SEnTAyaj-2F2LQ-2BooA88PB)**

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, As the federal government continues to push for the Trump regime’s so-called Big Beautiful Bill, which would strip critical resources away from hardworking Americans in order to give massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy (while ballooning our national debt by trillions of dollars in the process), we are sounding the alarm. In Pennsylvania, our own budget process is well underway – with a deadline of June 30. That means our state’s funding priorities are going to be set well before Trump’s bill gets signed into law. Our state budget is a moral document – where legislators have a unique opportunity to pass legislation to counteract the “Big Beautiful Bill” and instead raise our minimum wage, fairly fund K-12 and higher education, legalize adult-use marijuana, and defend abortion access. But in order for that to happen, our state legislators must prioritize the needs of the people of Pennsylvania. According to The Morning Call , Trump’s federal budget bill would: ❌ Take away health care from 13 million people nationwide and 588,000 in Pennsylvania. ❌ Take away food assistance for three million nationwide and at least 120,000 in Pennsylvania , and it would cost the state of Pennsylvania over a billion dollars per year to maintain food assistance. ❌ Increase the deficit by over $2 trillion and would tilt our tax system even more heavily in favor of the wealthiest Americans. As Governor Shapiro stated in the Pennsylvania Capital-Star , “Any lawmaker in D.C. who thinks the commonwealth can backfill this massive hole they’ve created is wrong – and these cuts will have real life consequences for Pennsylvanians. As this heads to the Senate for a vote, I hope common sense and a concern for the people of Pennsylvania will prevail.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In this together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

subject: re: Justice Sotomayor's warning... -

body:
| | | **BREAKING: Justice Sotomayor speaks out as Trump escalates attacks on the free press!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20428%2E9716520%2EjUQwho)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:****[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to support freedom of the press!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20428%2E9716520%2EjUQwho)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20428%2E9716520%2EjUQwho)
---

Team -- Amid Donald Trump's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump wants!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 11:10 A.M. ET, we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20428%2E9716520%2EjUQwho)**
| [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21373?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250605-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-Pros-sl1&akid=20428%2E9716520%2EjUQwho)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: GIFFORDS
subject: ❗To everyone who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don't skip this message. 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources to show that our movement is stronger than ever.
#

👋 Friends -
To everybody who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don’t skip this important message.

Just days ago, the Trump administration ripped away $1 billion in mental health resources to stop school shootings — during Mental Health Awareness Month.
This decision will have devastating impacts on our kids and communities.

In 2022, Republicans AND Democrats came together to pass the first federal gun violence prevention bill in nearly 30 years.
This included funding so schools could hire social workers and mental health professionals, including for at-risk kids.
These resources have been proven to reduce gun violence. But because of Donald Trump’s actions, millions of kids just lost their access to mental health services.

We know the Trump administration won’t stop there. They will try to dismantle all of the progress we’ve achieved to make our communities safer from gun violence.
We are doing all we can to demand elected officials up and down the ballot stand up to Donald Trump and pass gun safety legislation.
But team, that takes resources from supporters like you.

You helped us so much to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act in 2022. Now, we need your support again to protect what we accomplished together.
99% of people won't give today; they'll simply click away.
But if everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever.

[**Please, if you’re ready to make a huge impact to advance our movement for gun safety, please give any amount to GIFFORDS PAC today. Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. What matters most is that you are taking action today in the fight to make our communities safer.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250605-1-b&t=1&akid=10544%2E3935704%2E-y993N)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&amount=3&t=20&akid=10544%2E3935704%2E-y993N)**
---
****
| **[Donate $27](https://go.giffords.org/go/61945?c0=giffords-em-june25.O2XKkI&refcode=em250605-1-b&t=21&akid=10544%2E3935704%2E-y993N)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-june25.kO3487&refcode=em250605-1-b&t=22&akid=10544%2E3935704%2E-y993N)**

The team at GIFFORDS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=10544%2E3935704%2E-y993N) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team DLCC
subject: A direct investment in building Democratic power in statehouses nationwide
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Majorities are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate with a donation today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
We need your help more than ever – here’s why:
* With full legislative control, Virginia Democrats have fended off the worst of the MAGA agenda; protecting abortion access, investing in public education, and supporting federal workers impacted by DOGE’s mass layoffs. **But we hold a narrow, one-seat majority in the House – and every seat in the chamber will be on the ballot this fall.**
* Our best opportunities to build power and fight back against Trump’s far-right policies are in state legislative races. By building power in our statehouses, we can block the MAGA agenda from spreading through states like yours and elect leaders who will fight for our fundamental freedoms and expand economic opportunity.
* Expanding our Democratic power will take patience, strategic investments, and – above all else – grassroots support from people like you. **Majorities in our statehouses are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate.**

clean_body: Majorities are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate with a donation today. | | | | | ---|--- We need your help more than ever – here’s why: With full legislative control, Virginia Democrats have fended off the worst of the MAGA agenda; protecting abortion access, investing in public education, and supporting federal workers impacted by DOGE’s mass layoffs. But we hold a narrow, one-seat majority in the House – and every seat in the chamber will be on the ballot this fall. Our best opportunities to build power and fight back against Trump’s far-right policies are in state legislative races. By building power in our statehouses, we can block the MAGA agenda from spreading through states like yours and elect leaders who will fight for our fundamental freedoms and expand economic opportunity. Expanding our Democratic power will take patience, strategic investments, and – above all else – grassroots support from people like you. Majorities in our statehouses are built seat-by-seat, year after year, and we’re counting on Democrats like you to step up to the plate. Donations to emails like this help fuel our work in the states – supporting candidates, sending resources to caucuses, supporting in-state digital programs, connecting candidates with opportunities to boost their campaigns, and so much more. When we say grassroots donors are the driving force behind our movement, we mean it. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. body:
Not sure if you had a chance to read my email to you, so I’ve forwarded it along. | | | Hey, Fellow Republican. Just wanted to make sure you saw the email I sent you yesterday.

**Last week was a huge week for Indiana Republicans.** We passed a conservative budget that _expands school choice, cuts wasteful spending, and protects Hoosier taxpayers_ — all while addressing a $2 billion shortfall without resorting to the kind of Big Government bailouts the Left loves.

If you didn’t get a chance to read the note, I’ve forwarded it below. _**[It’s worth a read — and if you’re fired up about the direction we’re headed, chip in a few bucks to help us keep the wins coming.](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/akjnUBxqehXQ_GC5Y2eQsamxd3lF0ic821AWXmEihXA4JhTXQ7tysYQyqKFTwgaOGLBhQ13edRkn6g14Z83ne7W2w46NvfM-_D_WAs5vl8_41qTmPUknNiiLvnIft_2593hK3UV4RdvgxdG2K8zY_bu4NnPH-aV271h7NwC7U7D46gb0GHIEyCqvfJuoxHLKwXOU2wXcQTmNY4Kt8vg0qvv011XsMojXr9nHeqzUbseK-lycaz_BI-M9o6knrKjDlCodhLLFyZhlcklpH6kHYa8roWnbnyAqmuw_SMr_QWjnGyZXzYGzjHP1WKHRY8elqIovFhFI2qoR6Qx56V0sQ9uK5_MjrgXE2JQYyvgBDRtZN2p9FfUHOtVxRZgBrokf/PklRH4fwqPr2TpoNrZlxdupIfQhO_zMo/9)**_

Fellow Republican, I’m thrilled to share some exciting news from the Indiana Statehouse. **Last week, Republican lawmakers passed a transformative $44 billion state budget that reflects our commitment to conservative values and responsible governance.**
---
_The budget includes:_

* An expansion of school choice, allowing more families to access quality education options that best suit their children's needs.
* Implementing measures to ensure fiscal responsibility, such as addressing a $2 billion revenue shortfall through strategic spending cuts and a $2 per pack increase in cigarette taxes, which will generate approximately $800 million over the biennium to support Medicaid programs.

---
These achievements are a testament to what we can accomplish when we stand united. But our work isn't done. _**We need your support to continue advancing our shared values and building a stronger Indiana.**_

clean_body: Not sure if you had a chance to read my email to you, so I’ve forwarded it along. | | | Hey, Fellow Republican. Just wanted to make sure you saw the email I sent you yesterday. Last week was a huge week for Indiana Republicans. We passed a conservative budget that expands school choice, cuts wasteful spending, and protects Hoosier taxpayers — all while addressing a $2 billion shortfall without resorting to the kind of Big Government bailouts the Left loves. If you didn’t get a chance to read the note, I’ve forwarded it below. Thanks, Lana Keesling Chairwoman Sent from my iPhone | \------------- Forwarded Message ------------- From: Lana Keesling <> Date: Wed, June 4, 2025 at 3:45 PM Subject: Conservative values 🤝 Responsible governance To: | Fellow Republican, I’m thrilled to share some exciting news from the Indiana Statehouse. Last week, Republican lawmakers passed a transformative $44 billion state budget that reflects our commitment to conservative values and responsible governance. The budget includes: An expansion of school choice, allowing more families to access quality education options that best suit their children's needs. Implementing measures to ensure fiscal responsibility, such as addressing a $2 billion revenue shortfall through strategic spending cuts and a $2 per pack increase in cigarette taxes, which will generate approximately $800 million over the biennium to support Medicaid programs. These achievements are a testament to what we can accomplish when we stand united. But our work isn't done. We need your support to continue advancing our shared values and building a stronger Indiana. Thank you for standing with us as we work to secure a brighter future for Indiana. | | Sincerely, Lana Keesling Chairwoman, Indiana Republican Party | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

# Big Money Lobbyists purchased the Texas Legislature and Governor's Office.
## 2019: We have to establish the THC Cannabis Industry in Texas to fight the Opioid Epidemic in Texas for the children.
## 2025: We MUST put the only viable and safe competitor to Opioids for pain management out of business in Texas for the children!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2272715.841.1.761277c9c50a5bc57762562bd7a16ccc) more detail about this particular debacle on "X" where you can give your thoughts and observations as well.
---
| BIG MONEY donors conducted a market protection operation we fondly refer to as the 89th Texas Legislature.
---
## The "Check & Balance" is so far Out of Balance it has become a whirling dervish carnival ride out of control and starting to throw the riders out in the spin cycle.
---
## The three branches of government are Executive, Legislative and Judicial.
## For Texans, that means our Governor, our Legislature and our Courts, respectively.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud.secureclick.net/c/33448?id=2272715.842.1.9daa47ea318eb487235b418747d95365) The X.com platform may be the best source of in depth independent citizen journalism on this subject. In fact, it must be working because Main Stream NEWS media outlets are now starting to cover exactly what we have been reporting ALL SESSION LONG.
---
**Sunlight and oxygen are the most effective disinfectants.** Before you accept a single excuse from ANYONE in this Texas 89th Legislature, let's get a few facts clearly stated: 31 Texas Senators: 20 Republicans, 11 Democrats 150 Texas House Reps: 88 Republicans, 62 Democrats **Republicans have a CLEAR and convincing majority in BOTH houses of the legislature.** _So...how did Democrats and their agenda prevail this session?_ **Here's how:** The HOUSE Republican Caucus met before the session and chose a Republican for House Speaker. Rather than ratify Representative Cook, 36 reps ran out of the room and made a dirty deal with the Democrats to choose Representative Burrows as what we now call RINO Speaker. As this was happening, we addressed the Texas Governor who holds the ultimate VETO power to make a public statement to all House Republicans that the Governor would veto the bills of any republican house member that BROKE the caucus rules and did to vote for the caucus choice, Cook. Abbott did nothing and let the RINO/Democrat Cabal rule over the Texas House. **THIS put the HOUSE in control of the Legislature.** We then publicly asked the Lt Gov Dan Patrick to simply do the same and tell the House that the Senate would simply NOT ratify ANY legislation coming out of the HOUSE, effectively a knock out punch to the RINO/DEMOCRAT cabal. Patrick did worse than nothing...Patrick starting making back room deals with lobbyist controlled Burrows and the RINOs. Now...you are naive and ignorant to think that Texas Governor Greg Abbott, Lt. Governor Dan Patrick & House Speaker Dustin Burrows are NOT fully committed to each other in a very sick and salacious loving relationship behind closed doors fueled by lobbyist dollars. THIS 89th Legislature SHOULD have been Texas most shining moment as a state. Instead, it has betrayed the voters in every possible way. If it were a person, it would be a boy that was groomed, transgendered into a woman, that lived its life as a butch lesbian pretending to be a man. **WE the VOTERS, Texans, sent them to Austin with a referendum for the TRUMP 47 Agenda. They have done everything to work against it.** YES...that is how messed up this ridiculous Texas Legislative Session has proven itself to be. Examine the record.

## These guys don't belong in public office any more.
## They belong on the damn gong show.

# Even the far left leaning Houston Chronicle recognizes that people have had enough of their governance being purchased out from underneath them
---
__The Hearst Media Owned Houston Chronicle attempted to report some actual news this week. Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher, CRTX News Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. TLR, co-founded by Houston businessman Dick Weekley, is not a grassroots movement, but a front group for corporate interests. Weekley’s TLR PAC, funded by wealthy businessmen, including insurance companies and corporations, raised and spent over $20 million in the 2024 elections, supporting Republican candidates and legislators, so that they would introduce bills like Senate Bill 30 (SB30) and Senate Bill 39
(SB39) to protect corporate profits over legitimate injury claims of Texans. The Republicans, whom TLR supported that were elected, received over $12.5 million in donations. See below for a list of these Republicans. Is your State Representative or State Senator on the list of those who the TLR tried to buy off? Not all of them support TLR’s legislation, the TLR simply tries to buy their support. Most of these legislators support your constitutional rights, but they need to hear from you. Call them to encourage them to vote “No!” on TRL’s power play! TLR’s agenda prioritizes shielding negligent corporations, like reckless trucking firms or polluters, from having to compensate for injuries inflicted upon Texans. TLR should be renamed “Texans for Corporate Greed and Immunity,” because it consistently protects corporate interests by undermining the constitutional rights of those harmed by corporate misconduct. TLR’s spent millions in donations, over $20 million to Republican candidates in 2024 alone, to buy influence to advance their corporate agenda, not conservative values. By backing SB 30 and SB 39, TLR and Weekley undermine the constitutional rights of Texans to be compensated for injuries caused by negligent actions of individuals or businesses. Your State Representative needs to hear from you. Tell them to vote “No! on SB 30 and SB 39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home Call their office and tell them to vote “No!” on SB30 and SB39. SB 30 was voted out of Texas House Judiciary and Civil Jurisprudence Committee on Wednesday, May 20, 2024 and is in the House Calendars Committee which sets the bills for a vote before the House. SB 39 is still in the House Judiciary Committee. Call the offices of your Republican members and tell them to vote “No!” on both SB30 and SB39. You can click here to find your legislator at: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home You can monitor this legislation for committee hearings and votes on
SB30and on SB39 at (https://capitol.texas.gov (https://capitol.texas.gov/)). Why SB 30 and SB 39 Must Be Opposed 1\. Violation of the Texas Constitution
| 1. | Violation of the Texas Constitution
---|---
Both SB 30 and SB 39 undermine Article 1, Section 13 of the Texas Constitution, which guarantees that “All courts shall be open, and every person for an injury done him, in his lands, goods, person or reputation, shall have remedy by due course of law.”This constitutional provision ensures that you and other Texans have access to courts and meaningful compensation for injuries that have been inflicted upon you. SB 30caps health care expenses, denying full compensation for their injuries caused by corporate negligence, such as refinery workers maimed in explosions or families harmed in motor vehicle accidents. SB 39was written to “protect Texas trucking,” by restricting lawsuits against trucking companies, shielding corporations from liability for having negligently caused injuries to individuals. The Texas Supreme Court has struck down similar caps on compensation as unconstitutional (Lucas v. United States, 1988). These bills undermine our open courts provision in the Texas Constitution.
1\. SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
1. | SB 30 and SB 39 Harm Vulnerable Texans
---|---
By capping medical expense recovery, SB 30 punishes uninsured Texans (over 4.3 million, including 623,000 children) and deters healthcare providers from treating them, leaving injured victims of corporate negligence with crushing bills. SB 39 limits lawsuits against trucking companies, even when their negligence causes catastrophic injuries or deaths on Texas roads. It protects corporate profits over families devastated by preventable crashes, undermining justice for those harmed by reckless corporate behavior.
Insurance Profits Soar, Yet No Relief for Texans
The Texas insurance industry, a key TLR backer, made an estimated $3.5 billion in profits in 2023 and $6.7 billion in 2024, an increase of over 90%, driven by premium hikes and investment gains. TLR admits that SB 30 will not lower insurance rates, nor will SB 39. These bills are not about helping you, the consumer. These bills shift the financial burden of corporate negligence onto victims, forcing families, healthcare providers, or taxpayers to cover costs, while insurers pocket record profits. SB 30 and SB 39 are about insulating corporations from liability for having caused negligent injuries, enabling them to make more profits at the expense of injured Texans.
1\. Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
1. | Trump’s Executive Order Requires that Truck Drivers Speak English; SB 39 Blocks Trump’s Order
---|---
President Trump signed an executive order making sure all commercial truck drivers speak English, but right now, Republican’s who support SB39 are opposing Trump's order for Texas.
SB 39 blocks admission of whether or not truck drivers speak English.
Texas Sheriffs oppose this bill because it makes Texas less safe.
You must act now to protect our constitutional rights and ensure justice for all Texans, not just corporate giants.
Call or email your state representative today, and tell him or her to oppose SB 30 and SB 39. Click on the following link to find your state representative: https://wrm.capitol.texas.gov/home
As conservatives, we must stand for our constitutional rights that guarantee liberty, justice, and the rule of law. Let’s defeat SB 30 and SB 39 to protect Texans from TLR’s profit-driven assault on our Texas Constitution.
Editorial by Steven Hotze, M.D.,
Publisher of CRTX News

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: One busy month on the campaign trail!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036481/549799740/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=&emci=b3ba1a5d-2842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=4f8080a6-2842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=5944223)
Hi Peter, We’re heading into summer with serious momentum, and every day we’re getting closer to flipping WI-03 and bringing locally-focused, working-class leadership to Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail this past month that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can flip this seat. Derrick Van Orden’s failed leadership has made life harder for people across our district. But when things get tough, you don’t throw in the towel -- you show up and listen. That’s exactly what I’ve been doing and will continue to do. Hope to see you out on the trail, Rebecca | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036487/549799746/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)****
---

* * *

**We kicked off June Dairy Month in West Salem!** I had a blast at the June Dairy Days Parade to celebrate our region’s agricultural roots. As Van Orden continues to fail on delivering a Farm Bill, I’m running for Congress to grow opportunities for family farms, not corporate giants.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036492/549799751/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)
**We visited with IBEW locals at their statewide conference in Eau Claire** and talked about training, safety, and the essential work they do keeping our infrastructure running. These workers are the backbone of our power grid — and they deserve leadership that stands with them.
** ** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036507/549799757/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)**
**I was honored to attend the Ho-Chunk Nation Powwow** in Black River Falls and participate in Grand Entry and speak with Tribal leaders. In Congress, I’ll be a voice for cultural preservation and Tribal sovereignty. _Pinagigi!_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036509/549799775/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)**
**I was proud to personally congratulate US Army Captain Jordan Henrickson on his promotion to Major.** A native of WI-03, Jordan’s dedication to our country was a reminder of the deep well of service and sacrifice in this district.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036512/549799777/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)**
**And I gathered with voters in La Crosse to continue building grassroots support.** It was great to reconnect with long-time supporters and meet new faces who are excited to see real working-class leadership on the ballot.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036515/549799780/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)**
Everywhere I go, I see a district hungry for change—and ready to elect someone who doesn’t just talk about values, but lives them.
[**If you’re able, will you chip in $3 to help us keep up this momentum and flip WI-03 for working people?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036518/549799783/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | ******[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109036521/549799786/-2087246159?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-c&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjgwODBhNi0yODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XsoBbROsY_DFB9F-L01g6bxMkIYktbnUw3NhzBebsOw=)******
