clean_body: | Hi Peter, We’re heading into summer with serious momentum, and every day we’re getting closer to flipping WI-03 and bringing locally-focused, working-class leadership to Congress. Below are a few recent highlights from the trail this past month that I wanted to share with you. But first, I just want to say thank you, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going, and I’m more confident than ever that we can flip this seat. Derrick Van Orden’s failed leadership has made life harder for people across our district. But when things get tough, you don’t throw in the towel -- you show up and listen. That’s exactly what I’ve been doing and will continue to do. Hope to see you out on the trail, Rebecca | **= We kicked off June Dairy Month in West Salem! I had a blast at the June Dairy Days Parade to celebrate our region’s agricultural roots. As Van Orden continues to fail on delivering a Farm Bill, I’m running for Congress to grow opportunities for family farms, not corporate giants. = We visited with IBEW locals at their statewide conference in Eau Claire and talked about training, safety, and the essential work they do keeping our infrastructure running. These workers are the backbone of our power grid — and they deserve leadership that stands with them. = I was honored to attend the Ho-Chunk Nation Powwow in Black River Falls and participate in Grand Entry and speak with Tribal leaders. In Congress, I’ll be a voice for cultural preservation and Tribal sovereignty. Pinagigi! = I was proud to personally congratulate US Army Captain Jordan Henrickson on his promotion to Major. A native of WI-03, Jordan’s dedication to our country was a reminder of the deep well of service and sacrifice in this district. = And I gathered with voters in La Crosse to continue building grassroots support. It was great to reconnect with long-time supporters and meet new faces who are excited to see real working-class leadership on the ballot. = Everywhere I go, I see a district hungry for change—and ready to elect someone who doesn’t just talk about values, but lives them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** ****** | | ****=** | ****=** Thank you for helping power this campaign. We’re just getting started. With appreciation, Rebecca =** | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

name: Johnny O
subject: Buyer's Remorse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

I write to you today tired, bleary-eyed, but no less determined.
Early this morning, House Republicans passed President Trump's big, ugly bill while most of the country slept. They started debating it yesterday at 1 a.m. -- literally under the cloak of darkness.
That's because they don't want their constituents to know that it will:
* Raise the deficit by $3 trillion
* Cut taxes for the rich, but increase costs for middle and lower-income families
* Strip healthcare from nearly 14 million Americans
* Jeopardize food security for the 42 million Americans who rely on SNAP
For more than 30 hours, I was in the fight -- taking to the House floor at 4 a.m. to urge my colleagues to vote against this morally bankrupt bill. I waited more than 12 hours to offer one of 520 Democratic amendments to block the worst of its damange.
And we're not giving up. The Senate still has to pass it. And if the Senate makes changes, it will come back to the House again. We will be ready.
Will you contribute today to help me make sure this bill never becomes law? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]
I am, always, grateful for your support.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

name: Mary Trump
subject: this fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109037314/549802574/-204460493?refcode=250605_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4MjUyZi0yOTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1jISJPyKDPl1EAW6IJRtXt4Jv4FoT89qQFaLoexWIaw=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109037315/549802575/-204460493?refcode=250605_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ4MjUyZi0yOTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1jISJPyKDPl1EAW6IJRtXt4Jv4FoT89qQFaLoexWIaw=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! → If the media wants to attack us for having a “warrior mentality” – the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... → If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump’s MAGA movement – the movement that says we can make America great... → If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department... ...Then they don’t understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We’re going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. Thank you so much for your time, Tim Sheehy Eli Crane Ryan Zinke Three Navy SEALs Serving in Congress | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. name: Dexter HQ
subject: Trump's little threats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Right now, Oregon is under the Trump administration’s microscope.
That’s a good thing. They’re scared of us.
Portland is a sanctuary city within a sanctuary state. That means Oregon safeguards undocumented residents by limiting how much local law enforcement cooperates with federal immigration officials.
We work to create a culture in Oregon where our neighbors can live without fear. Because if one person can be picked up off the street without due process, it can happen to anyone.
But now, Trump and his cronies are coming after sanctuary cities and threatening to withhold federal money if we don’t bend to their will.
Right now, the Trump administration is sending our economy into a downward spiral, straining critical foreign alliances, and trying to push millions of people off their healthcare. But instead of addressing that, they’re focused on attacking Oregon.
If the Trump administration can detain one person illegally, it can happen to anyone. If one person is unsafe, that means everyone is threatened.
He’s trying to scare us. We won’t let that happen.
We need to build a coalition of grassroots support to win the House, Senate, and Oval Office. Will you support Maxine’s people-powered campaign by chipping in now? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250605_microscope_act]

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 1-POINT MARGIN!
body:
I’m counting on you to help close the gap.

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu4gdh7ug6pjm8718nfrtvg7inbaccia1ndg4hro_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shimaob2cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Before you dread the idea of reading another political email, I want you to know this one’s different.
---
No doom and gloom, no panic. What I’m about to share with you is PROOF that when we step up and answer the call, we BEAT the Left and WIN.
---
When I last reached out, I unfortunately had troubling news to share...
---
**_At the time, polling from Fox News showed Democrats with a _7-point lead_ on the generic congressional ballot._**
---
But just one month later, after following up with countless Republican voters to verify their voter profiles to give me and President Trump the _TRUTH_ about where voters stand in 2025, I couldn’t be more pleased with the results.
---
**_In fact, Rasmussen just released a poll showing the Democrats’ lead has been CUT DOWN to just 1 POINT... well within the _margin_ _of_ _error_!_**
---
We are closing the gap to not only defend but EXPAND President Trump’s majority – and the Left is terrified.
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2ad9hcph4vhdpabll8dtkf9p0lgbmeilico5cg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shimaob2cph2bs)

---

Thank you,

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Should Congress be BANNED from trading stocks? I want to know what you think!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)
Friend — I want to know what you think.
It’s a simple question: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress? Vote here:
**[YES](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)**
**[NO](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)**
**[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)**
Congress deals with the most pressing issues of our nation, and that includes the economy and financial sector. We make policy decisions that can shift markets and change the economic situation of this country.
With that much power, I think it’s completely unfair that members of Congress can then turn around and get rich by investing in stocks with insider information.
Especially now, as billionaire oligarchs like Elon Musk are making policy decisions and working to make their allies in Congress richer.
So I want to show that a vast majority of Americans agree that it’s time to ban stock trading in Congress.
**[Tell me what you think! Head to my poll and make your voice heard.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)**
**[MAKE YOUR VOTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-stock_trading/?source=em250605-1-150&akid=1660%2E791427%2E_PfFKO)**
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

clean_body: Friend — I want to know what you think. It’s a simple question: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress? Vote here: Congress deals with the most pressing issues of our nation, and that includes the economy and financial sector. We make policy decisions that can shift markets and change the economic situation of this country. With that much power, I think it’s completely unfair that members of Congress can then turn around and get rich by investing in stocks with insider information. Especially now, as billionaire oligarchs like Elon Musk are making policy decisions and working to make their allies in Congress richer. So I want to show that a vast majority of Americans agree that it’s time to ban stock trading in Congress. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Peter,

We didn’t hit our end-of-month goal. Not even close.

We sent out thousands of messages... **and just 11 people donated.**

I’m not saying that to guilt-trip anyone. But I _am_ saying it because this is a wake-up call.

The far Left is already dumping money into conservative districts like mine—yes, even in a solid Republican seat. They know that if they can flip just a handful of races, they’ll seize total control of Congress and ram through their radical agenda.

**And here’s the kicker: House Democrats raised twice as much as Republicans from grassroots donors in Q1.** We’re getting crushed in small-dollar donations—and it’s exactly how they’re funding these attacks.

If we have a poor showing in Q2, it only gets harder from here.

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: 1-POINT MARGIN!
body:
I’m counting on you to help close the gap.

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1f107osooggs6n6p1hb9u1mcof60og4e2j4favo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim6pj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Before you dread the idea of reading another political email, I want you to know this one’s different.
---
No doom and gloom, no panic. What I’m about to share with you is PROOF that when we step up and answer the call, we BEAT the Left and WIN.
---
When I last reached out, I unfortunately had troubling news to share...
---
**_At the time, polling from Fox News showed Democrats with a _7-point lead_ on the generic congressional ballot._**
---
But just one month later, after following up with countless Republican voters to verify their voter profiles to give me and President Trump the _TRUTH_ about where voters stand in 2025, I couldn’t be more pleased with the results.
---
**_In fact, Rasmussen just released a poll showing the Democrats’ lead has been CUT DOWN to just 1 POINT... well within the _margin_ _of_ _error_!_**
---
We are closing the gap to not only defend but EXPAND President Trump’s majority – and the Left is terrified.
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z17fimslj4p8mt8kn9ea176mktgv52h7ko4blik0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim6pj2c9h2bs)
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr9mk9bnqo11juu7mfslf3s5kekfa7a5kohm3vdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim6pj2c9h2bs)
---
[VERIFY NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zga9h836bg4mb40c0dh2eo245n6sl0cbismeh2ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim6pj2c9h2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp45oos9oiqbo7i4rbfqeaaia1ivi47j8jfc74s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4shim6pj2c9h2bs)
---
Jim Jordan

body:
|
#

Hi team, One of Jason’s favorite parts of the job is meeting directly with constituents and talking to them about the issues that matter to them most. Recently Jason has been meeting with Coloradans to discuss the future of our communities and country. **Check out what he’s been up to, then**[**pitch in $10 to help us keep Jason in Washington:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039654/549809095/-1609829818?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039655/549809096/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=) Jason and Senator Michael Bennet hosted a joint town hall at Arapahoe High School in Centennial, where they spoke with hundreds of Coloradans about their fight to lower costs and push back against Republicans' attacks on Medicaid. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039656/549809097/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=) Jason spoke with the students at Denver Green School about the future of our country and the importance of civic engagement. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039657/549809098/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=) Jason also recently hosted a town hall at the Community College of Aurora, where he sat down with faculty and staff to discuss how he can best serve them in Congress. While Republican legislators across the country hide from their constituents and avoid tough questions, Jason knows his duty as a member of Congress is to answer directly to voters. That’s why he’s committed to talking to and building relationships with voters across this district to make real progress for our community. **[Will you pitch $10 or more today to support Jason’s work to bring Colorado values to Washington?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039658/549809099/-1634501027?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109039659/549809100/-1634501027?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDNlOGVkOS0yYzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMwh4_cfEg3RodOLoM-d1p1hkGQqL8ZZ7TRg9tckIHs=)

subject: Imagine this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friend, we want you to imagine waking up on November 4th, 2026. The day after next year’s midterm elections.
First, imagine waking up to this headline:
**_“Republicans expand majorities in House and Senate, paving the way for Trump and MAGA’s legislative agenda”**_
Now, imagine instead waking up to this headline:
**_“Republicans suffer big losses in swing districts, Democrats take majority in Congress with plans to block Trump’s agenda and investigate Trump administration"**_
We’re not joking when we say that the difference between these two futures is you.
The Long Run is already working to identify and support the progressive fighters who are running to take on the GOP and win in the midterms.
But these early months of the campaign are some of the most crucial of the entire election. This is when candidates prove whether or not they have what it takes to put together a winning campaign.
If we can’t get a headstart on fundraising, organizing, and campaigning, then the GOP and their mega-donors will come out the gate with a clear advantage. Will you help us get that headstart?
We don’t want to wake up on November 4th and wish that we had done more to prepare for this all-important election when it mattered most.

# [BREAKING: Trump Revives Muslim Ban](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165247158&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MjQ3MTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDkxNDI5NzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MTczNDk3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wrH-GlxvXdHyPrk2GOhfjXLhQ30MhDzij4eQ0NL3BJQ)
### His new ban is even more expansive and cruel than his previous one, and it's forthcoming economic harm will further devastate working people
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 5
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165247158&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MjQ3MTU4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTE0Mjk3NywiZXhwIjoxNzUxNzM0OTc3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.F79-UGOoAyVhZTs4mTPlKcd63lE4W42X99tjwUqXcpw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165247158&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1MjQ3MTU4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDkxNDI5NzcsImV4cCI6MTc1MTczNDk3NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wrH-GlxvXdHyPrk2GOhfjXLhQ30MhDzij4eQ0NL3BJQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9icmVha2luZy10cnVtcC1yZXZpdmVzLW11c2xpbS1iYW4_.HYLduwXO4oKFW62TVe8ICuy-qCwrbJiB-_RvpfBWGUg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/breaking-trump-revives-muslim-ban?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Trump's newly revived Muslim Ban isn't just a return to the cruelty of his first term--it's an escalation. While the earlier version of this policy tried (and failed) to hide behind ambiguous language, this one dispenses with the pretense altogether. It names names. It bans nations. And in doing so, it makes abundantly clear that Trump's target remains the same: Black and brown, Muslim-majority countries that pose no credible national security threat--but that he deems "undesirable."
This policy is not only cruel and ineffective, it's also extremely expensive and has long term devastating consequences on our economy. As a human rights lawyer who went to law school specifically to fight for the dignity and rights of all people, I am not sitting idle while he attempts--once again--to dismantle the very Republic he swore to defend. **Let 's Address This.**
**Support** _**Let 's Address This**_**as a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qJp7eI8ME4JMHcYocG-ELrrGQ2Y4HmIo7FfT6XHueRg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165247158)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae38f4e6-0a67-4c2c-ac70-f2a0fc5b77fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Who Is Banned?
As you, my readers know, I am an American Muslim. I am an immigrant. I am a person of color. I say all that to point out that I am likely not Donald Trump's favorite person. And as we look at the list of who Trump is banning, it's clear that he's targeting many people who look like me, on purpose. Trump's new Muslim Ban Executive Order [states](https://substack.com/redirect/7f32f748-9e70-45b4-9f19-88e9bc3e7b7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> I have determined to fully restrict and limit the entry of nationals of the following 12 countries: Afghanistan, Burma, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Libya, Somalia, Sudan, and Yemen. These restrictions distinguish between, but apply to both, the entry of immigrants and nonimmigrants.
> (g) I have determined to partially restrict and limit the entry of nationals of the following 7 countries: Burundi, Cuba, Laos, Sierra Leone, Togo, Turkmenistan, and Venezuela. These restrictions distinguish between, but apply to both, the entry of immigrants and nonimmigrants.
As a quick aside, "Burma" is a name that hasn't been used since 1989--it's Myanmar now. Remarkable how a man upset that people won't call it the "Gulf of America" himself insists on using a name nearly four decades out of date. In any case, what do you notice about the list of banned nations? Every single one is a majority-Black or majority-brown country. Most are Muslim-majority. And none of them are home to Trump-owned properties. And despite Trump citing the attack by an extremist on Jewish people in Boulder, CO last week as a reason for this ban, Egypt--the national origin of the extremist who attacked Jewish people last week--is not on the list.
This isn't immigration policy. It's white nationalist pandering dressed up in the language of "security."
## Why Is Trump Banning These Nations?
Trump claims he is banning these nations for national security purposes. But this claim and rationale falls apart immediately under the most basic scrutiny. First, he provides no meaningful evidence of any mass plot of violence, let alone actual acts of violence, from any of these nations towards the United States. But the lack of facts and evidence has never prevented Trump before from claiming something was true.
Worse still, this ban targets nations supposedly for having "high visa overstay rates." Again, this makes no sense. There's no consideration for the many who lawfully apply for asylum after overstaying--a process protected under international and U.S. law. There's no consideration for those who do return home before their visas expire. And there's absolutely no data suggesting these overstay rates are tied to any increase in violence or national security risks. So what exactly is being solved here?
The answer is nothing. Because this isn't about solving a problem--it's about punishing entire populations. It's collective punishment, which is both morally abhorrent and legally indefensible. It's also grossly ineffective. The real goal is to establish arbitrary, undefined standards of "undesirability," so that mass deportations, visa denials, and unchecked discrimination can become normalized.
But the cruelty doesn't stop there.
Trump has continued to suspend the U.S. refugee resettlement program from Afghanistan--while enacting a refugee program from South Africa for alleged "white genocide." This is, of course, a made up term and claim without a shred of evidence or facts. Meanwhile, the 1,660 Afghan refugees had already passed every security and vetting hurdle the U.S. government requires--yet Trump is banning them. These are not faceless names. These are human beings--translators who risked their lives to support American troops, children awaiting reunification with their families, even U.S. citizens abandoned and stranded abroad.
Trump's message to the world couldn't be clearer: Support the United States at your own peril. When it's convenient, we will exploit your labor, loyalty, and life--and then discard you when it is time for us to uphold our end of the bargain. The hypocrisy is particularly galling considering this is the same Trump who forced the release of 5,000 Taliban fighters during his last term--for absolutely nothing in return.
**If you 're finding value in this insight please join us as** **a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qJp7eI8ME4JMHcYocG-ELrrGQ2Y4HmIo7FfT6XHueRg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165247158)
## The Growing Economic Harm
Finally, do you have $12.5 billion to spare? Apparently Donald Trump thinks you do. Even prior to this cruel travel ban, Trump's unhinged policies on tariffs, sending ICE to attack immigrants and US citizens perceived to be immigrants, and insulting every close American ally, has caused irreparable harm to the travel and tourism industry. According to research conducted by the [The World Travel & Tourism Council](https://substack.com/redirect/25096b3a-8264-49db-8475-bff3ee04add5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The U.S. is on track to lose a staggering $12.5BN in international visitor spending this year. Notably, international visitor spending to the U.S. is projected to fall to just under $169BN this year, down from $181BN in 2024. This significant shortfall represents a 22.5% decline compared to the previous peak. The loss represents a direct blow to the U.S. economy overall, impacting communities, jobs, and businesses from coast to coast. The U.S. is the only country among 184 economies analysed by WTTC and Oxford Economics, forecast to see international visitor spending _decline_ in 2025.
As if the harm caused by Trump's tariffs wasn't enough, Trump continues to find new ways to harm working people. Yes, America is #1 alright, in fact we are alone globally in declining vital tourism spend. And with this new Muslim ban, that $12.5 billion lost will only dramatically increase. This will continue to harm small businesses and any organization that directly or indirectly relies on the travel and tourism industry to survive. All for the sake of bigotry and white nationalism.
## Conclusion
As an American Muslim and a human rights lawyer, this is precisely why I went to law school--to challenge systems of oppression and expose their illegality before they become irreversible.
So what can we do?
We organize. We speak out. We vote--and we support candidates funded by people, not by corporations. But we also educate, and that's why I write. That's why I publish. That's why I will continue to shine a light on every attempt to undermine our rights and values, no matter who is in power.
But I cannot do this alone.
If you believe in this fight for human rights, in justice, and in protecting our most vulnerable neighbors, I ask you to support this work. Subscribe below. Share this article. Talk to your friends, your family, your communities. Support small businesses hardest hit by these draconian bans. Support independent writers and advocates that speaks truth to power. As I wrote earlier this week, [boycotts against bad actors work](https://substack.com/redirect/531f3d19-694e-44ab-97f5-129e12fbbe4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as do collective support of good actors. So, invest in and support those good actors with your time, your trust, and your resources.
This isn't just about Muslims. Or immigrants. Or refugees. It's about upholding foundational human rights for all people. And we cannot afford to sit idle or stay silent.

His new ban is even more expansive and cruel than his previous one, and it's forthcoming economic harm will further devastate working people | | | Jun 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | Trump's newly revived Muslim Ban isn't just a return to the cruelty of his first term--it's an escalation. While the earlier version of this policy tried (and failed) to hide behind ambiguous language, this one dispenses with the pretense altogether. It names names. It bans nations. And in doing so, it makes abundantly clear that Trump's target remains the same: Black and brown, Muslim-majority countries that pose no credible national security threat--but that he deems "undesirable." This policy is not only cruel and ineffective, it's also extremely expensive and has long term devastating consequences on our economy. As a human rights lawyer who went to law school specifically to fight for the dignity and rights of all people, I am not sitting idle while he attempts--once again--to dismantle the very Republic he swore to defend. Let 's Address This. Support Let 's Address Thisas a paid subscriber and let 's continue to build this movement for justice together. | | ---|---|--- Who Is Banned? As you, my readers know, I am an American Muslim. I am an immigrant. I am a person of color. I say all that to point out that I am likely not Donald Trump's favorite person. And as we look at the list of who Trump is banning, it's clear that he's targeting many people who look like me, on purpose. Trump's new Muslim Ban Executive Order : I have determined to fully restrict and limit the entry of nationals of the following 12 countries: Afghanistan, Burma, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Libya, Somalia, Sudan, and Yemen. These restrictions distinguish between, but apply to both, the entry of immigrants and nonimmigrants. (g) I have determined to partially restrict and limit the entry of nationals of the following 7 countries: Burundi, Cuba, Laos, Sierra Leone, Togo, Turkmenistan, and Venezuela. These restrictions distinguish between, but apply to both, the entry of immigrants and nonimmigrants. As a quick aside, "Burma" is a name that hasn't been used since 1989--it's Myanmar now. Remarkable how a man upset that people won't call it the "Gulf of America" himself insists on using a name nearly four decades out of date. In any case, what do you notice about the list of banned nations? Every single one is a majority-Black or majority-brown country. Most are Muslim-majority. And none of them are home to Trump-owned properties. And despite Trump citing the attack by an extremist on Jewish people in Boulder, CO last week as a reason for this ban, Egypt--the national origin of the extremist who attacked Jewish people last week--is not on the list. This isn't immigration policy. It's white nationalist pandering dressed up in the language of "security." Why Is Trump Banning These Nations? Trump claims he is banning these nations for national security purposes. But this claim and rationale falls apart immediately under the most basic scrutiny. First, he provides no meaningful evidence of any mass plot of violence, let alone actual acts of violence, from any of these nations towards the United States. But the lack of facts and evidence has never prevented Trump before from claiming something was true. Worse still, this ban targets nations supposedly for having "high visa overstay rates." Again, this makes no sense. There's no consideration for the many who lawfully apply for asylum after overstaying--a process protected under international and U.S. law. There's no consideration for those who do return home before their visas expire. And there's absolutely no data suggesting these overstay rates are tied to any increase in violence or national security risks. So what exactly is being solved here? The answer is nothing. Convicted felon and fraudster Donald Trump has plunged our nation into further danger by appointing a 22-year-old ex-gardener and grocery store assistant, Thomas Fugate, as the leader of U.S. Terror Prevention. With only weeks of relevant experience, Fugate’s primary qualification appears to be his role as an advance team member for Trump’s 2024 campaign. _This reckless appointment is a blatant mockery of national security._ Trump’s actions reveal a stunning disregard for our nation’s safety. clean_body: | | | ** Trump makes us unsafe. He must be impeached! Convicted felon and fraudster Donald Trump has plunged our nation into further danger by appointing a 22-year-old ex-gardener and grocery store assistant, Thomas Fugate, as the leader of U.S. Terror Prevention. With only weeks of relevant experience, Fugate’s primary qualification appears to be his role as an advance team member for Trump’s 2024 campaign. This reckless appointment is a blatant mockery of national security. Trump’s actions reveal a stunning disregard for our nation’s safety. His leadership is a farce, and he is categorically unfit to guide our nation, putting all of us in grave danger. Yet, there is hope: Democrat Rep. Al Green has introduced Articles of Impeachment against Trump, and a resounding majority of Americans stand with us in support. Let us amplify this momentum! Our ImpeachTrumpNow.com campaign is making waves, plastering billboards across Minnesota, Georgia, Washington, Rhode Island, New York, New Mexico, California, and recently, in Houston, Texas—Rep. Al Green’s district. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Together, we will prevail! -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Here's the lowdown on Trump's 2026 House plan:
* He's urging Republicans in swing districts NOT to retire.

* He's built a $600 million-plus political apparatus — something he lacked after the 2016 election — and he's signaled plans to use it to keep control of the House.
* He's shutting down Republican primary challengers.
* And he's ramping up recruiting to flip Democrat-held seats.

**It's clear Trump is scared of what a Democrat-majority House would mean for his political power.**

_And he should be._ If we flip the House in 2026, we'll be in the best position possible to take away Trump's power and stop his administration's extremist agenda.

****[**So, please, will you donate now to stop Trump and help elect and reelect more Democratic pro-choice women who can flip the House in 2026?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109040980/549813477/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE610_20250605_TrumpHouse_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056322&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjQ3MDk4NC0yZTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2KfkTuJQLNmLHfL7wRABqPxaa3NPIlJPQBZIMFMEVik=)****

clean_body: Trump's aggressive plan to silence challengers >> | = Peter, Trump knows that the GOP's House majority is in jeopardy — and he's doing everything he can to avoid being impeached a third time when Democrats take back power. That's why he's calculated an aggressive plan to stop us from flipping the chamber next year. **= | = Here's the lowdown on Trump's 2026 House plan: He's urging Republicans in swing districts NOT to retire. He's built a $600 million-plus political apparatus — something he lacked after the 2016 election — and he's signaled plans to use it to keep control of the House. He's shutting down Republican primary challengers. And he's ramping up recruiting to flip Democrat-held seats. It's clear Trump is scared of what a Democrat-majority House would mean for his political power. And he should be. If we flip the House in 2026, we'll be in the best position possible to take away Trump's power and stop his administration's extremist agenda. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for your support, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: Pride Month is here! 🌈

body:
Pride Month is a time to celebrate the courage and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community — and to recommit to the fight for full equality under the law.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109041516/549814914/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-06-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODM0N2EwZS0yZjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfNYamX3VdKBYMTtMbLYx8_6oj63d2xiAnF3WOA1xBo=)

| Peter,

Happy Pride Month! **🌈**

Pride Month is a time to celebrate the courage and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community — and to recommit to the fight for full equality under the law.

Across the country, extremist lawmakers are targeting LGBTQ+ people with dangerous, discriminatory legislation. In the face of this cruelty, we must do more than speak out — we must act.

That’s why I proudly support the**Equality Act.**

**As Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus,** I’m fighting to:

**✅ **Protect LGBTQ+ people from discrimination in housing, jobs, and education

**✅ **Ensure inclusive access to health care

**✅ **Defend LGBTQ+ youth — especially transgender youth — from hate and harm

**✅ **Codify protections so that no future president can roll them back

**The Equality Act** would finally provide explicit federal protections for LGBTQ+ Americans — closing the gaps that leave millions vulnerable to discrimination.

_But MAGA extremists in Congress are doing everything they can to block it._

[_**If you believe everyone deserves to live freely and authentically, without fear of discrimination, then add your name in support of the Equality Act today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109041518/549814917/1636345760?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODM0N2EwZS0yZjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tfNYamX3VdKBYMTtMbLYx8_6oj63d2xiAnF3WOA1xBo=&emci=cdc9e8e4-1542-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=88347a0e-2f42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6681226)

subject: Here are some numbers you should know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109041690/549815463/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAxZDJhMzUtMmY0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DwKOJCjSV1Bwh-FNUyu3kPWlivEvi7HDGRPtln1gHRo=) I’m all about data, so let me hit you with some numbers you should know:
* **1 in 3** people in Oregon — _and over half the children in the state_ — are covered by Medicaid.
* Over **80,000** Oregonians rely on SNAP to help put food on the table.
* **13.7 MILLION** Americans rely on Medicaid for healthcare.
* **And 215 Republicans want to steal your benefits.**

Republicans voted to sell out millions of hardworking Americans and put critical benefits at risk without a single thought — just to fund their reckless budget bill and give tax handouts to billionaires and big corporations. _And I won’t stand for it._ In Congress, I’m fighting to protect Medicaid, defend SNAP, and push back on Republicans’ dangerous agenda that threatens benefits for MILLIONS of Americans — _and I need you with me in this fight._ **[Please, will you chip in now to help me protect critical benefits for Oregonians and Americans across the country and keep fighting back against Trump and radical Republicans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109041691/549815464/-629675555?refcode=email_060525_Budget-Numbers&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAxZDJhMzUtMmY0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DwKOJCjSV1Bwh-FNUyu3kPWlivEvi7HDGRPtln1gHRo=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109041692/549815465/-629675555?refcode=email_060525_Budget-Numbers&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAxZDJhMzUtMmY0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DwKOJCjSV1Bwh-FNUyu3kPWlivEvi7HDGRPtln1gHRo=)

name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: More lies. More dark money.
body:
We need your help to fight back.

| |
---
Team, American Action Network - a conservative Super PAC - just launched their latest multi-million dollar dark money ad-buy targeting the most competitive congressional districts in the country. **Nellie is on the list. ** All because Nellie voted to protect New Jersey families. This is a desperate attempt by Trump's allies to promote his so-called Big Beautiful Bill with lies to mislead working families. **That won't work here in New Jersey, friend. ** Here are the three key facts about the GOP budget:
* Its tax breaks mostly help the wealthiest 0.1% percent of Americans, ignoring the needs of working families.
* It makes heavy cuts to Medicaid to pay for these tax cuts and will cause 16 million Americans to lose life-saving health care.
* The bill will cost hardworking taxpayers $4 trillion, and provide them little to no savings.

**[This GOP budget is extremely ugly. Help Nellie fight back against these lies by making a contribution to her re-election campaign today. | | **Happy Pride Month!** Southwest Virginia is home to so many wonderful and inspiring LGBTQIA+ individuals. These folks are my friends, neighbors, and colleagues, and this month we celebrate them! Happy Pride Y'all! 🏳️🌈

| **VDOT Seeking Feedback on Route 419 Safety Project** The Virginia Department of Transportation (VDOT) is conducting an online survey to assess roadway and pedestrian safety along Route 419 between Starkey Road and Springwood Park Drive in Roanoke County. The study will look at the traffic operations and conditions of the road to consider improvements to turn into applications for transportation funding. **Travelers can take the survey until June 16 to help the study team identify existing issues along the roadways.**

# 2025 ELECTION
---
|
---
---
Don't get complacent, come out and canvass!

There will be an informative discussion on how you can get involved in the campaign, and an opportunity to knock doors. Whether you're new to volunteering or an experienced activist, there are plenty of ways to help Sam win this election!

After the canvass, please join us at the Wasena Park Pavilion at noon to Walk for Democracy!

Sweet Donkey Coffee is located at 2108 Broadway Ave SW.
---

First time canvassing? Don't worry, they'll provide all the training and cheerleading you need. Thank you so much for all of your help and support. Let's win this thing!

Please join the Roanoke City Democratic Committee for this Saturday's Walk For Democracy! **This event will be held at the Wasena Park Brick Shelter starting at 12 noon.** Please come with your Best Democracy Signs and Dress as your "Favorite Democracy Character" - RCDC will be giving prizes for best in show in both categories! Guest speakers include: Sarah Goodman from Red Wine and Blue, Jade Harris from Rural GroundGame, Heather Rose from Radio Free Roanoke, Mike Santos retired educator and author. **This is a ticketed fundraiser.**

# IN OUR COMMUNITY
---
|
---
| |
---
**Del. Rasoul Visits With Students at RAMS! **
---
Roanoke Academy for Math and Science graduated its 5th grade class of 2025 this week! Del. Rasoul had the privilege of spending the morning with the students and congratulating them on their achievements!
---
**Read More**
---
|
---
**Carilion Health Fair on CPR & AED Benefit Awareness - June 7**
---
Carilion and Compress & Shock Partner Against Sudden Cardiac Arrest will be hosting an event with a cardiac arrest survivor to highlight the importance of CPR and AED training. The event is a free all-day health fair with CPR/AED training for registered groups in the New River Valley. Dr. Jack Perkins, founder of Compress & Shock, and a sudden cardiac arrest survivor will also be at the event.
---
[ **Read More** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109042119/549817026/778668814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjZjOGQ3Yy0zMDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPHBqkxPAR6yURUYISiBaX1881WwtdRyJz59Q5jhkek=&emci=3887d913-b63c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=126c8d7c-3042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18273010)

| |

**Virginia's Blue Ridge Restaurant Week**** \- ****June 5-8******
---
It's time for a culinary metro mountain adventure in the Roanoke Region in Virginia's Blue Ridge! The VBR Restaurant Week will feature exciting menus and specials from participating restaurants throughout Virginia's Blue Ridge, which includes the cities of Roanoke and Salem, the towns of Vinton, Rocky Mount, and Boones Mill, and the counties of Botetourt, Franklin, and Roanoke.
---

**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109042120/549817027/1556399436?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjZjOGQ3Yy0zMDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IPHBqkxPAR6yURUYISiBaX1881WwtdRyJz59Q5jhkek=&emci=3887d913-b63c-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=126c8d7c-3042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18273010)

**Afro Beats on the Ave - June****6****
---
Tomorrow from 6-10 pm is Afrobeats On The Ave: Not Your Average Block Party at the Century Plaza (14 Church Ave. SE)! This high-energy celebration is a DJ-curated experience, blending culture, music, and community under the open sky. Whether you're vibing to the beats, dancing in the crowd, or just soaking in the atmosphere, this is Not Your Average block party—it's a full-on vibe.

# CONGRATULATIONS, WFHS & PHHS CLASS OF 2025!
---
Congratulations, Class of 2025! William Fleming High School’s Commencement Ceremony was held on **Thursday, June 5th at 10 am at the Berglund Center**. Patrick Henry High School's Commencement Ceremony will be held on **Friday, June 6th at 10 am at the Berglund Center.** Congratulations, graduates! We are so proud of you and can’t wait to see all that you accomplish next.

# JOIN COMMUNITY BUILDERS PROGRAM
---
Calling All Rising 8th Graders in Roanoke City! Are you ready to build your future, make new friends, and grow as a leader? Join Community Builders this summer for hands-on experiences that will inspire and empower you, with programming that continues throughout the school year.

June 16 – July 17, 2025
James Madison Middle School

Program Highlights:
• Leadership training and motivational experiences
• College tours and career exploration
• Job shadowing and business visits
• Speakers from police, fire, military, healthcare, education
• Academic support and year-round programming

Registration open through June 6!

The study will look at the traffic operations and conditions of the road to consider improvements to turn into applications for transportation funding. Travelers can take the survey until June 16 to help the study team identify existing issues along the roadways. | | | 2025 ELECTION | Don't get complacent, come out and canvass! name: George Latimer

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=RXWbMa0JjZnfrCpYyoGzIosDXywK8yKU09Cg1S85JU4fCJzqrJoXji7PZdPXvnZf2U6%2B6hdBEmSc7KJ5RYgI28u9JtIsXZA9fgGHonOJ%2BmgHDODVtKHju7%2FviHavYyIR3UK53A7sOZURzCcIcAQj%2BzdOMasf30Ejdh4%2FSRVqMXUri0UK51phnUrWZn%2BY4n%2BgwGKhcBcSR1kmUXvzgsqOmoB8amtUqDq%2BjjzrDES2jufAa7%2B2KnHxzLm4jYMjdsfe4Bi5XQNHs33dDCqJQ%2Fd9dtXo9ISNkfsR7sXWbLuihih%2Bs%2BGuHwycRy8awU67iI0WX7slouY5E9QCtfV5uJ9aYG2Th%2FhTWDwrrEWGwNgIcNae1oaHxFsrvUyxz8ATVXosqrYB4%2FR3u3kHh2M6bKbdFxTKgi9TECWrQqk6vnAY%2Bx6orcJUuTiNwd6xTuuMrCTD]

# [#]
Peter, it’s George.

I want to take a moment and thank you for your support for my team and I leading up to our May end-of month fundraising deadline.

These moments prove that the team we’ve built is stronger than ever. We’re not slowing down for even a moment, Peter, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have you by my side.

Together, we’re going to hold the Trump administration accountable, take back the House and keep NY-16 blue in 2026.

And we can’t do it without you.

Forward together,
George

P.S. June is a critical month for us as we face down another FEC reporting deadline Can you help us get off to a strong start to the month by chipping in now? Any amount - even $1 - goes a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-june25?amount=]

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, U.S. Army, Retired
subject: Take off the kid gloves
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| It’s Alex Vindman.

I will always love the Army. I spent more than two decades in uniform. 250 years of dedicated service to freedom and democracy deserves to be celebrated. But this parade - Trump’s birthday parade - is no way to do it.

Especially not when Trump and the GOP are eviscerating the VA, kicking Veterans off their health care and out of their homes, and firing them en masse.

It’s time to take the kid gloves off. I’m proud to work with VoteVets because they are fighting back like no other organization in the country right now. And we need your help.

[****Please, make a donation to VoteVets so we can keep punching back at Trump. If we’re going to derail his agenda, it starts here.****](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25-p.Db1MkM&refcode=em250605-b&t=4&akid=34436%2E3013755%2Eo0NZjh)****[DONATE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25-p.Db1MkM&refcode=em250605-b&t=5&akid=34436%2E3013755%2Eo0NZjh)**** Alexander Vindman

subject: all eyes on GEORGIA - the stakes could NOT be higher
body:
BREAKING OUT OF GEORGIA:
Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.
This isn’t just about one race. It’s about control of the Senate, and whether Trump and his allies can bulldoze their way back to unchecked power.
Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.
We set a goal to raise $60,000 by the end of this month to power organizing in Georgia and defend other vulnerable Senate seats. But we’re still $13,638 behind, and the deadline is in just TWO DAYS. Peter, China just dropped **$500 MILLION** into the World Health Organization, a move designed to buy control over an organization that's already proven it can't be trusted. _**Remember when the WHO parroted CCP lies during COVID, downplaying the virus, shielding its origins, and blocking investigations into the Wuhan lab leak?**_ Now it's even worse: The WHO has ZERO incentive to tell the truth about COVID's origins--or warn us about future pandemics. With China's cash, they're fully owned by the CCP. name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: I can’t thank you enough, Peter
body:
| | Peter,

My team just showed me all of the thoughtful messages and signatures from the birthday card, and I really can’t thank you enough. What a way to celebrate!

I also want to thank you for the outpouring of support ahead of last week’s fundraising deadline, Peter. You always step up when we need it most.

We’re facing another tough re-election battle, Peter. Far-right extremists and special interest groups just launched a fresh round of attack ads misrepresenting my record, and we know they’ll keep doing (and spending) whatever it takes to flip this seat red and kick me out – but I know we have the grassroots power to win again and keep extremism out of Southwest Washington.

What I’m saying is: I’m so glad you’re engaged in this fight. It means a lot to have your support. Fighting for our values in Congress is the honor of a lifetime, and I couldn’t do it without you.

Please be sure to follow us on [X](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109043341/549820393/-1480092370?refcode=MGP_EM_TY_180DO_250605_1_3&refcode2=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWI1ODFkOC0zMjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmbqxTNUffGIoZM_mCBKpx5ILFDXzvibo7sEE_rqc_Y=&emci=d2b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=31138575), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109043342/549820394/-1782450671?refcode=MGP_EM_TY_180DO_250605_1_3&refcode2=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWI1ODFkOC0zMjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmbqxTNUffGIoZM_mCBKpx5ILFDXzvibo7sEE_rqc_Y=&emci=d2b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=31138575), and [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109043343/549820395/-1600346098?refcode=MGP_EM_TY_180DO_250605_1_3&refcode2=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWI1ODFkOC0zMjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmbqxTNUffGIoZM_mCBKpx5ILFDXzvibo7sEE_rqc_Y=&emci=d2b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d5b581d8-3242-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=31138575) so you get the latest updates about our fight for Southwest Washington’s values.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/5/2025
body:
Remember when ‘peaceful protests’ overruled pandemic policy—and unleashed chaos?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Douglas County voters are deciding whether to pursue Home Rule—today's RMV original dives into [BOTH sides of the issue](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, a federal judge has [blocked the deportation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) of the Boulder firebombing suspect’s family as Homeland Security investigates their possible ties to the attack. Meanwhile, _COvid Chronicles_ revisits the chaotic week in 2020 when pandemic restrictions were [tossed aside for mass protests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—setting the stage for years of political double standards.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** A Romanian national has pleaded guilty to a nationwide [“swatting” scheme](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that hit over 75 U.S. officials, exposing new emergency system flaws. Immigration enforcement is also under fire after the Boulder terrorist was found to have [overstayed his visa](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Elon Musk blasted the House-passed “Big Beautiful Bill” as a [“disgusting abomination,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) even as the Trump administration celebrated a [20% drop in the U.S. murder rate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Greg Walcher warns that while [Chinese land buys](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) make headlines, the bigger threat is federal control of 700 million acres. He argues unchecked power from D.C. undermines local autonomy and urges reforms to protect state sovereignty.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, June 5, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[COvid Chronicles May 24–31, 2020: When ‘peaceful protests’ overruled pandemic policy—and unleashed chaos](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The sixth installment of RMV’s COvid Chronicles covers the week Colorado dropped the mask—just not in the way you’d hope. Restrictions vanished for rioters, but stayed in place for students and small businesses. It wasn’t science guiding policy. It was politics. No, it’s not short. Neither was the fallout.
Looking back five years later, it’s hard not to feel for everyday, taxpaying Coloradans. As May 2020 ended, COVID cases dropped, testing surged — and all people wanted was a little common sense.
Instead, they stayed home from work, logged into Zoom again and again, and watched their kids graduate by car window, ski-lift, or rope rappel — masked, of course.
Then they turned on the news. And who were the headlines about? Not employees. Not the sick or elderly. Kids? You kid! This is The Child Sacrifice State, after all — and Colorado’s leaders eagerly traded away children’s well-being for the comfort of able-bodied adults still lounging in lockdown.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ **
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[“Write your own rules?” Douglas County voters to decide if it’s time for Home Rule](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* On June 24, Douglas County voters will decide whether to form a 21-member commission to draft a Home Rule charter that could reshape local governance.
* Supporters argue Home Rule offers fiscal control, education flexibility, and local decision-making power, while critics warn it could lead to government overreach and misunderstood authority.
* In today's article, we explore BOTH sides of the issue. We will continue covering this topic for the rest of the month as it unfolds.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Walcher: It’s not just Chinese farmland—it’s unchecked federal control over 700 million acres](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Interior Secretary Doug Burgum emphasized that federal management of over 700 million acres is a far greater issue than Chinese farmland ownership, affecting entire states and industries—especially in the West.
* The Colorado Constitution explicitly allows property ownership by “foreign aliens,” raising alarms about national security and prompting Walcher to call for stronger federal restrictions to prevent foreign control of resources.
* While 26 states limit foreign land ownership, 19—including Colorado—do not. Walcher argues that without federal action, critical assets near military bases and vital infrastructure remain vulnerable.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hancock: Saving Liberty in an Age of Manufactured Tyranny](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK****| COMMENTARY | JUNE 3** _There is a form of political ventriloquism occurring in America. The left warns, with breathless urgency, that Donald Trump is a dictator in waiting, a Mussolini in a red tie, poised to crush democracy with a golf swing and a sneer._
**[Kalam: Colorado’s Woke Zealotry Ushers Islamist Terror into Boulder](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY AHNAF KALAM | COMMENTARY | JUNE 3** _Just over a week ago, I warned that the shooting of two young Israeli embassy employees in Washington, D.C., by a far-left zealot chanting “Free Palestine” was not an isolated act but a harbinger._
__
**[Montrose Commissioner Pond: Why I’m Drawing the Line and Standing Against Federal Land Grabs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY SEAN POND | COMMENTARY | JUNE 3** _The views expressed here are my own and do not represent an official action or position of the Montrose Board of County Commissioners. I was appointed to represent the people of District 3 in Montrose County, and I took an oath to uphold the Constitution. That includes defending our land, our rights, and our way of life here in Western Colorado._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**📺 DID YOU KNOW?** Americans spend about **three hours a day watching TV** on average. Seniors 65 and older top the charts, tuning in for over four hours daily, while teens and young adults between 15 and 19 watch the least—under two hours a day.
|

---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Better to fight for something than live for nothing." – George S. Patton

clean_body: I won’t let Donald Trump break the law and sweep it under the rug. | It’s incumbent on members of Congress to maintain oversight over immigration detention facilities, Peter. Earlier this week, I joined MSNBC to share just how deplorable conditions are in these facilities. = | = Right now, the oversight and accountability that Members of Congress provide are some of the only mechanisms for accountability that detained migrants have. Donald Trump and his administration have gutted nearly every form of independent oversight of the private corporations that profit off of migrant detention. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with me, Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States ** | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My thoughts on Pride Month?
body:
There’s a difference between freedom and public indecency. It’s time to rethink what we celebrate, and protect our kids.

name: Becca Balint
subject: We must pass the Equality Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109044160/549822964/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA2NTllYy0zNDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGsl0nskq7l6Mghb4lPLfZTkbiRHVRK2wGLjPR52AWY=)
---
Happy Pride Month, Peter. 🏳️🌈 I know that the anxiety and fear within our community feels heightened this year with attacks from every direction, but **I’m determined to make this a joyful month — and I hope you’ll join me.** This month and every month, I’m surrounding myself with people who love and believe in me. I’m fighting in Congress to finally pass the **_Equality Act._** It’s time we codify basic protections for the LGBTQ+ community into federal law. **[If you agree, please sign on to support the _Equality Act_ and help us send a message that NO Americans should be denied opportunities due to who they are or who they love. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109044161/549822965/1514828765?contactdata=w1iLhou4Ciz3CtOnauijITDu9rJdQzYx1lnWBXEAHcUnY4nGpROd1F1lJHHf8665vMyy7NlJqxw93DiEAPQmDanHzbVh04bqT0dgnSJezHWr+vFvAnIyvVEXTrcThz0xW6O5i8lG4+TWVjKxFYOosV3P2BTXG2yAlotyql9xQuI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA2NTllYy0zNDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGsl0nskq7l6Mghb4lPLfZTkbiRHVRK2wGLjPR52AWY=&emci=880659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=930659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)** | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109044162/549822966/1514828765?contactdata=w1iLhou4Ciz3CtOnauijITDu9rJdQzYx1lnWBXEAHcUnY4nGpROd1F1lJHHf8665vMyy7NlJqxw93DiEAPQmDanHzbVh04bqT0dgnSJezHWr+vFvAnIyvVEXTrcThz0xW6O5i8lG4+TWVjKxFYOosV3P2BTXG2yAlotyql9xQuI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA2NTllYy0zNDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGsl0nskq7l6Mghb4lPLfZTkbiRHVRK2wGLjPR52AWY=&emci=880659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=930659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)
---
Being the first LGBTQI+ member of Congress from Vermont, I’ve always been a champion for our community’s civil rights.
Representation in politics _does_ matter. I hear it all the time in my conversations with younger people across Vermont. And representation in politics is what allows us to write better legislation that reflects and protects all Americans.
We know whenever we make progress, the backlash comes. We are in the backlash. Donald Trump and his administration have already launched over 200 attacks that target the LGBTQ+ community. I’ll never stop fighting back against their hate, Peter.
**We must pass the _Equality Act_ to expand federal civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Americans at a time when they’ve never been more at stake. **
**[If you agree, please sign on to support the _Equality Act_ and help us send a message that NO Americans should be denied opportunities due to who they are or who they love. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109044163/549822967/1514828765?contactdata=w1iLhou4Ciz3CtOnauijITDu9rJdQzYx1lnWBXEAHcUnY4nGpROd1F1lJHHf8665vMyy7NlJqxw93DiEAPQmDanHzbVh04bqT0dgnSJezHWr+vFvAnIyvVEXTrcThz0xW6O5i8lG4+TWVjKxFYOosV3P2BTXG2yAlotyql9xQuI=&refcode=AU_RAB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzA2NTllYy0zNDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YGsl0nskq7l6Mghb4lPLfZTkbiRHVRK2wGLjPR52AWY=&emci=880659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=930659ec-3442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=43402272)**

clean_body: | = Happy Pride Month, Peter. 🏳️🌈 I know that the anxiety and fear within our community feels heightened this year with attacks from every direction, but I’m determined to make this a joyful month — and I hope you’ll join me. This month and every month, I’m surrounding myself with people who love and believe in me. I’m fighting in Congress to finally pass the Equality Act. It’s time we codify basic protections for the LGBTQ+ community into federal law. | Being the first LGBTQI+ member of Congress from Vermont, I’ve always been a champion for our community’s civil rights. Representation in politics does matter. I hear it all the time in my conversations with younger people across Vermont. And representation in politics is what allows us to write better legislation that reflects and protects all Americans. We know whenever we make progress, the backlash comes. We are in the backlash. Donald Trump and his administration have already launched over 200 attacks that target the LGBTQ+ community. I’ll never stop fighting back against their hate, Peter. We must pass the Equality Act to expand federal civil rights protections for LGBTQ+ Americans at a time when they’ve never been more at stake. Please try to hold on to things that bring you joy and lightness this month. Don’t let the haters get you down. I’m certainly not. — Becca = mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402
