name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: This is what Republicans in our race are saying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
They are fully embracing Trump’s tariffs that raise our costs.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39781%2E3422442%2EChAtZ_)
Dear Derek,
At a candidate forum last night, the top two Republicans running for California governor made clear that they 100% stand behind Donald Trump’s harmful economic agenda.
They both defended Trump’s tariff chaos—with one of them even saying that people need to “just wait and see what happens.”
**California families can’t afford to wait and see.** We need leaders at all levels of government to work urgently to bring costs down. Instead, Trump’s tariffs move us in exactly the wrong direction.
Californians deserve a governor who is clear-eyed about the harm Trump is doing to families’ financial stability and unequivocal about calling it out.
**Derek, with nearly half of California voters saying they would consider voting for a Republican to be governor, we can’t take anything for granted.[Can you chip in $5, so we have the resources to expose for voters that California Republicans are doubling down on Donald Trump’s tariffs raising prices for families?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250605_1_ak?refcode=em20250605-39781&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39781_3422442_ChAtZ_&akid=39781%2E3422442%2EChAtZ_)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250605_1_ak?refcode=em20250605-39781&refcode2=39781_3422442_ChAtZ_&akid=39781%2E3422442%2EChAtZ_)
Thanks,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250605-39781&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39781_3422442_ChAtZ_&akid=39781%2E3422442%2EChAtZ_)**

subject: The track we’re on

Hi friend,

**If you support President Trump and want to send him more reinforcements in Congress, then please read this:**

I’m not a politician. I’m a composer. But I care too much about the direction of this country not to jump into the fight to save it.

**That’s why I’m running for Nevada’s targeted 3rd Congressional District, why I’m seeking President Trump’s endorsement in my race,[and why I’m asking you to join me in this fight.](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xVXPwY4n3M5kgW1v7GFMG7kFmDSfnFemZdbvwWjaUkBGh9S2TUcqo_RpYF2bheQSu5bhJCXOFQTv3EjiSU0lTs-WhBfdhOyqLFC-4sSwrIdFGGVEWx5uo9FG2lef49h7iVc504dkFs6_tcWowUoz_Tk%3D)**

[ ** JOIN MARTY » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xd7BCAjWH_5kjai-rOX-IBwPZAFF8mlxIfe6UC9qzKI161kzxZyylG0Cxxba4FF70ZszSykDBObfo-UZxoGwL8fhepT-L9Aazx2AmLjyTYGmx0CiFsu6HogCtPvP_vmiKBsyrVFfo4DsZ2MLivY5e5s%3D)
If you’re a fan of mine from my video game days, then you’ll know everything I’m about to tell you. But if you are just now getting to know me on this political journey, then let me reintroduce myself.

**I’m Marty O’Donnell, and even if you don’t recognize my name,_I bet you know some of my work._**

In the early days of my career as a composer, my business partner and I did numerous film scores and produced the iconic jingles, ‘We are Flintstone Kids...’ and ‘Mr. Clean, Mr. Clean.’

It was fun, but I decided I wanted to switch it up. So, I accepted a position at a small video game developer called Bungie as the Audio Director and Composer. It was here that I did the audio and music for the Halo video game series, _which sold more than eighty-one million copies and has been played billions of times._

My final project with Bungie was Destiny, where I had the honor of collaborating with Sir Paul McCartney to compose and produce an orchestral suite.

Through my work, it has been my humble blessing to have provided the soundtrack for the youth of millions worldwide.

**But the track I’m concerned with now is that of my country...**

This past November, the American people spoke loud and clear that they were DONE with the track liberal, Washington politicians had put us on, and they wanted off.

**With President Trump now back in the White House and Republicans in full control of Congress, they’ve been working to right the ship and get America back on the RIGHT track.**

But, sadly, there are still those working hard to derail us once again – and one of them is Congresswoman **Susie Lee** , whom I am now running against to defeat in NV-03.

This is one of just THIRTEEN Congressional seats in the entire country that President Trump won in 2024, but is still represented by a Democrat in the House...

[**I need your help to fix that.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xUnK28QXZQTe_6vHSLTaMYdjcT4pQVJBC2JY9b5Yn6pnVwdBUPkfo2QDtVda9hBYvPjHPbp2bEiqphPsi_FQzZtXexd0UUHArp8G2fCIXPSwAdCO7Bio9_b1F-xhJwLhottl4PYhBo0PNPVViLu0ks0%3D)

Susie Lee is the darling of the Washington, D.C. political and special interest machine, and if she gets her way, we’ll reopen our borders to illegal crossings, weaken our standing on the world stage, let wokeism run amock, and allow corrupt Big Government to resume micro-controlling our lives and laundering our tax dollars.

I am in this fight to help President Trump and Republicans in Congress restore sanity and accountability in Washington, and ensure security, prosperity & freedom in our country.

**We can’t let corrupt radical politicians like Susie Lee and her allies take us back down the path of America’s imminent demise.**

As one of just thirteen Trump+ Democrat-held seats, NV-03 is one of the nation’s top-priority seats to flip in the midterms so we can build a leftist-proof House Majority.

**But that will also make it one of the most competitive and expensive, and I can’t win this without your help.**

[**I’m asking you to help us get this ship off the ground by chipping in $7, $28, $117, or anything you can today.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xWM8CSzVqE0Iz99SVahWWX1vvxH9Oopg5U-UoiFo8Wu_n2D3StGZm0wndjZoOq_cQapScWdIUnDz_eBrcubOaQr3Ds3l1E7okjb86FHN_Nc0-wH9DoTKXIoRq1ImhkOGoQcbID9Ehi4qbk3e4eIdKNM%3D)

This is an all-hands-on-deck race, and how we start off is largely going to determine how we finish.

[**If you support President Trump and want to send him more reinforcements in Congress, then please chip in today to support our fight.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xcVxvBN3ayYkZ_5q6cX6HRXEm5KjxOTltWLgNxvytlE0jBcbDlCKi0XyiHFazlvtXFwX_Rf6DJAFVJ0Qa2pkRrl_S71AukUTZm8eQIKhE-tCMbC6zONhm6r4Fi6_uB7leYBq1yopdifTs7yKa0132o0%3D)

Thank you!

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for NV-03

[ ** STAND WITH MARTY » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=aa52f015115748dc9701e7f6ae19b70f&_e=G52x3EKJmajGFRYpY9RoCDy9HRfkzdYcogSmGQpfbL79zC3EknXOAhou1f3rKJej9kRZu9KxmfWSqU85AQH0h9PEKhEsEmx6BEgDDtel0piw99qB6YeLDh1ek_60mbIQezQv_C_evXpTg-bOK6TziGOkWie7H-d3T4MhMNbrZItmagbo1mgJ1eMClAm_P3pQmFy3BtFcQRfj04tiOohkENqhPMipWJiu1bI9p3TVEWm5rKCkkuNcqhekmr8AdEqJBo5HESbnbrU7C5V79fm5xd94i5giDPuMjxWIGhe7-VVi5qqEBl0Ow39tmp4Am0_00VGFCL9DywQx0bfL7V-bTP3LrrHGvtSo2b-EpMKMxezy8DR6tf0ZiH_5marB6XrBxc3Zi5SivAgEyktzsTwLsBRanLEBcQmkMWc0jzWRcjg%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jelushyc9i1rrvr2oi7ozyhw0zd8axg9j5yfizhwz6tzwg3zm05zswju479smgf9dgfry964tatmx0p8i7jbfwf8f7hkmcp3n9bn3c8rya3z3sz0qkj9s6ua8ua22czsqbwa3oc160vx3h7r2ipy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jelushyc9i1rrvr2oi7ozyhwmmfaipe4b2g9xg97fv3ur4fx07efz4q0mcp5ds8nzdhdyexlwonxj433bp1xs72lu4aj7aa380w5k891l455qqo7si0i364jjrjlvw70clm0hfp1129mxwmc0wfy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxea6x&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Fellow Conservative,

I just want to get to the point, cut out any gimmicks, and give you a real, honest assessment of our situation.

The first five months of President Trump’s second term have been an unqualified success -- rolling back the Left’s radical woke agenda, restoring order at our Southern Border, and rebuilding our economy.

Unfortunately, the blowback from the Left has been unprecedented. Democrats have shattered fundraising records and have coordinated with the Leftist media to win races in multiple battleground special elections.

If this trend continues, Republicans in what were believed to be safe House races are in serious trouble. That includes me.

_**I’ll be blunt about our situation.**_ It’s not enough for President Trump and Republicans to have a winning record. We URGENTLY need the resources and funding to get our winning message to every single voter who’ll decide the outcome of the 2026 election.

[**That’s why I’m asking for your support to defend this Republican seat.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b171a87562e14ee2aabf3b9308f9f657&_e=yVS_-dpttxVGwhjjK4g5IeIUefVQGgEv5OxJ26t-hxV90innI4pcV7d6BLiX48btriBf7rg6e2FcEvtvNB7Ios5Jpli93OCx2-LBRdVeAqLcjmKD3u72aerarrRfLKyW_2GVUvVoLTHtkS2fXSm2XU-z-QRMP-aVXUxq_G5kGdLCdFrq9sOkK3mj3zEQqw0BF7fyRi9bMOPu9AbCOdPRfX-afP68hshOoenK9qHsTNWfoQLo6lOsmfpvdL4p6egmhQg67Iw1Hv62S01GHhh_fRxuPpZNZCFK8GG3dREldHjXfDFGB8z1CorWcr-J3S4W3j0xxCcF_tKZ9pgN934zoG4O4d39VQ7FGW22UHNSzDVzCZrCI3k-NJtcwOCZcAiD_p0l6eU3AXeFOmYKOUBoUg%3D%3D) Your support will build an aggressive campaign infrastructure that’ll remind voters everything President Trump and our Republican Majority have done to make their lives better.

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/rSNQBhJbxJ8tPFXLNlo_F8ydsnBDEyVFX_7lUggZoszTO_tpVI_9DEekqTv8hQiRfDyjQr5uUt_VmfI6yo_KYLr0mzJXdq4oCk5QLHEirsme8SlwTQWKvlGa1Q3A4WKZCQlwyF_8jO2b9k99klKhB5E8cIxFJMbfp9O-4-B9Yf50b5S6c7bVqNU5piurSwiRdmX4vFRfynnbbBTxH5cB7gkBKQHsAXQZrzG9kxrxwYjdqQ4WeIYCqwUg6x6T3B_R5gCwvWQieWIWJXM_nism8AzkqMr_ustAlI1mi2eym9yAHW7kpnjckgPZpHxnlyfblBZalFN7wN0aVM9VtKNKfKG22KT1K2SeM8qoH36BaaetTLdt4t7SFlvkz1gvVw2XUeEJBxYxL4Ek9l25QmWTS7jCXQzikANm1aQr43S1U0b0anowTHSUBJ-CutgopQ/DyMKy9OP3xJM8G-Q9cqK9DlSEx5CDSA4/9) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the revival of the rule of law in America. **We have an opportunity to reverse the horrendous weaponization of the Department of Justice. This is our chance to right the wrongs of the past few years.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the previous administration used the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dared to stand up for our constitutional liberties. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue.

Your responses will help Hillsdale improve its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including teaching citizens about the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. You can complete the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** by using the link below: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/Z3hqAgrLJPir4YhGObosM8cMC_GJFNqOeKKXKSWO-8lluAmfUA7Ag4RPT9aJVHQfZ8gjKTncQz6_QNPSemEADyvzKMG6KIJfNDlNLPVcmXFtpBBPVBVYfvlmS5Tc-3nMkQsbTPgvJbbjukdHfsmlvlxBi-sG79Cu4Ebj90suUOBng3x0sh-6TzRyrLTR-Gu9MLMLtuyKkqNI55OA_PR2piBjbV25JX_Me-pZldtcvCeoWxkJfoU5BdVt5RO3DBMjkJYG0wUeMMmCV-r2Hb5nQhJ43LilelHi_7Vbxt10c9-UK_qi7h3tdkhxJ78BqjUg5sHufOHXj6mrRauaW2ti4Ht6Q00L6gptnqTkhLcSwfdh9st_BMc79L_Q8ivUyYjdVzJzEN_UL_boubdI2E4ZitzL9wep_02bLrV7n4WEL6NKspmLUxcw7VaJovhCIQ/4YgyKR-DEWyhnHJQM6DLipBd6V6TsNRE/9)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** , and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet, the ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people. Over the last few years, we have experienced a constant attack on our rights--on the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, on due process, on gun ownership, and more. **Today, we are returning to what Abraham Lincoln in his Gettysburg Address called a "government of the people, by the people, for the people."** **That means we have an opportunity to make sure that the weaponization of government _never_ happens again in this country.** Hillsdale College is a leader in this fight--we are **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens with the **truth** about America's great heritage of liberty. We are working to expand our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
****

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.7 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
****

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
****

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've experienced over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So, please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept **even one penny** of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/AJZAPTc5Mi7wzqIHkMeM-p_w-S7CPziBuWCwmswFVKC3spdFuZdb0_0B49HINiFe3EfG7Il7kRVoNAy_CIud_5mVnFL8U1iiAjo-cDJhpRB6ndZiO4hi1hhEmy8Wy34AN96XXjYa5s6GMG0lwdQLboPigQBSBKhZnFnPPdyYeLYyZLsjTPmB5hKq4h2FKdBe7dkHk0wlhkM0gapoSpa-oYFCYs5wpt09OEwp5T5oDZVx3CONEq4jJsHDdpVp9GBqMYVT2BvfezvrXNZ5NetXVylr4orsUlTXFlagBKJ1wEDKmZwQiW2dkA7KEJycd-EwJsfFt4eM1LZbTMhdphUeEhi7Ops5b0JhMpG-s5JO6dJUAhpbjRL4jth6GFNG2U151G7s893PKegrIm-ATdLezXz41AZ1s6xwJf_cxGjQsFDP3PPnLVqKd29A0JBbQQ/ke2eJQoq_7YqEluc5OWwOEeMgKPIGbdB/9)** Thank you for your time and attention. name: John Fetterman
subject: they're trying to shut down Planned Parenthood – again 🤦
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10127%2E434096%2EN2eiXN)
| | |
---
Derek, Republicans put a sneaky line in Trump's so-called "Big Beautiful Bill" to try to shut down Planned Parenthood by blocking Medicaid from covering care at Planned Parenthood health clinics.

Seems like the millionth time they've tried to do something like this 🙄 – and they're hiding their efforts because they know how deeply unpopular it is to come after Planned Parenthood.
Republicans like to muddy the waters, so I want to be clear:
**1\. It’s not about saving money – it costs more.
** The Congressional Budget Office says “defunding” Planned Parenthood would increase the deficit by $300 million. Why? Because Planned Parenthood provides basic health care that saves Americans money long-term.
**2\. Planned Parenthood isn’t getting handouts.
** They’re reimbursed for care – just like any clinic – when patients use Medicaid for cancer screenings, birth control, STI testing, and other preventive care.
**3\. Federal dollars don’t fund abortion – period.
** Since 1977, the Hyde Amendment has barred federal funds from covering abortion, except in rare cases. Republicans' proposed cuts only affect the basic health care millions rely on.
For many Pennsylvanians, Planned Parenthood is their only provider. Without affordable access to health care, thousands will face the impossible choice between their health and other basic needs – all while Republicans’ rich friends get even richer from their massive tax breaks.
We need to sound the alarm. **[If you’re able, will you chip in a few bucks to help fight back?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51312?t=2&akid=10127%2E434096%2EN2eiXN)** We have to show Republicans we’re not backing down.
Thanks for standing with me,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk120-fr-fl-footer&t=3&refcode2=10127_434096_N2eiXN&akid=10127%2E434096%2EN2eiXN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Was it worth it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The most important question of all.
Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G3hHZE_-QhReXi1JVqJUKqiqWxnbAyCYhDjH06SsozXbmmzmfjo5d8M1NIblAAAdvEwJA5T8EcN7m2F-OcfUyA9Ly2Vm8R37fwv8nOsIEn4zehvMmLr5eF2m1X_tjqN5GOuHDrXMT_AwtXNQ-3Kdyia0qG0sYdopKVlEm50DwQRnOm2o3r0phGS2JYVRqZ6V1pmqkoYC9AgKcCMLpHCgTBZFSaG60ZVJIaCxi5JFT6Oh6bzRNQ9Z937axMG3EQR2GoUsPsRpBnfu2OF1McJf0e2baiKB-KiOoRwT15jtnd_1M4wcq60dp5ZJEF_x1F9a4V7bLPgSfhESM7P_e4FHBTwAAAP__k4pwIw)

| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE2PmzAQhn-NuYHM-IscODRFVNV222p7WO0pcuxx4ggDMTgo_74CoVyfeTTzvqPD2Hn3rIk6EoCrtxMBIOwbAbh_LSGmW3j7kQMdRH6Xv4NYp_B9Vx_wknujv7r7v3D8_Hmc3i4f_tYd3h_lS5-fI77k_WiBQftuparJbM2cpTzDulT8UHJVAc2u9ZlyrBwDI7hAbvBstDUIjrqzqiQ_Z74GCoJKKsoKSi4LqpTUwmjLlVTgLOF0u1PogNEbXU7zomMchlCYIWRdfZ3ncdqCtQTaCU2KWCy-j2hXg0Abk33mF586r3ufu4hoh5C71NtcHTTT1mkCLUhRWQbmoBwXrBTrPtamOZyMDqP2l56wZg_LCMh1EtD6FAhr9ldscBpSNEhY8_F5Ou7MDP2M_UxY8-fX-98dzhjDtlOy6rTEMou1HRffdX6SinB62XqvLR81_A8AAP__IDqWaw)
---
Patriot,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE2PmzAQhn-NuYHM-IscODRFVNV222p7WO0pcuxx4ggDMTgo_74CoVyfeTTzvqPD2Hn3rIk6EoCrtxMBIOwbAbh_LSGmW3j7kQMdRH6Xv4NYp_B9Vx_wknujv7r7v3D8_Hmc3i4f_tYd3h_lS5-fI77k_WiBQftuparJbM2cpTzDulT8UHJVAc2u9ZlyrBwDI7hAbvBstDUIjrqzqiQ_Z74GCoJKKsoKSi4LqpTUwmjLlVTgLOF0u1PogNEbXU7zomMchlCYIWRdfZ3ncdqCtQTaCU2KWCy-j2hXg0Abk33mF586r3ufu4hoh5C71NtcHTTT1mkCLUhRWQbmoBwXrBTrPtamOZyMDqP2l56wZg_LCMh1EtD6FAhr9ldscBpSNEhY8_F5Ou7MDP2M_UxY8-fX-98dzhjDtlOy6rTEMou1HRffdX6SinB62XqvLR81_A8AAP__IDqWaw)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $100,000 I need to cover the costs to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE2PmzAQhn-NuYHM-IscODRFVNV222p7WO0pcuxx4ggDMTgo_74CoVyfeTTzvqPD2Hn3rIk6EoCrtxMBIOwbAbh_LSGmW3j7kQMdRH6Xv4NYp_B9Vx_wknujv7r7v3D8_Hmc3i4f_tYd3h_lS5-fI77k_WiBQftuparJbM2cpTzDulT8UHJVAc2u9ZlyrBwDI7hAbvBstDUIjrqzqiQ_Z74GCoJKKsoKSi4LqpTUwmjLlVTgLOF0u1PogNEbXU7zomMchlCYIWRdfZ3ncdqCtQTaCU2KWCy-j2hXg0Abk33mF586r3ufu4hoh5C71NtcHTTT1mkCLUhRWQbmoBwXrBTrPtamOZyMDqP2l56wZg_LCMh1EtD6FAhr9ldscBpSNEhY8_F5Ou7MDP2M_UxY8-fX-98dzhjDtlOy6rTEMou1HRffdX6SinB62XqvLR81_A8AAP__IDqWaw)

clean_body: The most important question of all. Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet! | Patriot, Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it. Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth? These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are still attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the TRUTH remains... ...Being an enemy of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT! So yes, Patriot. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it. When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris regime did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS. My resolve NEVER wavered, and that’s all thanks to you! Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like YOU. But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts. And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own. Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along... This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry. That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man. I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in your hands. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Dear Peter,
---
Five years ago, in the midst of a global pandemic, we heard the call of the Lord and stepped out in bold faith. What many thought would be a season marked by fear, isolation, and death, God turned into a season of revival and awakening. It began with a powerful march and worship gathering on the Golden Gate Bridge—and what was expected to be a one-time moment became a nationwide movement. __This Friday_ , June 6th at 7PM, we’re gathering on the rooftop of Fearless Church LA to celebrate FIVE YEARS of salvations, baptisms, bold worship, and revival across America!_ But we’re not done—far from it. We believe God is just getting started, and this next season could be the most powerful yet. That’s why we’re continuing to raise our voices and take a stand for righteousness from coast to coast. As we celebrate in Los Angeles, we are also mobilizing for the next battlefront in Denver, Colorado, where the fight for families is intensifying. _This Sunday_ , June 8th at 3PM, we’ll gather on the steps of the Colorado State Capitol to rally for families and Biblical truth. The passage of HB25-1312 is a direct attack on parental rights, enabling activist judges to override the God-given role of parents. It’s wrong, it’s dangerous, and it’s why we must take a stand. Join us in Denver as we declare that God’s design for the family will not be erased and that the next generation will be protected and empowered.
---

| Whoa: Did you hear the question that Cory Booker traveled all the way to California to ask us? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109048117/549835914/-992087231?refcode=20250605_FR_45DO_Booker&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTMxZTg3ZC0zYjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4nWGNcDQddSWfzNah93HbTK8bOe4c15ZiZFi3JH4JYE=) Cory Booker didn’t come to California to take a sunny vacation. He came to mobilize and inspire us to keep up the work of flipping swing districts and winning back the U.S. House. **And here are the questions that he asked us:** _California, will you stand up?_ _Will you hold up your light? Will you watch out for your neighbor? Will you stand up for health care?_ _Will you stand up to Donald Trump?_ **_If you stand, if we stand, [...] we shall overcome!_** Cory Booker’s speech has ENERGIZED Democrats across California, and Republicans see the impact of his powerful call to action. That’s why, in the hours after the speech, the GOP launched a salvo of attacks against Cory Booker to try to diminish the impact of his powerful speech. **[But we aren’t going to let them succeed. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2287%2E135344%2EGIjpua)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250605-1&refcode2=2287.135344.GIjpua&t=2&akid=2287%2E135344%2EGIjpua)
---
Team —
I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success.
**I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.** This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
**Team, it’s why I first decided to run for office.**
In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love, then I had to run toward the crisis.
It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades.
**But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do.**
I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term.
**But I know I can do more as New Jersey's governor. And that’s why I decided to run.**
By winning this seat, we can build more homes to reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid.
But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And our opponents are benefiting from millions of dollars in spending from outside entities. So I am asking:
[**Will you consider splitting $5 or whatever you can between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin as we head into the final stretch before the June 10 election?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250605-1&t=3&akid=2287%2E135344%2EGIjpua)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Elissa Slotkin and Mikie Sherrill instantly:_

Mikie

Solicitations made by Elissa Slotkin are limited by Federal law. As a Federal candidates and officeholder she is soliciting only donations of up to $3300 per election from individuals and up to $5000 per election from multi-candidate political committees. She are not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labororganizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks.

Peter,

This is Kevin, Vice President at GOP Membership Services. I’m personally reaching out to update you on the status of your GOP Membership. **According to our records, your status as a GOLD Member is EXPIRING at midnight.**

subject: This administration is doing everything to undo all the progress Democrats have made to fight for our planet.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Today is World Environment Day, sign on >> [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109048260/549836320/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgzNzNjNS0zYjQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I0sBI-JNuLOPGn3dNGQO3ka7p1XxkiV_qZoT36o_wGs=&emci=5f46e4df-7b41-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=a18373c5-3b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15820338)

Today is World Environment Day— _and we’re sounding the alarm, Peter._

The progress we've made to protect our planet is under direct attack. The Trump administration is unraveling years of hard-fought victories by Democrats to safeguard our environment and our future.

Big Oil insiders are being handed cabinet positions, environmental protection programs that protect our air and water are being slashed, and critical funding and personnel are being cut by the Department of Energy—all under the false promise of saving money.

_But what does that really mean for us here at home?_ It means wildfire prevention funding—which is vital to keeping our communities safe—is being gutted. It means the safeguards that protect our forests, our air, and our water are vanishing. It means the long-term health and safety of our district, our families, and our children are on the line. **This is about more than just the environment...**

This is about protecting the place we call home.

Our future depends on the action we take right NOW. We have a moral responsibility to leave a cleaner, greener, and safer world for the next generation, and Kim is doing everything she can to fight back against Trump's reckless anti-American agenda, but she can't do it without your voice. name: Republican Party of Nebraska
subject: Your Weekly Update from the NEGOP 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]()
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2e0b33001488/your-weekly-update-from-the-negop?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1551ee3da1&e=25844e23a8)
| | | | | Peter,
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Letter from the Chair
---
| _Hi Everyone,_
_As the poet/songwriter Bob Dylan said, “The times they are a’changin.” Our corner of the world here in Nebraska is no different. We are gearing up for what promises to be an exciting 2026 election cycle with four of our five congressional offices up for election and all our state-wide constitutional officers on the ballot as well as so many other positions._
_The weeks have been flying by as I’ve taken on the responsibilities of the NEGOP Chairmanship. I thank all of you who supported my candidacy and those who now support my tenure. Working daily in the NEGOP office has certainly helped me to get a handle on the operations relatively quickly, but now it is time for the real work to begin of making plans for electing platform Republicans in 2026 and growing the party’s electorate. Data will be a key component of our success and my experience and knowledge managing data will come in handy._
_Another major goal that I had coming into the Chairmanship is to reach a détente between the various groups within our party. We have a much better chance at achieving our primary goals if we work together and not separately. How successful will my efforts be? That answer depends not on me, but on what all of you as members of the Republican Party decide to do or not do. I will keep reaching out from the NEGOP headquarters and from across the state fostering relationships and listening to concerns. The lights are on, and the door is always open._
_Mary Jane Truemper_ _Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party_
---
|
---
|
# What’s Happening...
---
| This week, the NEGOP joined Governor Jim Pillen, Senator Kathleen Kauth, a coalition of strong state senators, and several local and national organizations for the signing of the “Stand With Women Act” into law. This critical legislation ensures that girls in Nebraska have the opportunity to compete on a level playing field in school sports. By protecting the integrity of women’s athletics, Nebraska continues to lead with common sense, fairness, and a firm commitment to safeguarding opportunities for the next generation of young women.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# End of Session
---
| The 109th session of the Nebraska legislature adjourned sine die mid-biennium, meaning it concluded its current session without setting a date to reconvene. The session ended with applause and lots of smiles on the senate floor from all Senators. There were no last-minute accusations of who held up progress among senators and even an upbeat address from Governor Pillen. In the Governor’s address he stated “we said no when we needed to and put to use idle pillowcase money when needed”. Speaker Arch expressed mixed emotions, gratitude for work accomplished, but disappointed they couldn’t do more. In my opinion, key takeaways included:
* Early adjournment due to only 3 bills remaining for debate so no need for buffer week
* Successfully balancing the budget
* Several conservative policies passed
* Speaker Arch streamlined debate due to 106 priority bills being designated
* Legislation protecting kids and women passed
* Republican Senators secured all but one committee chair appointment

Fondly, JeanneDirector of Government Relations
---
|
---

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=387%2E181023%2EQL0vnd)
Voting is more than a fundamental right, team. It’s your voice.
It’s how you shape the future of the world we live in, advocate for the changes you want to see, and hold leaders accountable.
That’s why protecting the right to vote is one of Jocelyn’s top priorities. As Secretary of State, she worked tirelessly to ensure that every Michigander’s voice was heard — overseeing the highest turnout and most transparent elections in Michigan’s history.
And as Michigan’s next governor, she’ll fight back against Donald Trump and his Republican allies who are doing everything they can to silence the voices of millions of Americans who deserve to be heard.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2506-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=387%2E181023%2EQL0vnd)
**[Jocelyn is running to continue her fight to ensure Michigan’s elections remain free, transparent, and secure for everyone. If you support her work to make it easier to vote and harder to cheat, can you add your name to our petition today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2506-right-to-vote?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=387%2E181023%2EQL0vnd)**

---
Thank you!
— Team Benson

**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps Democratic candidates compete. **Reason #3:** **With the GOP pushing their extreme agenda nationwide, your $7 donation is even more important.** [Donate $7 today to help state Democrats compete against Republicans’ multi-million dollar fundraising haul. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDqV2bKIMRGsvIJOaErTgze0lctn5zpGE0306PYGYJ7vuDroCWfBgaiSDpzGaMQf538iskinLBZ4xLU2yMMjiuEw8SuGKxCz_N0PM3on3ZMGFfVrF-hIWyE1A2CX0E3_0io9HcdGZcayxndKEjmmM_fiHIc7FQxnuPWC1dobIMlhAD5jRn8JQdNfhueSE2_xbPPCtoapuEAuV9xUjQhkfBISu27ns6ZHyyy488mopinTjOOjqzjQhUvsn6XsOiKZGgMTdhJOKrlSj2sVID2vjlUij6JuOdi32ngkwLmWTfoZ_V9c0wB-f4HoN3gGh-X9m9j0qRceeBSZij7bVyAYhEfqHqkbl5ylXHB42DOS-yrro/4h3/JekqheUEQbCnK_mXav_3oA/h0/h001.QROQPnCpujqsWw-qVvkBpk1h1FIes02Lb_lwVVFIDxg) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Looks like Trump’s approval rating is already underwater in Ohio, and the current is only getting stronger...

According to a new poll from Bowling Green State University, more Ohioans now _disapprove_ of Donald Trump than approve — a major shift in a state he carried by 11 points just last cycle.

**This is great news for Democrats — and it’s our chance to flip the script in Ohio. But we can’t do it without your help._[Can you rush a donation to tell Trump we’re tired of his destruction?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109050473/549844081/14197196?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_Underwater_250605_T1_1_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQwNmMzZC00MDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GiY7xNcG1cq35Lr0ekxdPeS2q2jU888a-3hqzsqnW0=) _**

The numbers are clear: Trump’s policies — especially his reckless tariffs — are _hurting_ working Ohioans. Two-thirds of voters in the poll said those tariffs will benefit big corporations and the wealthy while leaving small businesses, labor unions, and the middle class behind.

And it’s not just independents who are breaking away — even Republicans are fed up. **That means we have an opportunity.** But if we want to turn this shift into real wins next year, we need to organize early and secure the resources we need to help our candidates across the state run winning campaigns.

[_**It’s not going to be easy, considering Ohio Republicans have the backing of Trump’s billionaire allies. clean_body: we’re not surprised. | = Team, Looks like Trump’s approval rating is already underwater in Ohio, and the current is only getting stronger... According to a new poll from Bowling Green State University, more Ohioans now disapprove of Donald Trump than approve — a major shift in a state he carried by 11 points just last cycle. This is great news for Democrats — and it’s our chance to flip the script in Ohio. But we can’t do it without your help.= The numbers are clear: Trump’s policies — especially his reckless tariffs — are hurting working Ohioans. Two-thirds of voters in the poll said those tariffs will benefit big corporations and the wealthy while leaving small businesses, labor unions, and the middle class behind. And it’s not just independents who are breaking away — even Republicans are fed up. That means we have an opportunity. But if we want to turn this shift into real wins next year, we need to organize early and secure the resources we need to help our candidates across the state run winning campaigns. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

**_CBS NEWS_ \- “Army anniversary parade on Trump's birthday could cost up to $45 million”** Yes, you read that right. Trump is using the U.S. military to throw himself a lavish birthday parade — straight out of the authoritarian playbook — and it’s expected to cost **_tens of millions_** in taxpayer dollars. While Trump rails against so-called “wasteful spending,” he’s greenlighting a multi-million-dollar military parade to celebrate **_himself_**. All while he and House Republicans push a bill slashing Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security — and his reckless tariffs drive up prices for working families across the country and here in Georgia. This isn’t just vanity — it’s a warning sign. We can’t ignore the threat. [That’s why we’re calling on 5,000 Georgians to speak out and demand Trump call off this dangerous, authoritarian display. I know you receive a lot of emails from my team and me – but that’s because every donation made to an email like this one makes a real difference. It helps my team and me figure out exactly what kind of resources we’ll have moving forward. These early investments now go so much further than they would a year from now. They decide whether we can hire more staff, recruit more volunteers, or run more ads.

Because the reality is: this might be my most expensive reelection race yet. The more I lead the fight against Trump and his reckless administration, the more we need to be prepared that he’ll target my seat... and enlist his billionaire allies to help him do it.

Your donation today will make all the difference in our fight to overcome the barrage of GOP money coming my way.

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: The Biggest Cut to Healthcare in American History
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100170109.172412.6&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14582)
#
# **Republicans Voted for the Biggest Cut to Healthcare in American History**
_**The Republican Big, Ugly Bill includes huge cuts to healthcare, food assistance, and student loan support ...and a big tax handout for the wealthiest in our country.**_ In late May, Republicans in Washington voted to move forward with what they are calling a "Big, Beautiful Bill" to make massive cuts to healthcare, food assistance, student loan support, good paying jobs, and a lot more. Everything about this bill is ugly, including that the cuts are being used to provide the richest in our country a huge tax giveaway.
* * *
**This Republican plan is literally taking from the 99% to give to the 1%.** **** **No state has the capacity to cover the devastation of these cuts. ****[Visit our website to learn more about what 's included in the big, ugly bill.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14583)**
* * *
[Click on the video below to hear from Senator Hughes about what's happening in Washington DC.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14584) [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14585)
* * *
**It's Time to Get Activated** The bill is now being negotiated and debated in the US Senate. Republican Senators have said [they're aiming to have the bill fully passed and sent to President Trump's desk by July 4th.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14586) **Take Action:**
1. Call US Senators Fetterman and McCormick and let them know you do not support the big, ugly bill
* Senator Fetterman: 215-241-1090
* Senator McCormick: 215-405-9660
2. Share information about this bill and how harmful it will be with five of your friends, family, or neighbors. It's important for the entire community to be educated about the decisions lawmakers are making in Washington.
3. Share your personal story. Make a video, write an essay, or connect with local advocacy groups to see if your story can help in the fight to stop this bill. When Republicans tried to overturn the Affordable Care Act, the overwhelming voice of the people and our personal stories are what made the difference.
4. Stay informed by following our channels on [Facebook](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14587), [Instagram](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14588), [Tiktok](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14589), [Bluesky](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14591), and [Twitter](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14574).
5. Keep fighting, don't lose hope, and stay informed! We can win on this issue, if we keep going and stay engaged.

[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14588)
* * *
**When We Fight, We Win** **** [Senator Hughes is not backing down on this fight](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14576). He's doing everything he can at the state level to sound the alarm and push back against these disastrous cuts. [On Monday, he joined Democratic colleagues from the Senate and House](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100170109.172412.6&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14577) to continue speaking out against the big ugly bill. Senator Hughes said: We are part of a coalition of state legislators from across the country who are calling out the big, ugly bill and the damage it will do to our constituents. There is no state in the country who has the capacity to cover the cuts that are included in this bill. The United States is the richest country in the world. We should be having a conversation about how to expand healthcare, education support, food support for families, and jobs that pay better wages, but instead we're forced to talk about this big, ugly bill. Pennsylvania's elected Senators and Representatives, Republicans and Democrats alike, have a responsibility to condemn the cuts in this bill. It's time for our state Republican colleagues to speak up. It's time for them to join Democrats in calling out the impact these cuts will have on Pennsylvania families and communities. At this critical inflection point, every single Pennsylvania legislator should be working together to stop these cuts, regardless of our party affiliation. \- Senator Hughes
* * *
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

---

2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778

Senate Box 203007
Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007
Phone: 717.787.7112
Fax: 717.772.0579

clean_body: While Biden hid, a machine signed the orders. This was never legitimate. | | | | Friend! While Sleepy Joe Biden napped, his handlers took the wheel. He couldn’t speak clearly, he couldn’t walk straight, he couldn’t lead a parade — let alone a country. Now we find out he wasn’t even signing the documents! Instead of Biden putting pen to paper, they used a machine. It’s called an autopen. Because if a machine signed it, Biden didn’t. And if Biden didn’t, it’s not real. It’s not legal. It should be null and void. The American people were scammed. I warned everyone. I told you Biden was a puppet. I told you someone else was running the country. And once again — I was 100 percent right. ** Thank you for your attention to this matter, President Donald J. subject: Union-Backed. Anti-Business. Totally Radical.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Property owners and contractors could be sued for someone else’s mistake. Take the poll.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/sb-426-contractors?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ac&utm_campaign=20250603_ORGOP_ContractorBill&utm_id=campaignengine)
---
---
| | Friend, Oregon Democrats just declared war on small business. The Oregon House passed SB 426 – _**a radical, union-backed bill that lets unrepresented construction workers sue property owners and contractors for wages a subcontractor failed to pay, even when the homeowner and contractor had already paid the subcontractor for those expenses.**_ _Let’s be clear – this bill won’t stop wage theft. It won’t go after cartels or labor traffickers._ **But it WILL bankrupt contractors, jack up housing costs, and crush open shop competition.** All to reward **union donors** and **punish conservatives.** The Left is using legislation to weaponize the courts, destroy non-union builders, and shut down job creators - _**all in the name of “justice.”**_ But we’re not going to take it without a fight. Are you? clean_body: Property owners and contractors could be sued for someone else’s mistake. Take the poll. | | | | | | Friend, Oregon Democrats just declared war on small business. The Oregon House passed SB 426 – a radical, union-backed bill that lets unrepresented construction workers sue property owners and contractors for wages a subcontractor failed to pay, even when the homeowner and contractor had already paid the subcontractor for those expenses. Let’s be clear – this bill won’t stop wage theft. It won’t go after cartels or labor traffickers. But it WILL bankrupt contractors, jack up housing costs, and crush open shop competition. All to reward union donors and punish conservatives. The Left is using legislation to weaponize the courts, destroy non-union builders, and shut down job creators - all in the name of “justice.” But we’re not going to take it without a fight. Are you? | | | | | Let’s make this bill blow up in their faces. With your support, we’ll expose every Democrat behind it and elect real conservatives who will DEFEND Oregon workers, not union lobbyists. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. From state and local governments to the federal level, we are fighting for a better Oregon – defending parental rights, reducing taxes, ensuring safe communities, and standing against government overreach. name: Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes
subject: We’re so close to stopping Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes is running for reelection and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**rush a split donation between Kris's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mayes26.ixg5Uv&refcode=em250605-1-90&t=1&akid=6083%2E6688874%2EQld5Ii)
---
Friend,
It’s Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes and I have updates for you.
**_We sued to stop Trump’s insane tariffs, which are taxes on you and every other American, and the Court of International Trade sided with us.**_
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mayes26.ixg5Uv&refcode=em250605-1-90&t=2&akid=6083%2E6688874%2EQld5Ii)
With my fellow AG in Oregon, and the support of 10 other Democratic AGs, we challenged Trump’s emergency declaration that he claimed allowed him to impose economy-wrecking tariffs, and we won! **Then, a federal court temporarily _reinstated the tariffs._ This isn’t over, and we will continue to fight these tariffs all the way to the Supreme Court if necessary.**
I promised to be a fighter for the people, no matter what, so I’m thrilled to say I’m co-leading on fighting these tariffs. If you want to support my work for you, please consider making a donation to my re-election campaign.
[**If you want to support my work for you, please consider splitting a donation to my re-election campaign and Mark Kelly.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mayes26.ixg5Uv&refcode=em250605-1-90&t=3&akid=6083%2E6688874%2EQld5Ii)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Thanks for your support,
-Kris

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=6083%2E6688874%2EQld5Ii).

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: sustained, coordinated attacks from the GOP
body:
|
#
Folks, this is urgent: **Republicans just launched _A SECOND_ wave of attack ads against me – all of this a full year and a half before Election Day. ** This is the second round in just one month – and I’m the _only_ freshman Democrat in the country facing this kind of sustained, coordinated attack at this early stage of the election. In May, they spent $500,000 polluting Flint TVs with dark-money misinformation. **And now, they’re back for more.** This is an unprecedented spend, this early in the cycle. And it’s obvious what’s really going on here, folks: the GOP views this Trump+2 district as their best pickup opportunity in 2026 – and they think if they spend big early, they can define me before most voters are even paying attention and make MI-08 a toss-up. clean_body: | Folks, this is urgent: Republicans just launched A SECOND wave of attack ads against me – all of this a full year and a half before Election Day. This is the second round in just one month – and I’m the only freshman Democrat in the country facing this kind of sustained, coordinated attack at this early stage of the election. In May, they spent $500,000 polluting Flint TVs with dark-money misinformation. And now, they’re back for more. This is an unprecedented spend, this early in the cycle. And it’s obvious what’s really going on here, folks: the GOP views this Trump+2 district as their best pickup opportunity in 2026 – and they think if they spend big early, they can define me before most voters are even paying attention and make MI-08 a toss-up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
Are we really going to hand power back over to the Democrats by walking into the same trap we walked into in 2018?| | |
#
---
---
# __[_GOV.__Sarah Huckabee Sanders_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90yhbRzfpSUGo4CsyeWrCzjVsYWS_MwcM2xLFV-zTW_QiYH3uK-BFe4gY2qPG3HGKtCZfqANhCU1V_aFKUbiOnDyxcIRlbnvy7BadTaeapqI30r5lr8TeVZJI_OuGY0MNrGm1BmzCqQ7Sly1rzVP8W6IQ) __
---
ForHUCK PAC for America
---
| | Dear Fellow American,Are we really going to do this? Are we really going to hand power back over to the Democrats by walking into the same trap we walked into in 2018?2 years before that happened the last time, in 2016, President Trump had just won a shocking victory against Hillary Clinton...We held the House and Senate...The wall was being built... The word “inflation” was nowhere to be heard...And America was starting to get back on track.Then -- a little less than 2 years before the last mid-term election in 2018 -- we took our eye off the ball...Republicans stopped giving...Stopped showing up for special elections... And in 2018 we handed the U.S. House of Representatives over to Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, the “squad” and the rest of the America-last Radicals who turned the second half of President Trump’s administration into a circus.Now look at 2025...just weeks into President Trump’s second term...WE LOST THE FIRST FIVE SPECIAL ELECTIONS IN A ROW
---
\-- Republicans are not showing up...
---
THE DEMOCRATS ARE ALREADY OUTRAISING US BY A MILE
---
\-- Republicans are not giving...
---
I spent the first 2 years of my term as Governor trying to un-do what Biden was doing, so I could lead my state forward. I was thrilled when President Trump won because I don’t want to go back to Joe Biden’s America. Let me be clear: that is where we are going if Democrats regain control of Congress. If we want things to go differently this time -- if we want President Trump to get a chance to FINISH the good work that he has started -- we need to come together as Conservatives to build a hedge of protection around our razor-thin majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. That’s not something you get started on in the final months and weeks leading up to an election -- **[It’s time for action -- NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90yiwHaDjCAVD9ItE4K5IprwWpiXlzahOIfE6QKMymLikRUSO_IqQTGQnGbn-mZvc25uF3ej0vSV-aClXkmE19kBrszl_MSk8jPb-KAquiUke0NZLOMhb4nFqd98cBN9NOOEap7B_CVvzOGCVbXr_vpbz)**
---
This brings me to why I wrote to you today and why I need your help. Huck PAC for America was my dad’s vision to fight smarter against the Democrats.Before President Trump asked him to serve as Ambassador to Israel, Dad served and campaigned at just about every level of American politics -- so he’s seen firsthand how the Democrats have for years tried to outwork, outraise and outsmart us.For 17 years, Huck PAC for America has changed the game in American politics.Dad’s vision has since grown into one of the most influential political action committees in the country -- donating more than 8 MILLION DOLLARS to committed Conservatives since 2020._Huck PAC for America_ has reached more than 18 million voters... In 2024, they helped flip 10 Democrat seats to Republican -- I have very little confidence that there would be a Republican Majority to protect this time around if Huck PAC wouldn’t have been there, My Friend...And I’m worried we won’t be able to save it if we don’t get started now.
---
That’s why I can write to you today without reservation to tell you that **[your one-time gift of $35 to Huck PAC for America today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90yh9eQec1bhz4rHXKYzL4qVdhSYqaj1zz2-rHPEZNLtQdw2Qi5JqlhvvidGGyUYEY_ZNYCN3tVRdJcX-fO1tpLMWVI_W6emrbbI1zZY-wypIC6ICSE9U2SJDpKAq-PmV3lzzJnSWxzmqm24NPDBfWqmS)** can make an exponential impact on whether we walk into the same trap we did in 2018... ...or if we wake up the day after the 2026 mid-terms to another 2 years of President Trump working side-by-side with Committed, Conservative Legislators to COMPLETE the work the American People sent him to Washington to finally get done.
---
If you do decide to join the work of Huck PAC for America today, then we are well on our way to holding off the Democrat assault on our thin majority in the House of Representatives. I can’t promise you we will win -- **[but I can promise your $35 will be put to work right away](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90ygMlt36Bgw4K62tjmSbCH3aNgEkaf5kGKrIJ1lTPWNAcFU93uKGqgRRood_h43MuRR_pMh7qtxNRy_04mRmCNkxFwROu4FytQIpb3E4RS8LNBOu_Is69D9i8EBrDQYZ4CwnnmB3OEocHCPZ22sXDyBn)** \-- invested in the most critical races that will ultimately decide who runs Washington after the 2026 mid-terms. I spent the first 2 years of my term as Governor doing everything I could to protect Arkansans from the economic nonsense and national security disasters coming out of Washington... With President Trump and a Republican House and Senate at the helm in Washington, I and my fellow Republican governors can fully concentrate on delivering on the things our constituents deserve -- it’s amazing what you can accomplish when Washington isn’t working AGAINST the American People!With your help, Huck PAC for America can make sure the work of the American People continues across the country -- please join us.
---
[ **JOIN US TODAY** ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90yiM_IVtYo8FFFQZ8M0nbyejeyj2lMZ55SlnlMqIHrB1dRZA0VxDb03ovvnyFukdcA5xUb0UOyxeRIQpamcYR6WI-Mue2_XYMUT2yxqpzX-DneGtWYTugU2Tc-V1ZAJACtufh1ly2MkWCr-i3OqKNZV1)
---
I am so thankful my dad had the good sense to turn his vision into a place where we can come together and pitch in our resources to make a difference. Please consider doing just that today, My Friend._**[_**Please rush back your one-time gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more to Huck PAC for America.**_](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=041828924681487a811c445c39561dd0&_e=D3d2FYsdpRYZk0HJ8wYKl2jNd-axPbI5MoG6MS5tq-l3M2bc4mDosOoumZZIzL7ESr5rtt2WF4-uhp5NSddj7JeYVcdjrICUzAy7WHNTAsx3Da2e2zcL7uIyRRy78M4PG9-OmmuhPT1t44bxA6XwCRY3nUuufHrZ5S9uh1sYSLBZ0K5aXmCQ7WFZst5HMl__0E9npxacbi7PCG1I4sete5HGuM6v3RXTAf8sE7w90yguOfff333sZSdMGMirwJ0KhNaey0aRNGJ4NShNJrjG61QeAFSNR-cInkZ0j_jr2t1T6EB3LOG1GaHpj3c6k4ewEB4EpiemNOn6CWzHt5pnIqX6yqZA-g59WIB_ZUV8gI7-Zw2Q0HrTx1JJ7P_-06JL)**_
---
God bless you,

Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders

We can’t believe we’re saying this, but we agree with Elon Musk on something — but guess what, at the end of the day, he’s STILL wrong. **He just called Donald Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” a “disgusting abomination.”** He’s right that this egregious spending bill is a disaster. But he’s wrong about _why._ _He thinks there aren’t _enough_ cuts to the programs Americans rely on to justify their billionaire tax breaks._ Here’s why this bill is so dangerous for the rest of us: It would gut Medicaid, slash food assistance, strip funding from Planned Parenthood, hand billions in tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, and push through one of the most dangerous climate rollbacks in history. **We’re talking about billions in gutted clean energy funds and loosened pollution rules that would hit frontline communities the hardest.** You’d think Trump and his pals would read the room and stop ramming this bill through Congress, but they couldn’t care less. It just passed the House by a single vote, and now it’s headed to the Senate. We need to act quickly and make our voices heard to stop it in its tracks. **[If we flood the Senate with opposition now, we can push enough Senators to vote NO on this dangerous bill. That’s why we’re counting on 1,000 JanePAC supporters to send a letter to your Senators before the end of today to demand they vote NO on Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill.” Can we count on you to speak out against this bill?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109051879/549848409/-2028182532?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b%26ms%3Dea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode=ea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmOTNmMGJiLTQzNDItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GYDWMuPa6axoHDPrZtn9YDOj5V_UOkQNEzpsSwTqnqI=&emci=d90d53dc-2442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)** | [**WRITE TO YOUR SENATORS →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109051880/549848411/-2028182532?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b%26ms%3Dea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&refcode=ea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ms=ea.0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmOTNmMGJiLTQzNDItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GYDWMuPa6axoHDPrZtn9YDOj5V_UOkQNEzpsSwTqnqI=&emci=d90d53dc-2442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=0f93f0bb-4342-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4823105)

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a pediatrician. I'm scared. And I'm running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham and protect our kids.

|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109052165/549849342/658992212?refcode=250605_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTIyZTE0OC00NTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fH6Z5cF8pMRzcnc42yhjkUWdlegBChjCD9tQHUbS8I=)****I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate.** I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared. I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications. Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns. And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side. And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires. So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate. _**But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.**_ [**I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me on day one. We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you to split a donation with my campaign and Ohio House Dems?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109052166/549849343/658992212?refcode=250605_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTIyZTE0OC00NTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fH6Z5cF8pMRzcnc42yhjkUWdlegBChjCD9tQHUbS8I=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109052167/549849344/-979257485?amount=15&refcode=250605_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTIyZTE0OC00NTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fH6Z5cF8pMRzcnc42yhjkUWdlegBChjCD9tQHUbS8I= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina.
I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now.
And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me.
We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready.
Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.
[**That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $15 (or whatever you can spare) between Ohio House Dems and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109052171/549849348/658992212?refcode=250605_Andrews_Scared&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTIyZTE0OC00NTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7fH6Z5cF8pMRzcnc42yhjkUWdlegBChjCD9tQHUbS8I=)

And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me. We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I’m ready. Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you for believing in this campaign, Dr. Annie Andrews = = OHDC 545 E.
