name: Powered By People
subject: This isn’t democracy or leadership. It’s extremism and control.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
The 2025 Texas legislative session just wrapped up — and what we saw was a government that continues to put extreme politics ahead of the people they’re supposed to serve.
Greg Abbott and his allies rammed through a far-right agenda. More money for border walls, new laws targeting immigrants, and school voucher schemes that shortchange public schools and Texas students.
This isn’t democracy or leadership. It’s extremism and control — and it’s exactly what we’re up against.
But here’s the good news: we’re not powerless.
We’re organizing and winning people over, _one conversation at a time._
Powered by People is on the ground in every corner of Texas — registering voters, showing up in communities, and doing the work that changes outcomes at the ballot box.
[**If you can, chip in $5, $10, or $20 today. Your support helps us reach more voters, train more organizers, and build the kind of grassroots power it takes to defeat Abbott’s agenda — and elect leaders who fight for all of us.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250605.GN8ta4&refcode=ema20250605-240136&t=1&akid=240136%2E444211%2EzbPPA3)
Thank you,

clean_body: The 2025 Texas legislative session just wrapped up — and what we saw was a government that continues to put extreme politics ahead of the people they’re supposed to serve. Greg Abbott and his allies rammed through a far-right agenda. More money for border walls, new laws targeting immigrants, and school voucher schemes that shortchange public schools and Texas students. This isn’t democracy or leadership. It’s extremism and control — and it’s exactly what we’re up against. But here’s the good news: we’re not powerless. We’re organizing and winning people over, one conversation at a time. Powered by People is on the ground in every corner of Texas — registering voters, showing up in communities, and doing the work that changes outcomes at the ballot box. Thank you, Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053094/549852964/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
Peter,

I’ll be frank, we’re facing a host of challenges in Washington right now, and it’s not easy reigning in this administration with a Republican majority at the helm – even though it’s a slim one.

But it isn’t slowing down my efforts on behalf of CA-27. I want to give you a quick update on what I’ve been doing across the district.

I hope you can read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time, **[$3 would go a long way toward helping us start June strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053095/549852965/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)**

Thank you,

George
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053096/549852966/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)****
---

* * *

I had a great time at the WiSH Education Foundation’s 3rd Annual SCV Car Show, where proceeds directly benefit William S. Hart School District’s student programs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053097/549852967/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
On Memorial Day weekend, I joined other volunteers to place flags at the graves of veterans in the Lancaster Cemetery. I was honored to join them to pay respect to those who gave so much to this country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053098/549852968/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
I’m proud to support the Antelope Valley’s new professional soccer team, the AV Alta. This is a great way for our community to connect!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053099/549852969/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
I was honored to sponsor the annual benefit for Santa Clarita's Child & Family Center, 'Taste of the Town', that helps local families and kids thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053100/549852970/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
And back in Washington, I’m continuing to fight back against the GOP moves to gut programs like Medicaid and SNAP by billions. I was up late standing against this bill.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053101/549852971/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)
There’s more to be done, and I’m grateful for your support. I hope you’ll stand with me by **[chipping in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053102/549852972/1606932672?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTZiMGJlMy00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0symho4cDCKHxjbCvU-nLPfdLeF8qZTD3AONi_9eyxo=)** as I continue to take on this administration and get things done for our communities.

Thank you!

George

clean_body: | = Peter, I’ll be frank, we’re facing a host of challenges in Washington right now, and it’s not easy reigning in this administration with a Republican majority at the helm – even though it’s a slim one. But it isn’t slowing down my efforts on behalf of CA-27. I want to give you a quick update on what I’ve been doing across the district. I hope you can read it the whole way through, but if you’re short on time, = Thank you, George | **= I had a great time at the WiSH Education Foundation’s 3rd Annual SCV Car Show, where proceeds directly benefit William S. Hart School District’s student programs. = On Memorial Day weekend, I joined other volunteers to place flags at the graves of veterans in the Lancaster Cemetery. I was honored to join them to pay respect to those who gave so much to this country. = I’m proud to support the Antelope Valley’s new professional soccer team, the AV Alta. This is a great way for our community to connect! = I was honored to sponsor the annual benefit for Santa Clarita's Child & Family Center, 'Taste of the Town', that helps local families and kids thrive. = And back in Washington, I’m continuing to fight back against the GOP moves to gut programs like Medicaid and SNAP by billions. I was up late standing against this bill. = There’s more to be done, and I’m grateful for your support. I hope you’ll stand with me by = as I continue to take on this administration and get things done for our communities. Thank you! George **=** | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Team DASS
subject: They didn’t read the bill — but they voted to block AI regulation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053072/549852938/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiZjZhNC00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnNpsJvru2GBsFoFk35F2CEuFJrM-oa7hmJG_XFVONg=)
**➤➤ BR****EAKING: Republicans vote to BLOCK state AI regulation
— without even reading the bill** House Republicans just passed a sweeping 10-year moratorium on state laws regulating artificial intelligence (AI) – stripping states of the power to address threats like deepfakes, algorithmic bias, election interference, and data privacy abuse And here’s the kicker: **some Republicans didn’t even know that they voted for it.** After the vote, Marjorie Taylor Greene admitted she wasn’t aware the moratorium was buried in the bill. She didn’t read it. She voted for it anyway. **** This is what happens when reckless extremism meets unchecked power. We can’t rely on Republican lawmakers to defend democracy. We can’t trust them to regulate AI. And we certainly can’t trust them to read the bills they vote on. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are more important than ever. They are often the last line of defense against federal overreach and corporate capture — protecting voters, safeguarding data, and defending the rule of law. [**Your support is crucial. By contributing $3 you help DASS fight back against the chaos and keep state-level power in responsible hands.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053073/549852939/-209663064?refcode=em-6.05.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiZjZhNC00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnNpsJvru2GBsFoFk35F2CEuFJrM-oa7hmJG_XFVONg=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109053074/549852940/-209663064?refcode=em-6.05.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZiZjZhNC00NzQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnNpsJvru2GBsFoFk35F2CEuFJrM-oa7hmJG_XFVONg=)**

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: [Please read:] Important follow-up on your 2025 LCV membership
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI1NjY1MDIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDA2NjU5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — as you’re reading this email, Senate Republicans are gearing up
to vote on a House-passed bill that would gut clean energy programs and mandate
a massiveexpansion of oil and gas drilling on public lands and waters across the country. It’s all part of Trump’s signature legislation, which is the most
anti-environmental bill we’ve EVER seen. If MAGA Republicans get their way in
this billionaire tax scam, over a million acres of public lands will be turned
over to corporate polluters and consumers will directly lose out on tens of
billions in popular clean energy incentives. Today, LCV is kicking off our Summer Membership Drive — and it’s an important
one. As we face down the most important vote of Trump’s presidency, how many
members pitch in will determine how far we can go to stop his dangerous agenda.
It’s critical that we show up in a big way right now, which is why a group of donors has agreed to triple match every membership contribution this
month. Please, renew your membership right now to TRIPLE your impact. Even $5 makes a difference >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc8_- Here are just a few reasons your LCV membership matters SO much right now: Big Oil lobbyists are fighting to secure massive giveaways in Trump’s must-pass budget bill. The House has already passed a laundry list of policies to benefit their polluter friends: expanded drilling in public lands and waters, gutting clean energy programs, and ending environmental safeguards against pollution. Now, the fight heads to the Senate, where key senators are still on the fence. Renew your membership for just $5 now to help protect public lands and climate action >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Congress is already working to override the Clean Air Act, increasing tailpipe emissions and making our cars and trucks less economical. This action would make vehicles more expensive to own, worsen public health by polluting the air we breathe, and threaten state-based efforts to curb greenhouse gas emissions. We’re working around the clock to stop their attack on clean air — but we need your help to keep going. Please, renew your membership today. $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv.
The Supreme Court is limiting YOUR right to weigh in on projects that threaten the environment and your families’ health. In its recent ruling in Seven County Infrastructure Coalition v. Eagle County, CO, the Court gave polluters free rein to decide where to build toxic projects that will harm communities’ health. LCV is working for a democracy where the people hold power — not corporate polluters and MAGA judges. We need your help to keep going; please, renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ec-VAz6B~
Because, right now, all contributions will go THREE TIMES as far. A group of donors has agreed to triple match every membership contribution this month — meaning that your support will make the largest impact to protect the environment if you respond today. Please, renew your LCV membership today to TRIPLE your impact. Even $5 helps >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-
Because $5 is all it takes to renew your membership right now. We rely on our members to make our campaigns for the environment a reality. You can renew your membership today for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpkRDLJ_ Peter, LCV has shown — time and again — that when the environmental
movement shows up in a major way, we win. In Trump’s first term, we were able to stop some of his worst attacks on the
environment with the support of LCV members.It took enormous pressure — in Congress, in states, and even with peaceful
protests in the streets — but together, we blocked pipelines, protected public
lands, and pushed forward clean energy, EVEN with Trump in office. To do that again, we have to keep the pressure up — by flooding lawmakers’
offices with calls and messages, by showing up at hearings, and by appearing
outside their offices. That’s why meeting our Membership Drive goal matters so much — can you help us
now while your support goes three times as far? Please, renew your membership today to power LCV’s environmental campaigns through 2025. Your gift will be 3X MATCHED, tripling your impact for people and our planet >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBGzg- Thanks for everything that you do, Peter. Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12566502&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDA2NjU5OQS2&spReportId=MjI0MDA2NjU5OQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12566502&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDA2NjU5OQS2&spReportId=MjI0MDA2NjU5OQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMEZ-

name: Weston D. Imer - ATP Chair
subject: Arapahoe Tea Party: June Meeting with Rep. Brandi Bradley!

Please open this important message about our June meeting of the Arapahoe Tea Party...

Hey Everyone! I am excited to announce that this month we will be joined at our monthly meeting by State Rep. Brandi Bradley, who is on the front lines at the state capitol and is deeply involved in the fight against HB 25-1312, the radical transgender law that Governor Polis signed last month.
We will also provide an update this month on the attempt to call a special meeting of the Colorado GOP to vote on the 2026 primary opt-out, as well as updates on the Unity Scorecard and a recap of the RNC Spring Training held in Miami last month.
Next month, we will hear from another Colorado GOP Gubernatorial Candidate, and I am hopeful that we can keep the momentum of our grassroots movement strong as we lead into the November 2025 School Board Elections.
As always, click the image or button below to RSVP for our meeting on Tuesday.

body:
BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America...| | |

| |

Dear Friend,I’m back from our traveling BRAVE Books church tour and I have important news for you... We got into three public schools where I read BRAVE Books to nearly 1,400 children -- reaching them with the Christian-inspired messages of... ...bravery, humility, and loving your enemies. Can you believe it? The Holy Spirit is stirring hearts and minds in ways we haven’t seen for some time in our country. And that’s why starting today, BRAVE Books is launching a new initiative to bring our mission into public schools and libraries. [**And we can’t do it without you, Friend!**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6bbf7b59c67b4042ab94ccf11863bb0d&_e=7h_nIL3rGamJ-eCsB2IvnnbK2EYMC3XULxZlY5Qi_z5NcyqS7m5w5CCPcw2TcyUXb2KLWDHiQsIE2EqGwYuvgRtOikNzr6Rh8B77qymM9p8Gqyemesf7VKkwbk-fMyP5w386u14V5orXZ-Oz4w1G5GyGG-cAu60YtUvY4JN1pFLyT7JU6JNU2z6TPMcOeNiE7DqPzfpPBoXIAAuEjPTTpUjd_2taGPFF_CP4hqr7DLmvUGLxloEh-XKPFl_dFj_hOI97t_sr40Hkq2E2S7A80zPS2zRYWbqawJVPt8NZD122aFJZ6aOy8y3AR6jodLieXyrZINWucPZTM7chqTf5VWPKOtk-r78QxwsvlGkaGmSqi5HYvTwN6ag-RY-i_-iETT6N-Y5iO5_u6cNeDd9vzg%3D%3D) Specifically, as we prepare for the 250th birthday of our nation, BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America... ...by getting a minimum of 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into as many schools and libraries as we can by July 4, 2025. Friend, if you haven’t seen the “Raising Patriots” book bundle, it features five BRAVE Books that teach foundational, conservative values to encourage children to be God-loving, patriotic Americans. _Son of Truth_ \-- Honesty.

And of course, there’s Scholastic Books which has had a monopoly on school libraries since before I was a kid. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. Their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From _Run Away with Me_ , one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to _Escape from St. Hell_ which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. Friend, the fact that we got into three public schools during our church tour is an opportunity we haven’t had before. And we have to take it! **[That’s why I’m asking you to send in your gift of $50, $100, or even $500 if you are able.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6bbf7b59c67b4042ab94ccf11863bb0d&_e=7h_nIL3rGamJ-eCsB2IvnnbK2EYMC3XULxZlY5Qi_z5NcyqS7m5w5CCPcw2TcyUXb2KLWDHiQsIE2EqGwYuvgRtOikNzr6Rh8B77qymM9p8Gqyemesf7VKkwbk-fMyP5w386u14V5orXZ-Oz4w1G5GyGG-cAu60YtUvY4JN1pFLyT7JU6JNU2z6TPMcOeNiE7DqPzfpPBoXIAAuEjPTTpUjd_2taGPFF_CP4hqr7DLnW47rXtVXW1mMZmVTpEL5MqwXRT6kZG5SAJgDGhyOXI7csRAaTUCHfu6JXox6dyKYZ2CyD45NS0i_zyvJfHKC_Ek86dnWbLSMMXZeZ7ClPz8hHKG0fQrS169Q6eoXdlPtAsvbV3u4vLTXU0qeynpXSUhJX9OcMNus5_lWKsqT_HA%3D%3D)** Friend, if you’d like to sponsor one or more “Raising Patriots” book bundles yourself, that would be such a blessing on our mission. Your gift of $100 gets 1 “Raising Patriots” book bundle to a school or library. Your $200 gift gets 2 “Raising Patriots” book bundles to a school or library. And so on... And Friend, if you’d rather your $100 gift be used to send your family a “raising Patriots” book bundle, that’s an option too. What’s most important is that you respond right away because July 4th is less than two months away. **[And whether your gift is $50, $100, $500 or anything higher or lower -- I thank you](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6bbf7b59c67b4042ab94ccf11863bb0d&_e=7h_nIL3rGamJ-eCsB2IvnnbK2EYMC3XULxZlY5Qi_z5NcyqS7m5w5CCPcw2TcyUXb2KLWDHiQsIE2EqGwYuvgRtOikNzr6Rh8B77qymM9p8Gqyemesf7VKkwbk-fMyP5w386u14V5orXZ-Oz4w1G5GyGG-cAu60YtUvY4JN1pFLyT7JU6JNU2z6TPMcOeNiE7DqPzfpPBoXIAAuEjPTTpUjd_2taGPFF_CP4hqr7DLmXsvyHJpu6CeWmxyL-xxvnLRyFIFZi5TvVdiryFVGdiEvwOxtmyAdAeI69GDHup0EZ37ngBtysbojkr_XwPy_kfk8WkMgSknLIoULhnsvTnt71Ue_KSMDyTOAkLru9ps6WMUadWa46wrYJ9Wl2vzF0yjZCi6xjV_4fchVDvBLaDA%3D%3D).** The Holy Spirit has opened the door to these leftist public schools just a tiny bit. clean_body: BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America...| | | | | Dear Friend,I’m back from our traveling BRAVE Books church tour and I have important news for you... We got into three public schools where I read BRAVE Books to nearly 1,400 children -- reaching them with the Christian-inspired messages of... ...bravery, humility, and loving your enemies. Can you believe it? The Holy Spirit is stirring hearts and minds in ways we haven’t seen for some time in our country. And that’s why starting today, BRAVE Books is launching a new initiative to bring our mission into public schools and libraries. Specifically, as we prepare for the 250th birthday of our nation, BRAVE Books aims to counter the Left’s lies about America... ...by getting a minimum of 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into as many schools and libraries as we can by July 4, 2025. Friend, if you haven’t seen the “Raising Patriots” book bundle, it features five BRAVE Books that teach foundational, conservative values to encourage children to be God-loving, patriotic Americans. Son of Truth \-- Honesty. | | More Than Spots and Stripes \--Strong moral character. Unmuzzle Me, Please! \-- Free Speech. Elephants are Not Birds \-- Truth about gender identity. Paws Off My Cannon \-- Second Amendment. | | | More Than Spots and Stripes \--Strong moral character. Unmuzzle Me, Please! \-- Free Speech. Elephants are Not Birds \-- Truth about gender identity. Paws Off My Cannon \-- Second Amendment. | | Friend, you can bet children aren’t getting these lessons in public schools and libraries unless we make it happen! July 4th is only weeks away and the cost of getting 1,000 “Raising Patriots” book bundles into schools and libraries will be about $100,000. If that seems like a lot to you, just think how many children will read one copy of an amazing BRAVE Book.I’m sure for many of these kids, it’ll be the first time they’re hearing the truth about gender identity or the Second Amendment! After all, their school libraries are filled with leftist books, picked by leftist librarians, and endorsed by leftist school boards. In public schools and libraries children are exposed to books like: | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.”Friend, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. Teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And of course, there’s Scholastic Books which has had a monopoly on school libraries since before I was a kid. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. Their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me , one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. Friend, the fact that we got into three public schools during our church tour is an opportunity we haven’t had before. And we have to take it! Friend, if you’d like to sponsor one or more “Raising Patriots” book bundles yourself, that would be such a blessing on our mission. Your gift of $100 gets 1 “Raising Patriots” book bundle to a school or library. Your $200 gift gets 2 “Raising Patriots” book bundles to a school or library. And so on... And Friend, if you’d rather your $100 gift be used to send your family a “raising Patriots” book bundle, that’s an option too. What’s most important is that you respond right away because July 4th is less than two months away. . The Holy Spirit has opened the door to these leftist public schools just a tiny bit. We have to seize the opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to these children while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us. Thank you! Kirk Cameron P.S. Friend, we’re going to raise proud young patriots before America’s 250th birthday on July 4th, 2026! But it starts THIS July 4th and we need your help. Thank you! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite CConroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: [BREAKING] Nation’s largest veterans group backs our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Veterans are rallying behind us. We need you too.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)
This is an important moment for our campaign:
**Common Defense — the _largest_ veteran-led grassroots organization in the country — endorsed our campaign for Governor.**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250605_1_commondefense?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2417&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)
My dad served in the Marines. My mom is a Navy veteran. This endorsement is more than politics; it’s deeply personal. It’s a show of trust from people who know what it means to serve and fight for justice.
**[Veterans are rallying behind our campaign and for our shared values. If you’re with us, pitch in $5 or whatever you can to power our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250605_1_commondefense?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2417&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250605_1_commondefense?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2417&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)**
My mom and dad taught me that leadership isn’t about titles — **it’s about service.** They showed me that real courage means standing up for others, especially when it’s hard.
That’s what this moment demands.
**Right now, the Trump administration is going after our veterans.**
Trump wants to slash 83,000 jobs at the VA, and gut care and benefits millions of veterans rely on to pay for tax breaks for his billionaire friends.
This is a betrayal of the sacred promise our country has made to every person who’s served.
**That’s why, as Governor, I will fight like hell to:**
✅ Expand rural veteran transportation to all 33 counties in New Mexico
✅ Hire more Veteran Service Officers
✅ Help veterans transition into high-paying civilian jobs
✅ Crack down on predatory businesses that exploit our veterans
✅ Invest in mental health and suicide prevention
**New Mexico’s 122,000+ veterans and their families deserve a governor who won’t back down, but we have to win this race to guarantee it.**
**[This endorsement is a big deal for our campaign, but we must rise to meet the moment. Chip in $5 or whatever you can to support our campaign and stand with those who’ve served.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250605_1_commondefense?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2417&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250605_1_commondefense?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2417&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250605-1&t=2&refcode2=2417_400544_n2M042&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=2417%2E400544%2En2M042)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The House passed cuts to Medicaid. Now it’s the Senate’s turn to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team. Our voice is our power, and right now, we need to raise it louder than ever. **House Republicans have passed a reckless bill that guts Medicaid and SNAP** — threatening health care for millions of Americans and ripping away food assistance from working families. **Here in Michigan, this bill would jeopardize health care for 2.6 million people, including seniors in nursing homes, kids, and people living with disabilities. ** Now, the fight moves to the Senate — _and we need to make ourselves heard. _ This bill is nothing short of cruel. It cuts health care to fund a massive tax break for the wealthiest Americans. It increases costs on working families. It hurts our most vulnerable neighbors and our local economy. **[We can’t let this stand. clean_body: | Team. Our voice is our power, and right now, we need to raise it louder than ever. House Republicans have passed a reckless bill that guts Medicaid and SNAP — threatening health care for millions of Americans and ripping away food assistance from working families. Here in Michigan, this bill would jeopardize health care for 2.6 million people, including seniors in nursing homes, kids, and people living with disabilities. Now, the fight moves to the Senate — and we need to make ourselves heard. This bill is nothing short of cruel. It cuts health care to fund a massive tax break for the wealthiest Americans. It increases costs on working families. It hurts our most vulnerable neighbors and our local economy. | I’ve worked hard to expand affordable health care in Michigan — and I’ll keep fighting like hell to protect it. Thanks for using your voice today, Gretchen = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

subject: Elizabeth Warren just EXPOSED the GOP:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need all hands on deck to stand with Sen. Warren >>
| Sen. Elizabeth Warren just **EXPOSED** the MAGA plan to DESTROY the working class in America: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90818?t=6&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm) But now the GOP is furious: **Trump will do anything to force her silence, so he’s attacking her _relentlessly!_**

[**We need Americans EVERYWHERE to stand with Elizabeth Warren in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, so we’re sending an urgent letter to support and thank Senator Warren for leading this fight. We still need 100 Democrats in your state to sign on:_Add your name! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90818?t=7&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm) | [**100 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: DONATE $3 TO SIGN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90818?t=8&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm)
---
TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to fight for working families!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let MAGA billionaires steal our benefits while they get richer and richer!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy our Democracy and our benefits — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90818?t=9&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90818?t=10&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20112%2E878179%2Ec4jYHm)

## _Breaking News:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1433e9ce-81a0-48cd-bdee-dccdd215c2fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Elon Musk has appeared to turn on President Donald Trump completely, posting to X Thursday afternoon a personal accusation towards the president that has shaken the country and the markets.
"Time to drop the really big bomb: realDonaldTrump is in the Epstein files. That is the real reason they have not been made public," Musk wrote in the post. "Have a nice day, DJT!"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3083af3f-39da-4c75-81b4-a9a57b20a129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The post, presently viewed 22 million times, was made as Musk and Trump publicly battle it out over the "Big Beautiful Bill," with Musk apparently very dissatisfied with its spending priorities, calling it a "disgusting abomination."
President Trump posted to Truth Social roughly an hour after Musk's post, rising above his accusation and addressing the core of their disagreement, defending his spending bill. "I don't mind Elon turning against me,... I didn't create this mess, I'm just here to fix it..." Trump wrote.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2739dbe-7155-4abf-a373-18448c4e15cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

# Sen. Kennedy GOES OFF at hypocrite law professor for bold double standard against Trump
Sen. John Kennedy **[called out University of Pennsylvania law professor Kate Shaw](https://substack.com/redirect/d763bae3-cd42-4e5e-b044-4367ba9ad926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for having a double standard for left wing presidents she "agrees with" vs President Donald Trump, who she "dislikes."
"Why don't you own up to it?!" Kennedy snaps at the professor. "Aren't you embarrassed you said that?!!"
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d763bae3-cd42-4e5e-b044-4367ba9ad926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d763bae3-cd42-4e5e-b044-4367ba9ad926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kennedy asked all of the Senate Judiciary Committee hearing's witnesses if nationwide injunctions against President Trump's executive agenda were being abused or not.
Shaw struggled to answer, saying, "There could be good faith disagreements about the correctness of some of them but I have not seen, in the last 4 months, abuse, no!"
"I have little respect for your opinion because I've read you stuff!" Kennedy started. "When someone is in the White House that you agree with and someone gets a universal injunction against them, you don't like universal injunctions. You call them 'judges acting like politicians in robes and judges acting like crass political actors."
"But now that President Trump is in the White House, who you dislike, you think universal injunctions taste like pumpkin pie!" Kennedy continued. "So I have to discount what you say, because I think you act on your political beliefs and I worry that that's what you teach your kids."
Watch the tense face-off here:
[Watch The Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d763bae3-cd42-4e5e-b044-4367ba9ad926?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Cuomo blames COVID-19 scandal on Trump 'MAGA line' during NYC mayoral debate
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a18eda84-6787-4791-8eb6-99db4f0f9488?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Gov. Andrew Cuomo **[deflected responsibility](https://substack.com/redirect/a18eda84-6787-4791-8eb6-99db4f0f9488?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his ongoing COVID-19 related scandal, calling it Trump's "MAGA line" during New York City's first mayoral debate, Wednesday.
* **Democrats Fight for Mayoral Spot:** Nine Democratic candidates debated Wednesday night ahead of the June 24 primary, with Cuomo facing immediate attacks over his COVID-19 scandal and ongoing Justice Department investigation into alleged false congressional testimony. Cuomo dismissed the probe as Trump's "MAGA line" and "political football," claiming it's part of Trump's pattern of targeting Democrats like Chuck Schumer and Hillary Clinton.
* **Gov. Cuomo Leads the Charge:** Cuomo is the clear frontrunner in both polling and fundraising due to his name recognition and experience, positioning himself as the candidate best equipped to stand up to Trump based on their previous clashes during Trump's first presidency. He argued he's "the last person on this stage that Mr. Trump wants to see as mayor."

* **Cuomo Denies His COVID-19 Scandal** : Republican lawmakers questioned Cuomo last year about his alleged lies to Congress about the number of nursing home COVID-19 deaths. Cuomo rejected allegations and attributed blame to Trump's "tactics." Cuomo claimed that New York followed federal guidelines from the Trump administration surrounding COVID-19, and suggested that President Trump should be questioned about the state's nursing home policies.
* **Ongoing Investigation:** The Department of Justice opened a criminal investigation relating to Cuomo's alleged wrongdoing.

* * *
# Sen. Markwayne Mullin SHUTS DOWN Kaitlan Collins for scorn over Trump's 'Big Beautiful Bill'
Senator Markwayne Mullen **[defended President Donald Trump's proposed tax cut bill](https://substack.com/redirect/67561453-847f-4288-bd4d-41e64a41c9df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** against the snarky Kaitlan Collins during a tense CNN interview.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/67561453-847f-4288-bd4d-41e64a41c9df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/67561453-847f-4288-bd4d-41e64a41c9df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Collins interrogated Mullin about Trump's proposed 'One Big Beautiful Bill,' that has recently been strongly criticized among Democrats and some Republicans.
The bill is a sweeping legislative proposal that aims to make Trump's 2017 tax cuts permanent, eliminate federal taxes on tips and overtime, expand deductions, etc.
"There's no economist that anyone has pointed to that has said that it won't add to the deficit," Collins claimed.
Mullin fired back, "The same economists you're referring to are the same economists that said the TCJ, the tax cuts that President Trump put in place in 2018 was going to add 1.5 trillion dollars in deficits, right? **[They were dead wrong. It actually added 1.6 trillion dollars in surplus."](https://substack.com/redirect/67561453-847f-4288-bd4d-41e64a41c9df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Collins tried to pivot with an emphasis on inflation and the COVID-19 pandemic as reasons for Trump's economic history, but Mullin kept the counterpunches coming.
"The last time we had the TCJ passed, we saw the economy respond to it," Mullin said. "We saw medium household income increase and we saw investments in the states and the counties they live in increase."
Watch Mullin take down Collins' attacks on the bill here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/67561453-847f-4288-bd4d-41e64a41c9df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

"I don't mind Elon turning against me..." | | | Jun 5 | | | | | | | | | | | | Breaking News: | | ---|---|--- Elon Musk has appeared to turn on President Donald Trump completely, posting to X Thursday afternoon a personal accusation towards the president that has shaken the country and the markets. "Time to drop the really big bomb: realDonaldTrump is in the Epstein files. That is the real reason they have not been made public," Musk wrote in the post. "Have a nice day, DJT!" | | ---|---|--- The post, presently viewed 22 million times, was made as Musk and Trump publicly battle it out over the "Big Beautiful Bill," with Musk apparently very dissatisfied with its spending priorities, calling it a "disgusting abomination." President Trump posted to Truth Social roughly an hour after Musk's post, rising above his accusation and addressing the core of their disagreement, defending his spending bill. "I don't mind Elon turning against me,... I didn't create this mess, I'm just here to fix it..." Trump wrote. | | ---|---|--- What is your reaction to Musk's post and Trump's follow up? Kennedy GOES OFF at hypocrite law professor for bold double standard against Trump Sen. John Kennedy for having a double standard for left wing presidents she "agrees with" vs President Donald Trump, who she "dislikes." "Why don't you own up to it?!" Kennedy snaps at the professor. "Aren't you embarrassed you said that?!!" Kennedy asked all of the Senate Judiciary Committee hearing's witnesses if nationwide injunctions against President Trump's executive agenda were being abused or not. Shaw struggled to answer, saying, "There could be good faith disagreements about the correctness of some of them but I have not seen, in the last 4 months, abuse, no!" "I have little respect for your opinion because I've read you stuff!" Kennedy started. "When someone is in the White House that you agree with and someone gets a universal injunction against them, you don't like universal injunctions. You call them 'judges acting like politicians in robes and judges acting like crass political actors." "But now that President Trump is in the White House, who you dislike, you think universal injunctions taste like pumpkin pie!" Kennedy continued. "So I have to discount what you say, because I think you act on your political beliefs and I worry that that's what you teach your kids." And guess what? Instead of backing the blue, the radical Left is doubling down.

This is lawlessness on full display—and if we don’t stop it now, it only gets worse. That’s why **I went on Fox News** , calling out this insanity on national television for what it is.

Peter,

**One of my favorite quotes from Marcus Aurelius is _“To offend a strong man, tell him a lie. To offend a weak man, tell him the truth.”_**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=92dada1e851848069f5cd34dc14ef0db&_e=Nn8cHzwq10con2Lso7MiKnsO_dl_iKHa0x8dTor9qdeaOUHmlSLCKFeihYMDXHhG8OHR9utOwHpy9_uuRRkADZf19ShTKmVKqKcD9jBYIyqBocEekqIYQbO35yP9KYOtQMfO9-dl-JWDYFqYpI2fV1BIkrRP3vXDANF-E8hsPz1obnCxyjC1Ap2fwxsUMr9UxBUpWNn-gsqAL3_rtOQhDuQ-fVcIVO-Bt-Qxgdc4_HuFDLOAg9qmKh7yBvZxZ0_iiwUveg0F7TUsfJh_6FFCRIAXo67EzhHlpYRoBDDwSjGijCVn3GIzcH5dfg2fM4GHVUwO_nnJLlMUWLVtS9P45A%3D%3D)
_This is exactly why the GOP RINO establishment and the Radical Left fear me. I only ever speak the truth, trying to expose how corrupt the system is._

**And this is exactly why I get fired up when they try to feed me their bullsh*t lies.** They say things like Ilhan Omar remaining in office is GOOD for Republicans because it helps them fundraise more money. Anyone with common sense could see it’s WORSE for Americans to have insane Radical Leftists pushing their woke agenda in Congress than for the RINOs to raise a few more bucks.

I’m running for Senate in Minnesota because I’m sick and tired of weak men running the show. It’s put America at a huge disadvantage on the global stage. We need stronger men like Donald Trump and me in office.

[**Will you rush $15 to support my STRONG MAGA CAMPAIGN before midnight?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=92dada1e851848069f5cd34dc14ef0db&_e=Nn8cHzwq10con2Lso7MiKnsO_dl_iKHa0x8dTor9qdeaOUHmlSLCKFeihYMDXHhG8OHR9utOwHpy9_uuRRkADZf19ShTKmVKqKcD9jBYIyqBocEekqIYQbO35yP9KYOtQMfO9-dl-JWDYFqYpI2fV1BIkrRP3vXDANF-E8hsPz1obnCxyjC1Ap2fwxsUMr9Un__vKqfCQ0x7q0N6UEhoCR2slRRJMJvZZUWacnp7YXjWizbEtYhSPPoIamZ_C97xeBX70hkGj_cWs5NjbwSf_5Ams-VxcmDASznuPERpuvmXogkRTo8TtCiOg3vbb37pFopsXEVPCCg50Ywbwwc0LQ%3D%3D)

| [ **RUSH $15** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=92dada1e851848069f5cd34dc14ef0db&_e=Nn8cHzwq10con2Lso7MiKnsO_dl_iKHa0x8dTor9qdeaOUHmlSLCKFeihYMDXHhG8OHR9utOwHpy9_uuRRkADZf19ShTKmVKqKcD9jBYIyqBocEekqIYQbO35yP9KYOtQMfO9-dl-JWDYFqYpI2fV1BIkrRP3vXDANF-E8hsPz1obnCxyjC1Ap2fwxsUMr9UC_OyVFEGgJYhOLl6QseOycsjcUqG7MUYS3LGhBkiNckyr7ORkRuGWTAP9iJhoX86Q8-SfRpRhgAtTsaAULHlHPR6hvxac3ift-Muh8zCPqX0nJFPRpVVIq496zcQbbMBlhYlXQlk1_lCKDdAmOMJqA%3D%3D)

The weak RINOs and Radical Leftists are doing everything they can to stop my campaign, from teaming up with the Industrial Media Complex to control the narrative to accepting gigantic donations from Billionaire Deep State Donors.

_**All I have is you – THE PEOPLE – to support my campaign.**_

[**I’m humbly asking you to donate to my campaign – it will be a HUGE slap in the face to the Neocons and Leftists who want to see me fail.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=92dada1e851848069f5cd34dc14ef0db&_e=Nn8cHzwq10con2Lso7MiKnsO_dl_iKHa0x8dTor9qdeaOUHmlSLCKFeihYMDXHhG8OHR9utOwHpy9_uuRRkADZf19ShTKmVKqKcD9jBYIyqBocEekqIYQbO35yP9KYOtQMfO9-dl-JWDYFqYpI2fV1BIkrRP3vXDANF-E8hsPz1obnCxyjC1Ap2fwxsUMr9Uo4v3quFdDvj71Dck79gj2N8wZNbd8bI44I8SoXkEB_mGxFJu3oB48YkphsMZ5n7fkwqeM7UiOEjU-5eo4fYJPEz8J2A9ks8z4Kmiv7F44fwwSJSZ26ntOknuWh_3Pg4Spa4uB2huix3UhjcfPuuyrg%3D%3D)

Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=92dada1e851848069f5cd34dc14ef0db&_e=Nn8cHzwq10con2Lso7MiKnsO_dl_iKHa0x8dTor9qdeaOUHmlSLCKFeihYMDXHhG8OHR9utOwHpy9_uuRRkADZf19ShTKmVKqKcD9jBYIyqBocEekqIYQbO35yP9KYOtQMfO9-dl-JWDYFqYpI2fV1BIkrRP3vXDANF-E8hsPz1obnCxyjC1Ap2fwxsUMr9UeQ3qQtTW08FwDanM3rk_R5BqBPYmX-00OxtBlQAlrmhGXMf363jqy8V1CV9U3FUo7KU5g3evCVdvLhAC4Aj-2IPgWt8JmYgJp3MicO9hL4a1clOaGcXN3sYXLn3JMNogpCLpwbmdWuucnFKyoDo4YQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Throwing working families under the bus for billionaire tax breaks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump and the GOP are pushing a proposed budget, which they’re
calling “One Big Beautiful Bill,” but in reality it’s a massive handout to
millionaires and billionaires that guts support for poor and working
families.

It passed the House by just one vote after multiple Democratic members
passed away in office this year. It is now headed to the Senate. If
passed, it will:

* Slash more than $700 billion from Medicaid, food assistance, and the
Affordable Care Act;
* Kick nearly 11 million people off their health care;
* Increase the national debt by $2.3 trillion while giving massive tax
breaks to the already ultra-wealthy.

When constituents call them out, Republicans lie, deny, or if you’re Sen.
Joni Ernst, shamelessly justify the bill by saying, “We all are going to
die.”

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250605-signup-GOPbudget?source=em20250605-36737&akid=36737%2E1203867%2Ee7M7r_ ]The New York Times: Defending Medicaid Cuts, Ernst Tells Iowans, 'We
All Are Going to Die'. Senator Joni Ernst's flip response in an exchange
with constituents about the effects of Trump's domestic policy bill spread
quickly online.

The truth is Trump and the GOP don’t care about worsening the national
debt, as long as the money is going toward billionaires, endless wars, and
mass deportations instead of services that people need, like healthcare,
food assistance, and education.

With Republicans aiming to pass this disastrous budget by July 4th, we
need to speak up now and demand that every sitting Democratic Senator
oppose it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250605-signup-GOPbudget?source=em20250605-36737&akid=36737%2E1203867%2Ee7M7r_ ]Add your name to urge the Senate to block this major wealth transfer to
the rich at the expense of the working class →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em20250605-signup-GOPbudget?source=em20250605-36737&akid=36737%2E1203867%2Ee7M7r_ ]Add Your Name

It’s time for Senate Democrats to act like a true opposition party and
stand with working-class people over the far-right oligarchy.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250605-36737-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36737_1203867_e7M7r_&akid=36737%2E1203867%2Ee7M7r_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36737%2E1203867%2Ee7M7r_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Re: The ICE Secret Police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — Donald Trump is using authoritarian fear tactics to terrorize our immigrant communities. At the direction of Trump’s administration, ICE agents are targeting people trying to enter the country lawfully. Last week, I confronted masked ICE agents in the lobby of my district office building as they detained non-criminal, non-violent individuals after routine court appearances — **and today, Rep. Bennie G. Thompson (MS-02) and I led 86 Democrats in demanding answers from Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.** You can read more below, and then please **[sign my petition telling the Trump Administration that we will not stand for this authoritarian agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109055214/549860084/1996792542?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM5OGUzOS00ZTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tkQ4X1hB3ea4dnIzmeNfB4PE9CNarjU4MWkYDEJX8g=&emci=7555cdcb-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=31c98e39-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823)** Thank you, Dan \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dan Goldman
Date: Fri, May 30, 2025 Peter, We’re a nation of immigrants who for generations have come to our shores because of the promise of freedom, democracy and the American Dream. But yesterday, I personally witnessed something straight out of an authoritarian dictatorship: masked, plain-clothes Gestapo-like ICE agents arresting non-violent, non-criminal asylum applicants coming out of court in order to deport them before they can respond. In a new, coordinated strategy solely designed to increase the total number of deportations, DHS lawyers are doing an end run around our immigration laws by dismissing ongoing deportation proceedings — which often include lawful asylum claims — in order to invoke a different, “expedited” deportation authority to terrorize and remove immigrants following all of the proper procedures. **This xenophobic purge is cruel, cynical and, most importantly, un-American. Today, I confronted these masked ICE agents detaining immigrants who did not have lawyers nor spoke English.** To be very clear, asylum is a lawful pathway to enter the United States. Yet the Trump Administration is using procedural shenanigans to void the asylum claims long enough to deport as many immigrants as possible. Many of these immigrants have work visas, pay social security and income taxes, and have families. This cruelty and xenophobia is not what this nation has stood for throughout our history. These people are not “murderers” or “child rapists,” as Trump falsely claims; they are people voluntarily showing up in court to be lawfully admitted into the country. The Trump Administration has sold the American people a false bill of goods. And I will continue exposing their lawlessness until they stop this nonsense. **[And I need your help. Add your name to my petition to send a message to the Trump Administration that we will not stand for this blatant abuse of our immigration system.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109055215/549860086/1996792542?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM5OGUzOS00ZTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tkQ4X1hB3ea4dnIzmeNfB4PE9CNarjU4MWkYDEJX8g=&emci=7555cdcb-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=31c98e39-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109055217/549860087/1996792542?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM5OGUzOS00ZTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tkQ4X1hB3ea4dnIzmeNfB4PE9CNarjU4MWkYDEJX8g=&emci=7555cdcb-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=31c98e39-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823)

Dan

New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109055218/549860088/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWM5OGUzOS00ZTQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2tkQ4X1hB3ea4dnIzmeNfB4PE9CNarjU4MWkYDEJX8g=&emci=7555cdcb-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=31c98e39-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

This xenophobic purge is cruel, cynical and, most importantly, un-American. Today, I confronted these masked ICE agents detaining immigrants who did not have lawyers nor spoke English. To be very clear, asylum is a lawful pathway to enter the United States. Yet the Trump Administration is using procedural shenanigans to void the asylum claims long enough to deport as many immigrants as possible. Many of these immigrants have work visas, pay social security and income taxes, and have families. This cruelty and xenophobia is not what this nation has stood for throughout our history. These people are not “murderers” or “child rapists,” as Trump falsely claims; they are people voluntarily showing up in court to be lawfully admitted into the country. The Trump Administration has sold the American people a false bill of goods. And I will continue exposing their lawlessness until they stop this nonsense. | Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Today's Announcement
body:
This morning, I made an official announcement

| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Checking in with Matt Cartwright
---
| This morning, I officially announced my intentions regarding the next congressional election. I wanted to share this with you because so many of you were encouraging me to run again. Marion and I appeared in front of the new Moosic Emergency Services headquarters building, one of the many projects I was thrilled to help fund. The following is the text of the speech. ———————I will not be a candidate in the 2026 elections. I worked 80-hour weeks at this job for 12 years. I’ve decided it’s time to give it a rest and give the chance to someone else.
For 12 years I gave it my all, and I meant to make myself useful for NEPA.
I made it to the top of the Appropriations Committee, becoming one of the 12 Cardinals, or Chairs of the Appropriations Committee.
And that helped me bring a lot of our tax dollars back here to be put to work in our local economy. About $100 million on my own signature.
In our office we placed a premium on working for economic development, and helping our local employers navigate the federal and state government.
16 of the bills I wrote passed into law. Bills that help veterans and military spouses. The Camp Lejeune Justice Act, to remove a blot on our national integrity that came about from our government’s poisoning hundreds of thousands of U.S Marines and their families with carcinogens in their drinking water.
Our office wrote and passed bills that streamline government operations and make it work more efficiently. We passed a bill that is already saving American taxpayers billions of dollars every year in the routine purchasing of software products. I wrote Appropriations bills that helped bring fair compensation to federal corrections officers at USP Canaan and all over the nation.
I’m proud to say that we worked very hard in my office to revitalize the Amtrak project, which is all systems go, and I’ll continue to work with terrific people behind this effort like Gov. Josh Shapiro, and Larry Malski, Charlene Doyle, Dominic Keating, Bob Hay and the entire PNNRA Board to keep that project moving. I cannot tell you how gratifying it was to me personally to have Amtrak economists confirm that this new line connecting northeastern Pennsylvania to New York City will generate $84 million in extra economic activity every year once it gets going. That means an awful lot of good paying jobs will be coming here, and I’m so proud to have had a major hand in that.
I do want to say a few words about politics.
When you think about who to vote for, I’d suggest you don’t just always go for the change candidate. Because half the time the change they offer is not for the better.
Don’t automatically vote for extremist candidates who offer simple solutions to complicated problems. If solutions were that simple those wouldn’t be problems in the first place.
Don’t vote for candidates who scapegoat the least of our brothers and sisters. Targeting their lives isn’t what is going to fix yours. Being kind to them won’t hurt you.
Do your own research about who to vote for. The problem is, the internet has made traditional journalism unprofitable, and the money going into things like investigatory journalism has been slashed. So the sources that our parents and grandparents could rely on for the truth aren’t around anymore. People aren’t getting news from the Edward R. Murrows and the Walter Cronkites, journalists with principles, ethics and standards. Instead, people get news from the **new** Main Stream Media: political cable TV shows and the internet, where there are no standards and you can find support for the most ridiculous, outlandish lies and conspiracy theories they try to make you believe, about anything.
Do your homework. Do your own research from reputable sources and vote for candidates that have concrete plans that will actually help you and the people you care about. Vote for leaders who will fight for things that really matter:
For people’s healthcare, for police and first responders, for fair pharmaceutical prices, for veterans’ care, for seniors’ benefits, for workers’ rights, for civil rights, for voting rights and civil justice, for clean air and clean water, for tax fairness, for sensible economic policies and for public education.
These are the things I fought for, and I was proud to do it, and I’m proud to say I went down swinging for these things. Thanks to all the supporters, volunteers and voters — to everyone — who gave me the opportunity.
I’ll always remember my time in the public eye, to serve as what Teddy Roosevelt called “the man in the arena ... whose face is marred by dust and sweat and blood” whose “place will never be with those cold and timid souls who neither know victory nor defeat.”
And I’ll always be grateful to the people of northeastern Pennsylvania for giving me the chance to do that. God bless you all.

---
|
---

Matt Cartwright * 227 Penn Ave * Scranton PA 18503-1921 * Scranton, PA 185031921 * USA

Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa _by just 0.19 points_ after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- **they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to _0.15 points_.** But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? _Of course not._ Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. **This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power.** The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. **[Team, chip $25 or whatever you can today as we fight bills like this around the country and protect our right to be heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109056104/549863234/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=t3YTfAomepUA6s0waiQfoKlfijj49fcAoNMbowbowgz4EP9DQ5u9Bfmlcvtr83bdBG7IxlAJ8XVuDK5bNilWiJSWJoTGn8vp8Tcrxzy2tvg=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMzhlZjUxLTUwNDItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vsAmJo8UN-3LJJUArde44BLV19F8dw0H-RIuit30U20=&emci=3f8e8aed-1942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8e38ef51-5042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

| | Those aren't the only changes -- **this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race.** Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"_Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged_ ," she said. "_But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,**putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair.**_ " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we saw in North Carolina with a race that was not settled for 6 months after Election Day. **[Help us protect voting rights in Iowa, North Carolina, and beyond with $25 or more today and make every vote count>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109056114/549863244/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=t3YTfAomepUA6s0waiQfoKlfijj49fcAoNMbowbowgz4EP9DQ5u9Bfmlcvtr83bdBG7IxlAJ8XVuDK5bNilWiJSWJoTGn8vp8Tcrxzy2tvg=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlMzhlZjUxLTUwNDItZjAxMS1hNWYxLTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vsAmJo8UN-3LJJUArde44BLV19F8dw0H-RIuit30U20=&emci=3f8e8aed-1942-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=8e38ef51-5042-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: Des Moines Register: Iowa is changing when candidates can request a recount — and who conducts them. Here's how.| | | Iowa's legislature isn't making these changes for fairness, for efficiency, or for a better democracy. It's to protect their power and shave the edges off our democracy so they stay in control. | | | Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa by just 0.19 points after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to 0.15 points. But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? Of course not. Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power. The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Those aren't the only changes -- this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race. Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged ," she said. "But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair. " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we saw in North Carolina with a race that was not settled for 6 months after Election Day. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. We need to keep Governor Wes Moore fighting for Maryland,
Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250605-1?refcode=em-20250605-1&refcode2=142_1086043_qZ9GuF&akid=142%2E1086043%2EqZ9GuF ]If you're already fired up to support our reelection, you can chip in
right here.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250605-1?refcode=em-20250605-1&refcode2=142_1086043_qZ9GuF&akid=142%2E1086043%2EqZ9GuF ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250605-1?refcode=em20250605-1

Wes is fighting for Maryland so that all our families can thrive — not to
mention he’s doing so against the brutal headwinds of a Trump
administration that is making things harder for folks in Maryland and
nationwide.

While they are increasing costs, Wes is fighting for the middle class to
have access to work, wages, and wealth.

While they are laying off federal workers, Wes is fighting for these
public servants to get support and new opportunities.

While they’re hurting businesses with the threat of tariffs, Wes is
fighting for small business owners who want to help drive Maryland’s
economy forward.

Under Governor Moore’s leadership we are making historic investments in
public education, taking smart approaches to public safety, and cutting or
keeping taxes the same for 94% of Marylanders. That’s what meeting the
moment looks like,
Peter. That’s why we need Wes
fighting for Maryland.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250605-1?refcode=em-20250605-1&refcode2=142_1086043_qZ9GuF&akid=142%2E1086043%2EqZ9GuF ]If you’re with us, will you chip in $5 today? Your
grassroots contribution directly supports Wes Moore’s work, so it is
powerfully important in this moment.

Thanks, Peter.

— Wes Moore HQ

name: Michael Bennet
subject: They called me a pirate...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
Ahoy mateys,
Friend, these aren’t normal times, and we can’t go about business as usual.
This week, I invoked a rarely used procedural move in the Senate to add the only Democratic amendment to the Republican crypto bill and rein in President Trump’s rampant corruption.
My amendment would ban the President and the Vice President from issuing or endorsing stablecoins, a type of cryptocurrency—and now, because of my legislative "piracy," I became the first Democrat to force my colleagues to take on Trump’s crypto corruption in the Senate.
We all know this administration reeks of corruption. President Trump and his family have repeatedly used their positions to issue and promote shady cryptocurrencies for their financial gain. Just a few weeks ago, he hosted a private dinner at one of his properties for the top holders of his meme coin.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
I know Coloradans aren’t just deeply worried about this corruption, they’re mad about it too. I’m not going to sit quietly and follow protocol while the President takes advantage of the American people.
That’s why I hijacked the Senate floor and placed my amendment directly onto the GENIUS Act. Republicans need Democratic votes to pass this legislation—and the Democrats should seriously rethink their support for this bill that, if unchanged, will only enable Trump's corruption (shiver me timbers!).
I won’t let anyone—Republicans or Democrats—grease the wheels of crypto corruption. If that means acting like a pirate and taking over normal Senate proceedings, then that is what I’ll do.
Folks, I could use your support in this fight. Can you join me in fighting Trump by sending us some gold coins now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250605_bennethijack_act]
Fair winds,
Michael & Capt. Flint the Cat
