**[When the U.S. Gets a Downgrade,
No One Is Safe.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxszz-vmzAUBfBPYzaQff2HZPCQllJVqTqkldp0qW5sQ1zZQAwE5ds_kYcyvfX6d3SOMQ7BNw9Nyk8E4OrtSAAIPxCA23mJaf4fj19zGvktv6kfUa6v8Hmjd3jhzuD3L-dvf_D4U4zlif3ad3-Pd_bi02NwL7yVFi6iD-u1rDKreWOpyJxmpdgzuZNUZFe9E0aZRgiFF8UZk4o35kJFw3gjubWYeQ0UJFVUAgPGZSGpEjtbShDGsWbviKDPngKjS94gG6cFU-r7WJg-ZkFfp2kYn8NqAnUYCgzBtR4749o-2FURqLd0bvulaxNaZ1fP63mK_8Z-TsYRXh3eUe3TOP3GdOrXqFpJdNbPkfCqMpPdbgbjgL7tPg5SlVOZJW2HxYfgR1USQdvnT9bddw1vAQAA__9H0IqL)** America's credit rating was just cut again - this time from a AAA to AA+. And it wasn't just Uncle Sam. Moody's has now downgraded **10 regional banks** and issued negative outlooks for even more. This isn't about "Wall Street noise." This is about the **foundation of your wealth, cost of your money, the stability of your bank, and the future of your retirement savings.** Here's what a downgrade actually means:
* ❌ Higher interest on U.S. debt
* ❌ More pressure on the dollar
* ❌ Greater strain on banks already exposed to risky bonds
* ❌ Lower confidence in America's financial system

And when confidence drops... **so do markets.** So ask yourself: Are you really comfortable having your nest egg - your 401(k), IRA, or savings - tied to paper assets that depend on the government's ability to pay its bills? **[That's why banks and more Americans are taking steps to hedge their retirement with real, physical gold and silver.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxszz-vmzAUBfBPYzaQff2HZPCQllJVqTqkldp0qW5sQ1zZQAwE5ds_kYcyvfX6d3SOMQ7BNw9Nyk8E4OrtSAAIPxCA23mJaf4fj19zGvktv6kfUa6v8Hmjd3jhzuD3L-dvf_D4U4zlif3ad3-Pd_bi02NwL7yVFi6iD-u1rDKreWOpyJxmpdgzuZNUZFe9E0aZRgiFF8UZk4o35kJFw3gjubWYeQ0UJFVUAgPGZSGpEjtbShDGsWbviKDPngKjS94gG6cFU-r7WJg-ZkFfp2kYn8NqAnUYCgzBtR4749o-2FURqLd0bvulaxNaZ1fP63mK_8Z-TsYRXh3eUe3TOP3GdOrXqFpJdNbPkfCqMpPdbgbjgL7tPg5SlVOZJW2HxYfgR1USQdvnT9bddw1vAQAA__9H0IqL)** Not ETFs. Not gold stocks. Not promises. **Real metals. Stored securely. Held in your name.** **It's about control in an out-of-control system.** [**Download your FREE 2025 Gold and Silver Protection Guide and discover how to:**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxszz-vmzAUBfBPYzaQff2HZPCQllJVqTqkldp0qW5sQ1zZQAwE5ds_kYcyvfX6d3SOMQ7BNw9Nyk8E4OrtSAAIPxCA23mJaf4fj19zGvktv6kfUa6v8Hmjd3jhzuD3L-dvf_D4U4zlif3ad3-Pd_bi02NwL7yVFi6iD-u1rDKreWOpyJxmpdgzuZNUZFe9E0aZRgiFF8UZk4o35kJFw3gjubWYeQ0UJFVUAgPGZSGpEjtbShDGsWbviKDPngKjS94gG6cFU-r7WJg-ZkFfp2kYn8NqAnUYCgzBtR4749o-2FURqLd0bvulaxNaZ1fP63mK_8Z-TsYRXh3eUe3TOP3GdOrXqFpJdNbPkfCqMpPdbgbjgL7tPg5SlVOZJW2HxYfgR1USQdvnT9bddw1vAQAA__9H0IqL)
* ✅ Legally move funds from your IRA or 401(k) into physical metals

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I never imagined this was possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Growing up I never imagined this future was possible, Peter.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
**I’m Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** Tammy said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride.
Growing up gay in New Hampshire, I never imagined this future was possible, Peter.
While I was lucky to receive love and support from family and friends, it was still hard to picture a time when I would be able to live openly let alone be elected to Congress.
I certainly never imagined the community I grew up in would embrace me, believe in me, and elect me to represent them — not just once, but four times in a row.
Now because of the progress we’ve made together, I’m running for U.S. Senate. And if elected **I’d make history as the first openly gay man to ever serve in that chamber.**
[**Will you help me make history? Pitch in $10 to support my grassroots campaign and Tammy Baldwin now.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.OcyrX_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
When I came out, there were examples of LGBTQ+ trailblazers — like Harvey Milk — who had been elected to public office. But it wasn’t a very long list. I knew that if I was going to serve my neighbors the way I envisioned, I’d need to break some barriers of my own.
With the support of my community, I became the first openly gay man to represent New Hampshire in Congress back in 2018. I defeated the GOP four times in one of the most competitive districts in the country. Now I’m fighting to keep our U.S. Senate seat blue.
New Hampshire is one of the most critical swing states in this election cycle. Republicans are targeting this race, aiming to flip this competitive seat red and expand their majority.
But we’re going to stop them together, just like we’ve done before. We’re going to keep this seat blue — _and_ we’re going to defy expectations when we take back the Senate.
This campaign means so much, Peter. It’s something that my younger self would never have even imagined. And not only is this race our opportunity to make LGBTQ+ history, it’s a crucial election we can’t afford to lose to the GOP. The stakes are simply too high.
[**If it makes sense for you today, please split a $10 contribution to my campaign and Tammy Baldwin right now.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.OcyrX_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.XM_kl8&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.smhoIC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.yQp2g_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.tfwH19&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.exmUVL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-partner_ms_cp_em_baldwin.KiXIOA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250605_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)
---
**Happy Pride Month, Peter.**
And thank you — as always — for your kindness and support.
With gratitude,
Chris Pappas
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4744%2E35263%2EMhQKbO)**

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: What is weighing heaviest on your mind right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, the chaos coming from Washington Republicans is showing no signs of stopping anytime soon.
They voted to keep Trump's Tariff Tax in place – forcing working families to continue bearing the brunt of this president's reckless trade war. They just released their plan to gut Medicaid – a plan that would rip health care away from millions of Americans. And at every turn, they're slashing and burning crucial services to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
It's the honor of my life to fight for you in the Senate, and I'm doing everything I possibly can to hold the line against Donald Trump and his allies in Washington. **But at a moment when there are so many challenges that folks are facing in their everyday lives because of Trump's disastrous agenda, it's crucial that I hear about what is top of mind for you right now.**
**[That's why I asked my team to put together a brief focus group so you can share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly, and I'm counting on your participation this month. Will you take a moment now to let me know what is weighing heaviest on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109057278/549866879/1195651860?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5544-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ4N2EzNi01NDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmJ7_C4xzyJu29TciQjZ2G3ZdC66n3hBBlFYNlZG3vM=&emci=70b94050-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6f487a36-5442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)**
| | [Begin the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109057279/549866880/1195651860?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5544-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjQ4N2EzNi01NDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UmJ7_C4xzyJu29TciQjZ2G3ZdC66n3hBBlFYNlZG3vM=&emci=70b94050-4442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6f487a36-5442-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1586379)
---
I know this is a dark chapter in our country's history, but we cannot give in to despair. The disastrous agenda that Donald Trump and Washington Republicans are pushing is wildly unpopular, and we can win the battles ahead of us so long as we're fighting together.
Now and always, that is my steadfast promise to you: **I will never stop fighting for you and your family. For lower everyday costs. For our health care. For our fundamental freedoms. For the issues you care about most.**
Thanks for taking a moment to share your thoughts with me. It's a huge help as I work to make sure I'm focused on your top priorities in the Senate.
Sincerely,
Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=i9yusKMXzfGpGSO5%2FmgHL7TmFnnQiPz0q2gttftNvPFY%2BBNXQ3DF9DLa3gIHI0s1sYBq7Bdij3OCIxcFeQoYCOxHshSlr8JFKgIpMHlmhHdlENGOlvqUhj9dMbaVPqODMef82yN9yMnfwgCFW08oaV5GW40YiRLyngUN8BJyQZUx9D5mxK7gkmffF1v7yHXF6RVNxVX5gOq72K0hmn23jdFZbI3kHb3VxpaCEo1dqHbGFpVKAAlKOrg3tT6ArR9thpyXPSGhuDfBM7fxhGtPpii1Wu%2BV98WM02g%2B0yy5iNeYnWf0D2F5VknBa1d%2BH%2B7z%2BSIQYVmliR4jp6yBth%2Bj%2BNDomPftYOHHi0tR2eQfZN4QhR%2FTTQVf3LA1tDTAr%2BkdaLOY3DP%2BWtkgLcc3kf95wIi1GAwdF7UdMQLwAEddyrE%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. This week on _Amped Up_ , Cliff Schecter sits down with the incomparable Shannon Watts--founder of Moms Demand Action and author of the brand-new book _Fired Up_. What follows is part masterclass in grassroots activism, part therapy session for a country that still hasn't dealt with its gun violence trauma.
Shannon walks us through the moment that transformed her from a suburban mom folding laundry in Indiana into a force the NRA had to reckon with. Spoiler: It started with rage and a Facebook page, and ended with a national movement that's flipped legislatures and rewritten the playbook on political power.
🔥 If stories like Shannon's fire you up--if you believe in grassroots power, taking on the NRA and building change from the ground up--you're in the right place. Become a Paid Subscriber to _Blue Amp_ for bold interviews, fearless commentary and the truth they don't want you to hear. Let's raise hell--together. 👊
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.xyDyydoSLYXuRN-Ym9_pb2MUG6S_cuTCTJVGWLRtCmA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165276623)
Alongside guest host David Shuster, Cliff and Shannon dive deep into the maddening 2013 Senate vote that killed the Manchin-Toomey background check bill--even after 20 children were slaughtered at Sandy Hook. That betrayal became the fuel for Watts' movement. And in typical Cliff fashion, he joined Shannon in pulling no punches on the Democrats who sold out to the NRA, only to find themselves politically extinct a few years later.
It's a history lesson and a warning shot: if you're not with the people, the people will move on without you.
But this episode isn't just about tragedy and political cowardice--it's about how women have turned pain into power. _Fired Up_ isn't just a memoir, it's a how-to guide for igniting your own spark at any age. Shannon explains her "fire formula"--a recipe of values, abilities, and desires that, when lit, can burn through the bullshit society throws at women.
Shannon shares stories of women who ran for office, launched new careers, or simply refused to disappear after public failure. The takeaway? You don't have to be perfect--you just have to be relentless.
The conversation also hits the gritty reality of blowback. Watts details the coordinated threats she faced--sexualized, targeted, and relentless--and how the far-right, including people like Dana Loesch, tried to make her a cautionary tale.
But instead, she became a symbol of what happens when you refuse to shut up and sit down. From Texas militias open-carrying at rallies to the quiet strength of community organizing in red states, Shannon's been in the trenches--and she's still fighting.
In the end, Shannon, David & Cliff reminds us--again--that incremental change isn't weakness, it's how you win the long game. And Shannon's story proves it. From Indiana to California to now Florida (yes, _that_ Florida), she's still building bonfires across the country--both literal and metaphorical. And if you're still asking what you can do in the face of rising authoritarianism, here's your answer: Find your fire, find your people, and never let the bastards wear you down.
* * *
Thank you [Matt Robison](https://open.substack.com/users/13271771-matt-robison?utm_source=mentions), [Sharon B.](https://open.substack.com/users/8448008-sharon-b?utm_source=mentions), [Donald A. L. Macintyre](https://open.substack.com/users/107662121-donald-a-l-macintyre?utm_source=mentions), [Greg Owens](https://open.substack.com/users/2529622-greg-owens?utm_source=mentions), [Megan Humphreys](https://open.substack.com/users/632127-megan-humphreys?utm_source=mentions), and many others for tuning into my live video with [Shannon Watts](https://open.substack.com/users/3953875-shannon-watts?utm_source=mentions) and [David](https://open.substack.com/users/16891317-david?utm_source=mentions)! Join me for my next live video in the app.

Folks, At a recent town hall, Senator Joni Ernst was asked about Republican efforts to gut Medicaid. Her response? “Well, we all are going to die.” That’s not just flippant — it’s a sign of what the GOP really thinks about health care. Their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” could strip coverage from millions, leaving vulnerable families across the country without care. It’s the same playbook we’ve seen from them before: cut essential programs to pay for billionaires’ tax breaks and leave everyday people to deal with the fallout. Martin Heinrich is standing up to this recklessness. In the Senate, he’s fighting to protect access to health care, defend our public lands and waters, and build a future where New Mexico families aren’t treated like an afterthought. **[Your support helps us keep Martin in the fight. Friend,

If I’ve learned anything, it’s that winning the White House and Congress isn’t enough.

We need to build lasting infrastructure to _**hold the line**_ and keep the radical left from stealing this country ever again!

**Turning Point PAC is establishing permanent field offices in every critical battleground state in America.**

We’re building the Red Wall across America — a conservative ground game so strong, so organized, and so relentless that the radical left’s ballot-harvesting machines and billionaire-funded operatives won’t stand a chance.

**Will you be a part of this critical mission?** We need your help.

📕 When you donate $50 or more, you’ll receive a copy of my new book, _**Right Wing Revolution**_.

📕 If you donate $250 or more, _I’ll sign it before I send it to you_ as a thank-you for fueling this fight.

This isn’t about one election. This is about taking our country back and _**keeping it**_.

Not just for 2026. Not just for 2028. **Permanently!**

I’m asking you to help Turning Point PAC make the America First movement into the future of our country.

It’s no easy task.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today to ask for your help opening permanent field offices in must-win states.

Your donation doesn’t just help us win elections.

You are helping us **save the Republic**.

It’s so important that I’m willing to send you a copy of my new book, _**Right Wing Revolution**_ , when you donate $50 or more. And if you donate $250 or more, I’ll send you a signed copy.

Please help us [finish the America First revolution](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) and build the Red Wall today.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: We’ve waited 25 years for this moment.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
Tonight marks the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/360538cca78f/weve-waited-25-years-for-this-moment?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=725beddd22&e=606d7e9aa2)
| **Dear Friend,**
Tonight marks the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign, [**and I need your help.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=52307c477e&e=606d7e9aa2)
For the first time in 25 years, **the seat for House District 49 is open**. It’s a rare opportunity to elect real leadership in Southside Virginia, someone with deep roots in this community and a lifetime of service to back it up.
But let me be blunt: my opponent and his MAGA allies are **trying to buy this seat.** He’s already poured tens of thousands of dollars into his own campaign, backed by extremists who want to turn **back the clock on healthcare, public education, and basic decency.**
I didn’t get into this race to play politics. I got into it because I’ve spent the last 36 years **caring for patients, running a small business, and helping lead Danville’s comeback from the ground up.** I know what it means to serve, and I know Southside Virginia deserves a delegate who listens, solves problems, and never stops fighting for working families.
**This race matters, not just for Southside, but for all of Virginia.** Every House of Delegates seat we win is a step toward stopping the chaos and extremism coming from the Trump wing of the GOP.
We need to meet this moment with strength and unity. Will you chip in before midnight to help us hit our goal?
[**Let’s make this a race about people, not power.**](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=31022b0ab4&e=606d7e9aa2)**
****– Dr. Gary Miller**
Candidate for House of Delegates, District 49
---
| [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=2ea8714d02&e=606d7e9aa2)

subject: This one felt personal.

body:
|
#
Friend, I’m rarely shocked by what happens in Washington these days – but this one felt personal. When it came time to vote, David Valadao had a choice: protect the people he was elected to represent – or side with MAGA Republicans and billionaire donors. **He chose them.** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058069/549869900/701031030?refcode=em-6.5.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM4OWUzNjgtNTg0Mi1mMDExLWE1ZjEtNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=roVYS-KWvLZHB2Ahh14jirZxPinnLaA2jZbX0O3dWvU=)
**Nine California Republicans voted for Trump’s cruel budget bill.

_[Valadao] joined 215 representatives in passing President Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill.”_

He voted for a cruel budget that guts healthcare, defunds schools, and hands more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.
**Remember: nearly 70% of folks in CA-22 rely on MediCal for their healthcare – the highest rate of any congressional district in the entire country.**
Valadao may call himself a moderate. But his vote tells the real story – and it’s not one that ends well for the working families of our community.
This district is one of the most competitive in the country. Valadao barely held on last cycle – and with your help, we can flip this seat and elect someone who will actually fight for working families.

clean_body: | Friend, I’m rarely shocked by what happens in Washington these days – but this one felt personal. When it came time to vote, David Valadao had a choice: protect the people he was elected to represent – or side with MAGA Republicans and billionaire donors. He chose them. | = Nine California Republicans voted for Trump’s cruel budget bill. Remember them | Opinion [Valadao] joined 215 representatives in passing President Donald Trump’s “Big, Beautiful Bill.” = He voted for a cruel budget that guts healthcare, defunds schools, and hands more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. Remember: nearly 70% of folks in CA-22 rely on MediCal for their healthcare – the highest rate of any congressional district in the entire country. Valadao may call himself a moderate. But his vote tells the real story – and it’s not one that ends well for the working families of our community. This district is one of the most competitive in the country. Valadao barely held on last cycle – and with your help, we can flip this seat and elect someone who will actually fight for working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. It's Thursday and we have an amazing panel show for you today! Karine Jean Pierre was missing out on the fun, so she decided to write a book. Watching Jake Tapper on the sidelines make money off of the lie he perpetrated inspired her to make money in the same way. Remember, Biden used to "run circles around her" he was so fit. President Trump spoke to Vladimir Putin and he expressed his intent to retaliate for the Ukrainian drone strike unleashed on Russian aircraft the other day. This will certainly slow down any talks of peace for the region. Two Chinese Nationals were arrested for brining a dangerous fungus into the U.S. The dangerous biological pathogen would of been an economic nightmare, wiping out crops and causing liver damage if consumed. It's just the latest in egregious actions on China's part. At the same time, Harvard's 2025 commencement speaker worked for a CCP entity with ties to Beijing's military and intelligence networks. Our panel weighs in on the threat we face from China. As Kamala Harris weighs her decision run for president or governor of California, we get exclusive insight as to where she stands today! PLUS this week's winners and losers...
Featuring:
**Nan Hayworth**
Former U.S. Congresswoman | New York, District 19

**“Fear is not the only thing that’s contagious.
Courage is contagious.”**
She warned of the Trump Administration’s “wholesale abandonment” of American ideals and emphasized that in the face of fear and division, we must stand united.

Harris’s journey began with Emerge, and now she’s urging us to empower the next generation of Democratic women leaders.

name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: I was the only candidate to support raising the minimum wage last night.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
#
Peter -
You need to see this important news from last night’s gubernatorial forum, Peter. Take a look at The Sacramento Bee’s reporting:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058302/549870471/772200552?Refcode=250605-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghxbWdEXrwSB4GUDYcg0O6Fgv0ufk_jYA8f8tu7-ZSU=&emci=83638e9f-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f289e368-5842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18887817)
I was proud to be the only candidate to advocate for raising the minimum wage. While my opponents turned their backs on our workers and unions, I made clear that what’s right for California families will always come first when I’m governor.
Refusing to support better wages throws poor people under the bus. Minimum wage workers are the people who make our economies run.
The deck is stacked against them as Trump and Republicans threaten to raise costs even more. With Trump pushing a disastrous trade war, we cannot afford to abandon working people.
Workers are the backbone of California’s economy. A strong middle class lifts all ships and makes it possible for all of us to succeed.
That’s why I am proud to stand with workers in the fight for living wages.
[**If you agree that we need to raise the minimum wage, please add your name to stand with me today. Our state is blessed with incredible success. In the world’s fourth-largest economy, we need to make sure it works for ALL Californians.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058303/549870487/772200552?Refcode=250605-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghxbWdEXrwSB4GUDYcg0O6Fgv0ufk_jYA8f8tu7-ZSU=&emci=83638e9f-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f289e368-5842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18887817)
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058304/549870497/772200552?Refcode=250605-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghxbWdEXrwSB4GUDYcg0O6Fgv0ufk_jYA8f8tu7-ZSU=&emci=83638e9f-4e42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f289e368-5842-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=18887817)****
Best,
Eleni Kounalakis

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Cruelty is the point.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I don’t know what the sense of urgency is here.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058375/549870637/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250605cruelty_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQSGAxnA-zEYVjzLd7ce46Pgr5fArLIzmNJ9SEbe_K4=) This bill is a “disgusting abomination.” That’s their words, not mine, Peter.

That is what the GOP is continuing to push through in Washington as they work to ensure that 3 million Americans lose access to food assistance, cut $260 billion from SNAP, and add $4 trillion to our national debt in order to give handouts to billionaires.

**You read that right: Republicans are stealing from _my_ constituents, from _our_ communities, to give tax breaks to the wealthiest people in our country. This bill is callous, cruel, and careless.**

Listen, I don't know if there's a flash sale on beach houses, Botox, or private jets. I don’t know what the sense of urgency is here that they think they need to take money from people who are veterans, seniors, children, people with disabilities, and more – people who are relying on these services, not as a line item in a budget, but as a lifeline – in order to hoard money for the top 1%. **But these cuts are going to devastate communities, and we need to continue fighting back.**

**[**It’s clear: The cruelty _is the point_ , and we are NOT going to stand for it. Help support me as I work to hold Republicans accountable by rushing $5 today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058377/549870640/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250605cruelty_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQSGAxnA-zEYVjzLd7ce46Pgr5fArLIzmNJ9SEbe_K4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109058378/549870642/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250605cruelty_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTg5ZTM2OC01ODQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQSGAxnA-zEYVjzLd7ce46Pgr5fArLIzmNJ9SEbe_K4=)******

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Power starts with you — share your priorities with the Squad
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250605-1374-foote&t=1001&akid=1374%2E342411%2EIP2l-a ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter,

It’s no secret that at the Squad Victory Fund, our strategy starts with
you.

Right now, we’re mapping out our next steps to defend our progressive
values and support a Squad that fights for us all — and we need your
input.

Our power comes from the people. That means you. And when you share your
priorities, we turn that into action on the ground to drive the fights
that matter most to this movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-june/?source=em20250605-1374&t=1002&akid=1374%2E342411%2EIP2l-a ]Can you take a few minutes to fill out our June Priorities Survey?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-2025-june/?source=em20250605-1374&t=1003&akid=1374%2E342411%2EIP2l-a ]Take the Survey

It only takes a minute or two, and your perspective powers everything we
do next.

Thanks for being in this with us.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are standing strong against Trump’s
dangerous policies and extremist agenda — but they cannot do it alone.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/svfem-20250605-movement?refcode=em20250605-1374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=1374_342411_IP2l-a&akid=1374%2E342411%2EIP2l-a ]Please make a contribution today to support the Squad.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1374%2E342411%2EIP2l-a

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Daniel Pardee
subject: Josh means what he says
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Every campaign sign Josh has had since 2016 has said “Lower Taxes” on it.

Team, Josh has delivered on that promise, helping to expand the Child Tax Credit and working on bringing millions back to Jersey for essentials like firetrucks, new roads, and clean drinking water. He meant it in 2016, and he means it now.

Our state deserves a leader who’ll make life easier for young people, families, seniors, and small business owners. We need a Governor who will always stand up for Jersey values — not a far-right agenda.

Josh is ready to go on offense to protect our state, our Jersey Values, and the great people who live here, but he can’t do it without your help. Primary Day is only 5 days away , so click here to help Jersey elect the Governor it deserves. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JcKdD-Q5sEmr2Bb9s_L8tg2?amount=]

Thank you,

Daniel Pardee
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , or to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 [] [] []

name: Heather G.
subject: I’m gay. I’m angry. I’m fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend — Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’m gay.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90825?t=6&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD) Pride Month is meant to be a celebration — of queerness, of resilience, of living our truth out loud. **But in 2025, it feels more like a warning.**

Republicans aren’t just attacking LGTBQIA+ people with harmful rhetoric — they’re turning it into law. Since Trump took office again this year, here’s what they’ve done:

• They **banned** gender-affirming care for trans kids (including adults) in over 20 states.

• They **erased** federal recognition of transgender people.

• They **banned** trans girls from school sports nationwide.

• They’re trying to **remove** Pride flags in schools, libraries, and government buildings.

• They’re pushing laws **forcing** trans people to use the wrong bathrooms.

• They’re **cutting** LGBTQIA+ suicide prevention funding from the 988 crisis line.

• They’re **gutting** DEI programs and blocking LGBTQ+ history in schools.

• They’re allowing red states like Iowa to **strip** civil rights protections for trans people entirely.

This isn’t just a rollback of rights — it’s a full-blown assault on our humanity.

[The Voter Protection Project is fighting back by working to defeat Republican anti-LGTBQIA+ extremists by replacing them with Democrats who will protect LGTBQIA+ people — and the democracy we depend on. If you believe in that mission, will you chip in this Pride Month to help us fight back?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90826?t=7&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD) | [CONTRIBUTE $7 NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90826?t=8&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
---
**Here’s the truth:** Over 80% of Americans support laws that protect LGBTQIA+ people from discrimination.

But Republicans don’t care what the majority wants — they’re suppressing votes, gerrymandering districts, and silencing entire communities just to cling to power and force their hate-filled agenda on the rest of us.

They know they can’t win fairly, so they’re rigging the system to strip us of our rights — one bill, one vote, one voice at a time.

[I’m tired of watching my community be vilified, erased, and attacked just for simply existing. If you are too, now’s the time to act. Help us organize, protect the vote, and defeat these extremists at the ballot box — before they do even more damage.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90826?t=9&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90827?t=10&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90828?t=11&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90829?t=12&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90830?t=13&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90826?t=14&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
With pride and resolve,

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20114%2E878179%2ECfb_fD)

Hey there,
**Good news:** Your state Dems wrapped up some serious wins for working families in Carson City. Things that you’ve made known were the priority for a vibrant, healthy, and safe Nevada.
**Bad news:** Governor Lombardo is being heavy-handed with his vetoes. He’s already stacking up 33 vetoes and counting in this session alone including:
❌Capping rent increases for vulnerable Nevadans
❌Penalizing fake electors who work to overturn our elections and undermine democracy
❌Preventing anyone convicted of a hate crime from purchasing a firearm
❌Raising the age to buy assault weapons from 18 to 21
❌A bipartisan bill allowing state peace officers to bargain collectively

clean_body: | | | | Hey there, Good news: Your state Dems wrapped up some serious wins for working families in Carson City. Things that you’ve made known were the priority for a vibrant, healthy, and safe Nevada. Bad news: Governor Lombardo is being heavy-handed with his vetoes. He’s already stacking up 33 vetoes and counting in this session alone including: ❌Capping rent increases for vulnerable Nevadans ❌Penalizing fake electors who work to overturn our elections and undermine democracy ❌Preventing anyone convicted of a hate crime from purchasing a firearm ❌Raising the age to buy assault weapons from 18 to 21 ❌A bipartisan bill allowing state peace officers to bargain collectively It’s clear — Governor Lombardo is not working in the best interest of Nevadans. When families just want relief and to see the legislators they elected take action, Governor Lombardo is blocking progress. name: Republican Cruelty Alert via Care in Action
subject: Joni Ernst: “Well, we are all going to die.”
body:
Turn Senator Ernst’s cruel comments into a tipping point!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109059586/549875173/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTExY2RmZi01ZDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ska5UaNTQjVSFFRWIWrh964CJcfWPg03A-u2y_-GIi4=&emci=8a30bdb9-4b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9e11cdff-5d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109059587/549875174/-564680802?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTExY2RmZi01ZDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ska5UaNTQjVSFFRWIWrh964CJcfWPg03A-u2y_-GIi4=&emci=8a30bdb9-4b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9e11cdff-5d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Right now, millions of families who rely on Medicaid to survive are waiting, terrified, to find out whether the Senate will agree to cut Medicaid or keep this vital lifeline.
**Republican Senator Joni Ernst’s response to these heartbreaking concerns: “Well, we all are going to die.”**
[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109059588/549875175/-564680802?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTExY2RmZi01ZDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ska5UaNTQjVSFFRWIWrh964CJcfWPg03A-u2y_-GIi4=&emci=8a30bdb9-4b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9e11cdff-5d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
Ernst’s comments are outrageous and highlight the gulf within the Republican party with so-called Medicaid Moderates who are concerned the House cuts to Medicaid go too far.
**This Republican infighting is our opportunity to peel crucial votes away** — and we all have an important role to play in tipping the balance by flooding our Senators‘ offices with messages that any cuts to Medicaid will be hugely damaging in the midterms.
**We can turn Senator Ernst’s cruel comments into a tipping point if we move fast to maximize the political pain** of dismissing constituents‘ legitimate concerns about cuts to Medicaid.
[**Will you urgently help flood your Senators’ inboxes with messages denouncing Senator Ernst’s comments and asking them to commit to Save Medicaid in the Senate?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109059589/549875176/-564680802?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTExY2RmZi01ZDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ska5UaNTQjVSFFRWIWrh964CJcfWPg03A-u2y_-GIi4=&emci=8a30bdb9-4b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9e11cdff-5d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109059590/549875177/-564680802?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-senate-save-medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTExY2RmZi01ZDQyLWYwMTEtYTVmMS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ska5UaNTQjVSFFRWIWrh964CJcfWPg03A-u2y_-GIi4=&emci=8a30bdb9-4b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9e11cdff-5d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&ceid=864787)
With Democrats in a united front to protect Medicaid, some Republican Senators see the writing on the wall and are sounding the alarm, **even calling cutting Medicaid “politically suicidal.”** But others are demanding even larger cuts in order to help pay for the massive tax cuts for billionaires and the ultra-wealthy that are also in this bill.
Let’s be clear: every Republican Senator knows these drastic Medicaid cuts are extremely unpopular. **They’re all just making a political judgement call about how much cruelty they can get away with before it comes back to bite them at the ballot box.**
That’s why it’s critical that the overwhelming response to Senator Ernst’s cruel comments is immediate condemnation and political pressure on all Senators to reject the Medicaid cuts in the House-passed bill.

clean_body: Turn Senator Ernst’s cruel comments into a tipping point! Right now, millions of families who rely on Medicaid to survive are waiting, terrified, to find out whether the Senate will agree to cut Medicaid or keep this vital lifeline. Republican Senator Joni Ernst’s response to these heartbreaking concerns: “Well, we all are going to die.” Ernst’s comments are outrageous and highlight the gulf within the Republican party with so-called Medicaid Moderates who are concerned the House cuts to Medicaid go too far. This Republican infighting is our opportunity to peel crucial votes away — and we all have an important role to play in tipping the balance by flooding our Senators‘ offices with messages that any cuts to Medicaid will be hugely damaging in the midterms. We can turn Senator Ernst’s cruel comments into a tipping point if we move fast to maximize the political pain of dismissing constituents‘ legitimate concerns about cuts to Medicaid. With Democrats in a united front to protect Medicaid, some Republican Senators see the writing on the wall and are sounding the alarm, even calling cutting Medicaid “politically suicidal.” But others are demanding even larger cuts in order to help pay for the massive tax cuts for billionaires and the ultra-wealthy that are also in this bill. Let’s be clear: every Republican Senator knows these drastic Medicaid cuts are extremely unpopular. They’re all just making a political judgement call about how much cruelty they can get away with before it comes back to bite them at the ballot box. That’s why it’s critical that the overwhelming response to Senator Ernst’s cruel comments is immediate condemnation and political pressure on all Senators to reject the Medicaid cuts in the House-passed bill. As always, thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: Our democracy is on a knife’s edge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions on some of the biggest cases of our times. We’re coordinating the rapid response. | |
---
Peter, The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions for this term today. If the usual pattern holds, they’ll start with the least controversial cases, with major decisions coming in a flurry at the end of the month. **It can be hard to keep up with the background, legal terms, and implications of each of the Court’s decisions. That’s why United for Democracy is here.** We’re watching the Court so you don’t have to. And we’re coordinating the messaging for thousands of allies across the country. **Every Monday and Thursday this month, we’re shifting into high gear and producing videos, press releases, talking points, blast emails, and rapid response social media to keep the American people informed on exactly what the Supreme Court is up to.** Many of the cases the MAGA Court rules on this month will have an impact on our communities for decades to come. We can’t allow their most destructive decisions to be met with silence and resignation. **Instead, we’re rallying our allies to stand up for our democracy and our rights—from the smallest threats to the most existential ones.** [**We’re building the tidal wave response to the MAGA Supreme Court’s every decision in June. We won’t allow elite forces to strip our democracy for parts without a fight. Chip in today to grow our rapid response operation. * **_U.S. v. Skrmetti_** will determine how deeply states are allowed to legislate against the rights of transgender Americans.
* **_Mahmoud v. Taylor_** will determine if parents can pull students out of class during educational exercises they don’t like.
* **_Medina v. Planned Parenthood of South Atlantic_** will determine whether states can stop Medicaid coverage of life-saving reproductive care from Planned Parenthood.

clean_body: The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions on some of the biggest cases of our times. We’re coordinating the rapid response. | | Peter, The Supreme Court started dropping their decisions for this term today. If the usual pattern holds, they’ll start with the least controversial cases, with major decisions coming in a flurry at the end of the month. It can be hard to keep up with the background, legal terms, and implications of each of the Court’s decisions. That’s why United for Democracy is here. We’re watching the Court so you don’t have to. And we’re coordinating the messaging for thousands of allies across the country. Every Monday and Thursday this month, we’re shifting into high gear and producing videos, press releases, talking points, blast emails, and rapid response social media to keep the American people informed on exactly what the Supreme Court is up to. Many of the cases the MAGA Court rules on this month will have an impact on our communities for decades to come. We can’t allow their most destructive decisions to be met with silence and resignation. Instead, we’re rallying our allies to stand up for our democracy and our rights—from the smallest threats to the most existential ones. Several of the cases the Supreme Court will rule on this term have potentially extreme consequences for our most vulnerable community members: Trump v. CASA**** will determine whether Trump is allowed to strip Americans of the right to birthright citizenship. U.S. v. Skrmetti will determine how deeply states are allowed to legislate against the rights of transgender Americans. Mahmoud v. Taylor will determine if parents can pull students out of class during educational exercises they don’t like. Medina v. Planned Parenthood of South Atlantic will determine whether states can stop Medicaid coverage of life-saving reproductive care from Planned Parenthood. Braidwood v. Kennedy will determine whether the government can end Affordable Care Act coverage for preventive care like cancer screenings and diabetes tests. FCC v. Consumers’ Research will determine how much power the government can claw back from the vitally important Federal Communications Commission—and its decision would have financial implications for Leonard Leo, a friend of Justices Thomas and Alito, who refused to recuse themselves. Louisiana v. Phillip Callais will determine whether the redistricting map in Louisiana was redrawn to discriminate against Black voters, and whether future maps are allowed to discriminate as well. That’s a hell of a lot of ways the MAGA Supreme Court could chip away at our rights—and it’s not even the full list of cases they’ll decide. Our team is in Court-watching mode—scanning blogs, tweets, reports, and analyses for the latest updates on what the Supreme Court may decide. And we’ll turn everything we find out into short, easy-to-digest messaging you and our huge coalition can really use. Remember: The constitution belongs to us, not Leonard Leo, not his network of billionaires, not Donald Trump, and not MAGA extremist justices. We the People can keep our democracy alive, but only if we fight for it.** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for fighting to defend our democracy, Stasha Rhodes United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . name: Sarah McBride
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In the face of bigotry and backlash, let’s keep showing up — with courage, with grace, and with Pride.
#
Happy Pride!
Every June, I reflect on what Pride means — not just for me, but to so many in our communities who have fought to be seen, to be safe, and to be free.
Pride didn’t begin as a parade. It began as a protest. It was a demand for dignity in the face of violence, for truth in the face of invisibility. And even now, decades later, this spirit lives on in our resistance, in our resilience, and in our refusal to be erased.
The spirit of Pride is about justice. It’s about holding the full truth of who we are: **our identities, our stories, our pain, and our power.**
I think about my younger self, wondering if there would ever be space for someone like me to live fully, love deeply, and serve openly. I think about Andy and the love we shared. His memory reminds me that Pride is a promise — a commitment to keep fighting for a country where everyone can thrive.
**And now, as a member of Congress, I carry that promise into my work every day.**
I carry it for trans kids under attack. For families struggling to afford health care, child care, and housing. And for every person who feels unseen in the systems meant to serve and respect them.
And I carry it because I’ve seen the power of our proximity. The more we share our stories, the more we show up in our full humanity, the harder it is to deny our dignity. When we invite people in — not just to see us, but to _know_ us — that’s when hearts change.
**So this Pride Month, I hope you take time to celebrate how far we’ve come and recommit to the work still ahead. Whether you’re out and proud, still finding your way, or simply showing up as an ally, your presence matters.**
In the face of bigotry and backlash, let’s keep showing up with courage, with grace, and with Pride.
In solidarity,
Sarah
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250605-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250605-2066&refcode2=2066_21716_yYKIKt&akid=2066%2E21716%2EyYKIKt)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=1&akid=2066%2E21716%2EyYKIKt)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=2&akid=2066%2E21716%2EyYKIKt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2066%2E21716%2EyYKIKt)

clean_body: Will you help us flip this seat from red to blue? | = | Peter, We have exciting news: The Blue Dogs are endorsing Rebecca Cooke who is running for Congress against extremist Derrick Van Orden in Wisconsin’s 3rd district. This is our first endorsement of the 2026 cycle and we are thrilled to help Rebecca flip this seat from red to blue next year. = = = Rebecca was born and raised on a dairy farm and grew up in a working class family. She proudly waits tables at night to pay the bills, while running for Congress during the day. In 2024, she came within just a few points of flipping this seat – outperforming the top of the ticket and a winning Senate campaign in the district. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez voted for the SAVE Act. THREE times.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITjBm9aeMA9NdNZ7gfJT_2y1FpL7UTyIihjeBfNEpGy1gZDe6L02r9ui8ctbx4PbiE9U8YgiGoWot7ngSiYYHgSlGqI-_vjHOLXSLzRTdvA_TFmyRMfqe--BJwI1sv0R1LXo-h2GW2_LRMzCHF7sGkQlcKrtTdVI_0GPdGXFVnGg8WJypgm0y2R_1Zt0Uo4cAy_4QwlB_p1PggXf1pcRwlPIpyRa4X19UpLli38QsB3cq6-Pkzh1cKAGpHEF3w4cDf/4h3/iy7y1FvVSZqhybYyYLCNgw/h0/h001.assLVUAxE3wK95DpiNfTl-WbWiwLFU4BMKrSasSkgK8)

Peter,

Last week, my opponent Marie Gluesenkamp Perez sat down for an in-depth 25 minute long interview on _KGW8 's Straight Talk_.
If you were hoping for clarity or accountability, you didn't get it.

**What you got was a slap in the face.

** Marie used the segment to double down on some of the most dangerous elements of the MAGA agenda.
She praised parts of Trump's destructive tariff policy.
She repeated the right wing lie that non citizens are voting in our elections. And she proudly declared _" I voted for [the SAVE Act] three times."

_**That 's the same bill the League of Women Voters called a direct threat to voter rights and a disaster for women.

**She didn't stop there.

Asked about Democrats who came to her town hall to challenge her record, Marie dismissed them as people who _" had the ability to take time off work."

_**That 's how she talks about constituents asking for straight answers; she calls them elites.

**[**If you want a leader who won 't vilify their own base while authoritarianism rises, chip in now. This is about courage, not condescension. Let's take this seat back together.

**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDUKgSsolFu-6NztRr50RYghAKfmPjH8ZaDmhtJv0Km5GNOcDuDR6Owe5NbOrT-38qUZeB56MsCD9Lyh06WGQMNu1KkRaFZSREdHezPoJehb1H5k4Ca8ZUPqriQZzJhpxAwNqNYiCuOhxcYuNGvYnGtOvTZjqHAXQbkcH2nZaBw1rZubDDL5Ijf1gni8Dejvvb1EEN4ADPUZq3G6W0MbGIO51_fD6FImVOx5Upn_rwHLe7rzgvDDCyZ6h5I6g21aeDBbtOybl6H_W1ccpxzv_ri7aChDA-UP76uSOyPhwjQ0Qtsb7tUzLCQNm5HhS_AYxz3k2jylQqGZtcVSIAPetnW/4h3/iy7y1FvVSZqhybYyYLCNgw/h1/h001.I_FmAj2bzUD0_f8jv0mwJdGr7es6Yt98UVQ7n8TWLFk)Marie claims Washington doesn't need more _" partisan hacks."_
She talks about working-class values: celebrating trade careers, supporting small farms, and building a middle-class economy rooted in dignity and skill.

But this week, she headlined **WelcomeFest, a billionaire-funded DC** conference pushing the exact opposite: deregulation, union-busting, and an unhinged belief that Silicon Valley billionaires can fix the economy by gutting public services.

You can't claim to champion farmers while siding with the same tech elites trying to block their right to repair their own equipment.

You can't claim to support the trades while uplifting an agenda written by people who've spent years trying to automate those jobs out of existence.

Marie wants the populist image but her alliances tell the real story.
So if you're confused by Marie's rhetoric, you're not alone.
**She 's trying to appease everyone while standing for no one.

**I'm not here to gaslight or hedge. I'm here to lead.

We need clear, consistent, working-class leadership in Congress, not more Democrats voting like MAGA to protect their brand.

I know what it's like to be laid off. To be a full-time caregiver with no time to spare, juggling prescriptions, school pickups, and overdue bills in the same afternoon.

I've stood in line at urgent care with a sick kid, hoping the insurance goes through. I know what working families face because I am part of one.

**I 'm the exact kind of person Marie claims she's fighting for but her record says otherwise. So I'm stepping up myself, because we deserve someone who won't forget where they came from, or who they serve.** **
**[**If you 're ready for that kind of movement, contribute now and join our movement today!

**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUDUKgSsolFu-6NztRr50RYghAKfmPjH8ZaDmhtJv0Km5GNOcDuDR6Owe5NbOrT-38qUZeB56MsCD9Lyh06WGQMNJno8kCUrWTLqtpfBC1fUGnIqKzGACM67JD05cdK1uZe_jU71NQr2ptllGV2oLdExEFuEyIRC2QKflLDCo1AU6b_tmUa9cNcUoQvU62LFF5B2ix9j2cVGjPq2w5s0B_QW3xCPFsveq0iEyRTh9_m46u6RD3B8nrdbx3Z-fPKfIySGV39-4LF-1FpjIm9Pj_ev1CeGXdJmikUcQVOy0WaFUA37s-2HErAVT5CRoY9gqrcvq19795Sw-tv1eEqtRx6s/4h3/iy7y1FvVSZqhybYyYLCNgw/h2/h001.aJ88ZpaIal6XRi5VD2fKr150gwUJYJq24dW1n15CK1U)Let's Heal Washington!

Brent

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I am 35 years sober.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
You must face hard truths if you want to make change.
Hi Peter, it’s Deb Haaland.
Heartland Patriots said I could reach out, and I’m so grateful for the chance to connect with you.
I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress, which aired 7 years ago this week. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for saying that in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
Crime, poverty, homelessness, and addiction are weighing heavy on New Mexico, and I intend to tackle those challenges head-on as governor. I promise to be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.
Thank you for hearing my story, Peter. And I want to thank Heartland Patriots for their support. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign for governor and Heartland Patriots today. Every donation helps reach voters and win.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88697?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88698?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88697?refcode=em20250605-8986&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=8986%2E614464%2E4xHlAL)
---
Thank you for everything.
Deb

name: Membership Pending (via DOTL)
subject: #62008454 Notification for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
Help us flip the House, Senate, and stop Trump’s extremist takeover.

|
---
Peter, we need to level with you:

**Donald Trump **and his **MAGA enablers** – backed by billionaires – are plotting a total takeover of American democracy.

They’re already laying the groundwork to let Trump serve a third term, defund public broadcasting institutions like NPR & PBS, and they’ve attacked core government programs like Social Security!

_MAGA Republicans are working to make it so that Trump and his administration face no accountability, **and it’s despicable, Peter.

So I’m not backing down and will continue to fight in Congress to hold Trump accountable. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: = = = = = = We must hold Trump and his allies accountable, Peter. Rep. Zoe Lofgren | | Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. = | | | Paid for by Lofgren for Congress Lofgren for Congress PO Box 913 San Jose, CA 95113 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please .

name: Melton for Iowa
subject: Melton for Iowa 2026: Week of June 2, 2025: Well, We All Are Going to Die
body:
| | |

---

|
# Melton for Iowa 2026
---
---
| Hello Peter,

This is Ryan Melton, Democrat running for the U.S. House in Iowa's 4th Congressional District. During my 2026 campaign, I'll send you a weekly email to keep you in the loop while not overwhelming your inbox. Typically, the newsletter will be a review from the week prior: Where we went, what issues of note were on the minds of those I met with, where we'll be in the next week, etc.
Instead of my usual summary of my activities this past week, I am pressed to respond to the remarks of Senator Joni Ernst over the weekend. I'm sure you've heard of the incident: at a town hall meeting, a woman in the audience--in response to the proposed cuts to Medicaid--called out to Ms. Ernst, "People are going to die!" Ernst responded, "We're all going to die." The next day she made a mock apology as she walked through a cemetery proving that we're all going to die, and using the moment to tout Jesus and the afterlife in a way that I'd think most Christians would cringe at. As my wife and I talked about this, she reminded me of the parable of the Good Samaritan, a parable Ernst surely knows: After Jesus tells the crowd that the greatest commandments are to love God and to love your neighbor. A lawyer asks, "Who is my neighbor?" Jesus tells of a traveler on the way to Jericho who was mugged--badly beaten--and left to die on the side of the road. Two men saw the beaten man in the ditch. They were faux religious men. They talk about God and make a big show of how good they are, but they crossed to the other side of the road instead of helping. Then along comes a despised Samaritan. Looking at this man--someone's son, perhaps a husband and father--did he say, "We're all going to die"? No, he bandaged him and took the man in need of medical help to an inn where he paid for the care. The point is clear: the neighbor is the one who showed mercy and compassion, not the folks who talk a good game and use religion as a cover to earn prestige or gain votes but who don't act on those values. We see this quite a bit among politicians here in Iowa, who call themselves "pro-life" and quote the Bible but seem actually to be part of a death cult concerned more about taking from those in need to give to the rich (which the Bible also has something to say about), who pass laws that strip away human dignity instead of protecting it. I'm all for the afterlife but does that mean families don't care if their mother or father or grandmother or grandfather dies prematurely! No. My wife and I want our parents and grandparents around for as long as possible. They add richness to our lives.
Also, the tone deafness of these comments from Ernst, considering rural Iowa already is struggling with a lack of health care, especially in our heavily rural 4th Congressional District. Medicaid cuts will amplify the financial pressure rural hospitals are already buckling under, and yet Ernst mocks this pain. Shame on Ernst. Iowans deserve a senator who cares about them--and not about giving tax cuts to the ultra-rich and giant corporations by cutting to the bone vital programs that save lives.

We again are rejecting all Corporate PAC money, so we really rely on, and are extremely grateful for your support. We'll spend your donations on ways to expand our reach to as many voters as possible, including: -Post cards and other mailers and postage -Hand out cards for events -Text messaging campaigns -Transportation costs for events and door knocking -Campaign website costs -Radio ads, Social Media Ads, and (hopefully) TV ads -Our campaign staffers
Finally, if you have anyone else in mind that would like to be added to our email list or who would be interested in volunteering, let us know at melton4iowa@gmail.com!
Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton
[Donate to help our campaign!](https://fpglcyebb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zeU7blBsCOiOJP2FtP58nbjTLezHEWlBtMNwLqk7xaWEvnZ-n5eml3halXx1-IAQCUX9M2nVm4FTJ-wMoN7xG1ey-Ck9Zk9T7ylkBUhk6FuWgDPlQqxRohaCpOGvhUFCFaBPxifDtcCAgreaeelZpdigUBEGKO5qaR0T_v10VHo=&c=vqBToCr4Ksqjqe7Bd9LkKvbKNUcV8fA0qOudeSxmCg5lQ7iCyVPlHQ==&ch=tSE70Vb7vkgZaKShMYZEcFG6-euZv9oVhFZl9Mdn7gjtwC0CYHgSMg==)

Olive the Owl here! I’m not one to ruffle feathers, but I heard you haven’t claimed your free, starry Monte Rio Redwoods sticker yet... and just look at how it catches the light!

name: Sydney Kamlager
subject: The Ugly Break-up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SYDNEY KAMLAGER-DOVE FOR CONGRESS]( "PAID FOR BY SYDNEY KAMLAGER-DOVE FOR CONGRESS")
body:
👀👀💔💔 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cfeda9b8960b/fighting-for-this-country-14055590?e=e6ba7d1bc4)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Peter:
I predict this summer will get 🥵🥵🥵.

Republicans have already been feeling the heat since they voted on that Frankenstein budget bill.

We sounded the alarm in the committees. We talked about the cuts and what was in the bill; Republicans complained. We sounded the alarm in the Rules committee and Republicans complained; they said we were grandstanding. We sounded the alarm on the floor before the vote and Republicans just voted on the nasty bill. Interestingly, they did not applaud.

Now, **all hell is breaking loose.**

The Congressional Budget Office says this bill will add $2.4 trillion to the deficit and leave 10.9 million Americans uninsured. Medicaid cuts will cost jobs, wellness and lives. It is real in the field.

And then there are all of the other outlandish provisions in the bill, like prohibiting states from regulating AI, defunding Planned Parenthood, or cutting nutritional programs for children, the sick and the elderly.

This buggery bill is a crazy-palooza of bad.

**And then ...**

Literally, while I was writing this, the ultimate break-up happened on social.

To be fair, something had been brewing.

On Monday, Musky-rat started flexing on Republicans. He tweeted that the bill was a stinker.

Republicans scattered. Some said they hadn’t read the bill. Most were silent and scared.

His rants got louder and more incisive. He said that anyone who voted for the bill should be fired.

Uh-oh. Daddy’s mad. Or maybe Mommy.

Speaker Johnson got apoplectic, and Trump responded with deflection – i.e. those crazy TACO travel bans. Musk, however, stayed on message and has kept hammering away on the ugliness in the bill ... and showing receipts.

Republicans don’t know what to do.

**They need to do the right thing.** In the Senate and then again in the House.

I don’t know how long this break-up will last, if there will be make-up sex, or a messy divorce, but I do know that we should keep the popcorn hot and keep the receipts.

I have some for you right here. ⬇️⬇️⬇️

---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
It’s "Housewives" funny and incredibly dangerous. It's not really funny at all.

**Trump is doing nothing to address the cost-of-living crisis that he is making worse.** He is hurting middle class and working families. On top of the madness in the bill, he now wants to defund PBS and local radio, kill Elmo, and cut money that would help farmers, keep children in school and protect us from disease.

I could care less about this bromance on the rocks. Two ego-tyrants upset about who is the alpha does not interest me.

I am interested in the 250 lawsuits we have filed and the subsequent 185 rulings that have paused this maniac’s initiatives.

I am interested in the eight amicus briefs I have filed as a member of the Litigation Task Force, three of which were actually CITED in the rulings affirming our arguments.

I am interested in the wins we are having in elections across the country. We won in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Omaha and just recently in South Carolina.

I am only interested in the blowback from the Big Backstabbing Bill because it gives us time to work the Senate and save lives.

_These successes show that we are in the fight and we are winning._

We must keep talking about the things that matter most. Healthcare. Education. Jobs. Affordability. Family.

We must fight to reconnect with the rest of our neighbors and country. Everyone needs healthcare. Everyone needs job security. Everyone needs to believe they have a future.

The crappy reality TV show that Trump and his junk drawer (not cabinet) have us tuned into is NOT the one that is most important. We need to keep our eyes on the needs of the people. We need to keep telling the stories and sharing the dreams of the people.

---
|
---

I am interested in the 250 lawsuits we have filed and the subsequent 185 rulings that have paused this maniac’s initiatives. I am interested in the eight amicus briefs I have filed as a member of the Litigation Task Force, three of which were actually CITED in the rulings affirming our arguments. I am interested in the wins we are having in elections across the country. We won in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Omaha and just recently in South Carolina. I am only interested in the blowback from the Big Backstabbing Bill because it gives us time to work the Senate and save lives. These successes show that we are in the fight and we are winning. We must keep talking about the things that matter most. Healthcare. Education. Jobs. Affordability. Family. We must fight to reconnect with the rest of our neighbors and country. Everyone needs healthcare. Everyone needs job security. Everyone needs to believe they have a future. The crappy reality TV show that Trump and his junk drawer (not cabinet) have us tuned into is NOT the one that is most important. We need to keep our eyes on the needs of the people. We need to keep telling the stories and sharing the dreams of the people. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE TO THE FIGHT" | | | "PAID FOR BY SYDNEY KAMLAGER-DOVE FOR CONGRESS" | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Sydney Kamlager-Dove for Congress 5870 Melrose Ave Ste 3-805 Los Angeles, CA 90038 USA
